Below are some of the other important AIIMS Delhi latest updates:

faqs.question: Is AIIMS Delhi hard to get admission in?
faqs.answer:
AIIMS Delhi offers admission for UG, PG, Doctoral and Super Speciality courses such as BSc, MSc, MD, MDS, MS, and PhD, among others. Admission to any of the course is conducted based on entrance. Therefore, candidates must  prepare for the accepted entrance exams such as NEET UG, AIIMS Paramedical Entrance Exam, INICET, Joint CSIR-UGC NET for JRF/ ICMR - JRF/ ICMR- SRF/ DBT - JRF/ NBHM screening test/ INSPIRE fellowship. 
The accepted entrance exams may vary as per the choice of course opted for. Candidates must analyse the cutoffs to learn more about the probability of qualifying for AIIMS Delhi and securing a seat. Although, every admission year is more challenging than the previous one, candidates can still make it by putting in some efforts and work on those grades.

faqs.question: Which subjects are taught in MBBS at AIIMS Delhi?
faqs.answer:
AIIMS Delhi offers a four-year MBBS course, inclusive of one year compulsory internship. The MBBS course is divided in to three phases, viz., Pre-clinical, Para-clinical and Clinical Phase. Students will taught the following subjects in MBBS course at AIIMS Delhi:
Anatomy
Biochemistry
Physiology
Microbiology
Pathology
Pharmacology
Community Medicine
Paediatrics
Surgery and more

faqs.question: Is pursuing MSc at AIIMS Delhi expensive?
faqs.answer: MSc is quite affordable at AIIMS Delhi. The total tuition fee for MSc is INR 1,400. Candidates need to pay a one-time fee of INR 25 at the time of admission. AIIMS is a government institute and has a very low fee compared to other Medical colleges of India. Due to limited seats and high competition only a few aspirants get a chance to pursue a course from the institute.

college_info.intro:
All India Institute of Medical Sciences AIIMS Delhi offers various programmes at several levels, such as UG, PG, PhD, etc. The programmes are offered across various fields, including Medicine, Nursing, Medical, and others. MBBS is the flagship programme of AIIMS Delhi. MBBS is offered for a duration of five and a half years.
The aforementioned duration also includes one year of compulsory internship. During the internship period, students are given practical training to become successful health practitioners. The internship period also includes ward posting. After the successful completion of the MBBS programme, students could either pursue higher education such as MD, MS, etc. or start their practice. All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi offers internships at its attached hospital, i.e., AIIMS Hospital New Delhi.
AIIMS Delhi also offers BSc and MSc courses. After completing the BSc Nursing course from the institute, students can become Home Care Nurses, Junior Psychiatric Nurses, Nursing Executives, and others. The organisations which recruit BSc Nursing students include The Indian Red Cross Society, Fortis Healthcare, Columbia Asia Hospital, and others. BSc Nursing students are taught the core values involving Empathy, Human Dignity, Professionalism, Integrity, Autonomy, and others. These values are very important while taking care of the patients. Overall with a degree in Medical Sciences, students can become Academic Researchers, Clinical Research Associates, and others.

placements.overview:
The AIIMS Delhi 2026 placement data has not been released yet. Students are advised to check the previous year data of placements in AIIMS Delhi to have a clarity about the top recruiters and salary packages in the college.

AIIMS Delhi has an active placement and training cell. The institute has not released their official placement data but according to the NIRF 2025 report which documented placements during 2024, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 3-year placements stood at INR 20 LPA and INR 17 LPA, respectively. While, for UG 3-year and UG 4-year it was INR 12.50 LPA and INR 16 LPA, respectively. Also, the median package for PG 3-year and PG 6-year students stood at INR 34 LPA. Top recruiters at AIIMS Delhi included NLLB, Apollo, and Stella Aspire according to student reviews. Candidates can take a look below at the AIIMS Delhi placement of last three years:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

fees_and_eligibility.overview: AIIMS Delhi offers numerous UG, PG, Super Speciality, and PhD courses to students. At the UG level, the institute offers BSc and MBBS programmes to students. At the PG level, AIIMS Delhi offers MSc, MD, MS, and other courses. Candidates willing to take part in the AIIMS University Delhi admission process must apply before the last date of application. Candidates must know their AIIMS New Delhi eligibility criteria before applying online.

faqs.answer: A:    The total fees for the BSc programme typically falls between INR 36,620 to 38,200. The fees component includes tuition fees, security deposits, admission fees, etc. The first installment of the total fees has to be paid once seats are allotted during the counselling rounds.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am totally satisfied with the memories of college.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 80 percent of students got placed. The package offered ranges from 6-12 LPA. Government exams like NORCET are conducted by AIIMS for us. Internship is offered for the last 6 months with a stipend of Rs. 14,250, which we can use to cover our expenses. The top role offered is superintendent.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are top-level facilities in the classroom with Wi-Fi, labs, and the library. There are ventilation and AC rooms. It has a top-level hostel facility with a good mess and canteen. There are medical facilities for students and teaching staff members. Sports and games are also available in the sports ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in Physiology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My honest review about my college.

review_content.Placements: The placements are not guaranteed by the college as they make you perfect doctors and you have an option to either practice in a private clinic or else join some institute for presidentship. The interns could join the same institute once they clear the interview for the JRship, there's no such preference for the internal students. Being a medical college of course it provides an internship of 6 months giving you a chance to sit in each department. At present the interns are paid an amount of Rs. 18000 per month for their services.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many courses available under MD and Ph.D. degrees. These courses are remarkable and comparable to any other colleges in the state. Exam in the college is conducted semester-wise. A final exam is conducted and the results are considered for eligibility for placement. The hostel facility is excellent here with single rooms being allowed for each student, high-speed free Wi-Fi service, a lift in the hostels, and a common TV room on each floor. Each room is provided with a bed with mattress, a chair and table, and a godrej almirah making it perfect.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Medical Technology (Radiography) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Nice, spectacular, peaceful environment of college and totally satisfied.

review_content.Placements: There is no one left unemployed after pursuing the degree. The highest package offered in this course is 20 LPA, the average package is 12 LPA, and the lowest package is 8 LPA. Many medical companies like Vedanta and Medicare offer opportunities to us. You can serve as a radiographer, technical officer, senior technical officer, or chief technical officer.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a well-maintained library, Wi-Fi, and classrooms provided by AIIMS for students. There are a total of 14 messes, coffee shops, juice corners, a quad, and a playground for playing cricket, badminton, table tennis, basketball, etc. There is a well-established gym and swimming pool for students. The most interesting thing is that all of these facilities are free of cost.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Medical Technology (Radiography) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Bachelor of medical radiology and imaging technology from AIIMS NEW DELHI.

review_content.Placements: After getting a pass out from this prestigious institute you have many opportunities to explore and on placements also you will get a good priority in comparison. The package depends on where you are working in which hospital institute or medical college you are working in a government sector and whether you are a permanent employee your package will be around 8 to 10 lacs per annum. The post will be radiographer after promotions you will be upgraded to technical officer then senior technical officer then chief technical officer. The package will also be increased according to your post.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied. It has value for money.

review_content.Placements: There are a total of 100 seats available. To get a government job as a Nursing Officer, students need to clear both the Prelims and Main exams of NORCET. Almost 80% of students get a job every year. 4th year students get internships in the last 6 months, paying up to Rs. 13,000 per month, before completing the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is very neat and clean, with a guard every 20 meters, making it very safe. Our classes run in a lecture theatre with AC on it. We have a library running 24/7, and we have different departmental labs like anatomy and microbiology. Our hostel is also very good for single rooms to double and triple rooms with Wi-Fi.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Biophysics - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Delhi for medical studies.

review_content.Placements: It provided an adventurous experience as we had to manage numerous things at the same time like experience, learning, and trying to find leisure time in such a hectic program. I used to get a salary of Rs. 2,500 per month as a stipend. Overall, it is a very good place to practice medicine. Our college also has 3 primary health care centers (PHCs) which give a large scope for clinical practice. There is almost a 100% chance of getting a well-reputed job in a white coat with a good salary package and government facilities.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is not superb but it is good. I would rate it 7 out of 10 with single rooms, tables, beds, and a book track. Staff are cleaning the hostel every now and then. It is not great, but structure-wise, it is well-maintained.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for MBBS at AIIMS Delhi?
overview_faqs.answer: INR 6,100 is the total fee for MBBS at AIIMS, Delhi. This fee does not include various other charges, such as hostel charges, transportation charges, and others. Even if we add all the charges, the total fee is still very less and easily affordable for students. For more fee related details please visit the official website of the college.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for hostel at AIIMS Delhi?
overview_faqs.answer: The UG and PG students who get hostel at AIIMS Delhi campus are required to submit hostel fee from along with the tuition fee, every semester. For Junior residents, however, the hostel fee is deducted from salary. In addition to this, a hostel security deposit fee of INR 1,000 at the time of joining/ application. A course-wise and semester-wise AIIMS Delhi hostel fee is as follows:CourseSemester-wise Hostel FeeMBBSINR 123BSc Para MedicalINR 120BSc NursingINR 180MSc NursingINR 198MSc Other coursesINR 198PhD ScholarINR 480Junior Resident (Non-sponsored)INR 180Junior Resident (Sponsored)INR 2,880 – INR 4,080Senior Resident (Non-sponsored)INR 180Senior Resident (Sponsored)INR 2,880 – INR 4,080MHA (Non-sponsored)INR 180MHA (Sponsored)INR 2,880 – INR 4,080BSc (PB) NursingINR 180NOTE: The semester-wise hostel fee mentioned in the above table is inclusive of multiple components, namely Room Rent, Licence Fees Per Month (Married & Unmarried), Pot Fund, Electricity Charges and Gymkhana fee.

The package depends on where you are working in which hospital institute or medical college you are working in a government sector and whether you are a permanent employee your package will be around 8 to 10 lacs per annum. The post will be radiographer after promotions you will be upgraded to technical officer then senior technical officer then chief technical officer. The package will also be increased according to your post.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied. It has value for money.

content.Placements: There are a total of 100 seats available. To get a government job as a Nursing Officer, students need to clear both the Prelims and Main exams of NORCET. Almost 80% of students get a job every year. 4th year students get internships in the last 6 months, paying up to Rs. 13,000 per month, before completing the course.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is very neat and clean, with a guard every 20 meters, making it very safe. Our classes run in a lecture theatre with AC on it. We have a library running 24/7, and we have different departmental labs like anatomy and microbiology. Our hostel is also very good for single rooms to double and triple rooms with Wi-Fi.

admission_overview.college_name: AIIMS Delhi Admission 2025: Dates, Courses, Fees, Eligibility Criteria, Selection, Cutoff

admission_overview.title: AIIMS Delhi Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: AIIMS Delhi admission 2025 is entirely entrance-based for all UG & PG courses, namely BSc, MSc, MBBS, MD, MS, among others. Amongst all, the most popular course offered at AIIMS Delhi is MBBS, admission to which is subject to the NEET UG exam conducted by NTA. For PG and super-speciality courses, admissions were earlier done based on AIIMS PG Exam scores but are now replaced with INICET and institute-level exams. Students can view the video below for the AIIMS admission process:

eligibility_selection.title: AIIMS Delhi Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: AIIMS Delhi admission is conducted in online mode and is entrance-based only. The institute offers undergraduate, postgraduate, super speciality and doctoral programmes at UG, PG and doctorate programmes in streams such as Medical, Nursing, Applied Science and Dental Studies, among others. Below is a summary of all AIIMS Delhi courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: A pass in Class 12 with 60% aggregate (English + PCB steam)+ Age must be 17 and above

courses_table.eligibility: MBBS/BDS with 50% aggregate OR MSc degree with minimum 55% aggregate OR any other PG degree with 60% aggregate

paragraphs: AIIMS Delhi admissionfor each course differs from another one. However, the steps remain common which are to register for the course-specific entrance, appear for the exam-specific counselling process and then final seat allotment for the shortlisted students.
1: AIIMS Delhi Application Process 2025

AIIMS Delhi application process differs with every course offered by the college. While, there are a few programmes for which the application must be submitted on the official website, programmes such as MBBS need no college-level application form.
2: Selection
The selection criteria varies course-wise. Below are the details:
3: AIIMS Delhi Cutoff
Candidates must score equal or above the AIIMS Delhi cutoff for admission. Below is the course-wise previous year cutoff:
MS Cutoff:168-240 (General) | 314-732 (OBC) | 1281 (SC)
MCh Cutoff:106 (General)
4: Counselling

Aspirants are allotted seats through the respective entrance exam counselling. The seats in MBBS programme is allotted via MCC Counselling. Candidates need to participate in INI CET Counselling for MD, MS, MCh and DM courses. Those who are allotted seat need to confirm their admission by paying the course fee.

AIIMS Delhi fee has multiple components, out of which some are paid one-time, while others are paid semester-wise. The components include tuition fee, caution deposit, hostel and mess charges, etc. Aspirants are required to pay this fee at the time of admission and then semester-wise. Caution deposit is a refundable amount that is returned to the students after completion of the degree. Find below the course-wiseAIIMS Delhi feebreakdown:
Note:This information is taken from the official website/ sanctioning body.

AIIMS Delhi seat intake may also vary as per the course type. Candidates have to qualify the entrance exam accepted for the applied course. Aspirants once selected will need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.AIIMS Delhi seats for MBBSwhich is the flagship course, is 132. Below is the AIIMS Delhi course-wise intake:
Note:This information is as per the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

courses_data.description: AIIMS Delhi offers a two-year MSc course is offered across multiple specialisations. The institute offers MSc, MSc Nursing and MBiotechnology programmes at the PG level. The two-year MSc programme is spread across four semesters. Candidates need to pass an institute-level entrance exam for admission to MSc. A minimum of graduation is required to apply for the MSc programme.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MSc at AIIMS Delhi expensive?
faqs.answer: MSc is quite affordable at AIIMS Delhi. The total tuition fee for MSc isINR 1,400. Candidates need to pay a one-time fee of INR 25 at the time of admission. AIIMS is a government institute and has a very low fee compared to other Medical colleges of India. Due to limited seats and high competition only a few aspirants get a chance to pursue a course from the institute.

faqs.question: How much rank should I score to get AIIMS Delhi?
faqs.answer: AIIMS Delhi offers MD and MS specialisations for the candidates seeking to get admission. As per the INICET Round 3 seat allotment round for January session, the required rank to get into AIIMS Delhi stood between1and15262for the General AI category, considering theAIIMS Delhi INICET cutoff 2025. Among all the MD and MS specialisations, the most demanded specialisation was Discontinued (Nov 2022)- MDS in Prosthodontics. Candidates can also check out the AIIMS Delhi cutoff 2025 from the official

faqs.question: How many marks are required in NEET to get AIIMS Delhi?
faqs.answer: If a candidate belongs to the General Category, he/she should aim for at least 700+, and in the case of a reserved category, a candidate should aim for at least 675+. This is with regard to marks. In case the candidate wishes to know the same percentile-wise, he/she must score above 99 percentile to secure admission to AIIMS Delhi. Until 2020, students with 650+ score were able to get admission to MBBS at AIIMS Delhi, but the competition has been rising every year.

faqs.question: How can I do MSc from AIIMS Delhi?
faqs.answer: AIIMS Delhi admission to MSc Nursing is based on entrance exam scores of the candidates. The institute conducts an entrance test to shortlist aspirants for MSc Nursing. Selected candidates have to further participate in counselling rounds for a seat in the institute. Besides, aspirants should also have passed B.V.Sc, BPharma, BPT, BSc of 3-year duration for admission.

faqs.answer: AIIMS Delhi INICET cutoff 2024was concluded with the release of last round of seat allotment results. faqs.question: What is the rank required in NEET for MBBS to get AIIMS Delhi?
faqs.answer: Since you haven't mentioned your category, we would consider you to belong to the General Category. You should aim for a NEET UG cutoff rank under 50 to get AIIMS New Delhi. Looking at the last three years' cutoff,AIIMS Delhi NEET cutoff 2025for Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) closed at48,while in 2024, it closed at47and57in 2023 for the General AI category students.

faqs.question: Is studying at AIIMS Delhi expensive?
faqs.answer: Being a government institute, AIIMS Delhi is one of the cheapest institutes for education in the field of Medicine in India. The total tuition fee for all the courses, as available is tabulated below. However, since this total tuition fee is sourced from unofficial sources. It is indicative.Course NameTotal Tuition FeeMBBSINR 6,080BScINR 1,000 - INR 2,400MChINR 2,110 - INR2,490MSINR 2,110MChINR 3,330DMINR 3,330MScINR 1,400If students find the above emntioned fee costly, they can apply for the various scholarships provided by the college which they can check on the official website.

faqs.question: How much NEET score is required for AIIMS Delhi?
faqs.answer: According to the information gathered by different sources on the internet, the marks that are necessary to obtain admission to AIIMS Delhi in the General category is between 675 and in case you are a member of the reserved category, you need at least 650 marks. This is written with the understanding that the cut-offs for AIIMS Delhi, regardless of category, are above the 95th percentile. faqs.question: Can I get admission in AIIMS Delhi without NEET?
faqs.answer: The answer will be both yes and no. Getting into AIIMS Delhi without NEET is possible if applying for courses such as BSc, MSc, PB BSc Nursing, MD, MS, DM and MCh, among various others, apart from MBBS. Admission to all these courses is either subject to an institute-specific entrance exam or INICET.However, if the ultimate objective is to crack AIIMS New Delhi for MBBS, a student has to go through the NEET UG entrance exam followed by the counselling process. If the ranking and score obtained in the exam match with the minimum requirement of the institution, the student will get admission here for MBBS, otherwise not.

placement_data.title: AIIMS Delhi Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: AIIMS Delhi has not released its 2025 placement report yet. However, the NIRF report for 2025 is out. According to AIIMS Delhi NIRF report 2025, the median package offered during AIIMS Delhi UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2024 stood at INR 12.50 LPA and INR 16 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during AIIMS Delhi PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2024 stood at INR 20 LPA and INR 17 LPA , respectively. The highest median package recorded was for PG 3-year and PG 6-year which was INR 34 LPA.

Industry roles such as, healthcare professionals in various departments, In academics, research associate in the chosen specialisation is also a great option. Besides, healthcare professionals are also in high demand abroad.

description: AIIMS Delhi cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS Delhi cutoff 2024 has been released for NEET UG, detailing both opening and closing ranks across the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. The AIIMS Delhi NEET UG cutoff 2025 will be published following the announcement of the NEET UG 2025 result. In the meantime, candidates seeking admission to AIIMS Delhi can refer to the table below to review the NEET UG and INI CET cutoff ranks for the past three years across various courses, specialisations and categories.

AIIMS Delhi NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 48 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS Delhi MBBS cutoff 2025 was 48 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 207 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS Delhi accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
AIIMS Delhi INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 21 to 8545 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MS in General Surgery, with a lowest cutoff rank of 21. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Anatomy, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of 8545 for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MS in General Surgery, MS in Orthopaedics and MD in Anaesthesiology, with Round 3 closing ranks of 21, 188 and 392, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.
AIIMS Delhi B.Sc. cutoff 2025 was 542 in the last round. In 2024, the last round closing rank for the same course was 280 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
For the OBC category students, the AIIMS Nursing cutoff 2025 for the B.Sc. course was 1221 in the last round. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

The AIIMS Delhi cutoff 2025 has been released based on the AIIMS Paramedical exam. The cutoff was released for different categories such as General, OBC, SC, ST and EWS categories belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff range among the General AI category was between 9 and 293.
To check the round-wise and year-wise cutoff for different categories, check the filter given below:

The AIIMS Delhi cutoff 2024 has been released for MSc courses. During the Round 2 cutoff, the closing ranks ranged between 5 and 6 for the candidates belonging to the General category under the AI quota.

For the OBC category students, the Round 2 cutoff varied between 18 and 22 wherein M.Sc. in Medical Anatomy turned out as the most competitive course.For a detailed, round, year, and category-wise cutoff, candidates can use the filters provided below.

Before accepting NEET UG national-level entrance exam scores for MBBS admission, the institute accepted AIIMS scores for admission. Candidates can refer to the table given below to check out the AIIMS Delhi cutoff trends for 2020 and 2019 for the General All India category students:

highlights.description: One of India’s leading institutes is AIIMS Delhi. It has been consistently recognised by numerous national ranking agencies. As per the NIRF 2025, the institute ranked #8 under Overall category, #1 under Medical, #1 under Dental, and #11 under Research Institutions. AIIMS Delhi excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. All the information around AIIMS Delhi rankings is covered in the following article:

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, AIIMS Delhi has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. When compared to the ranking from the previous years, it has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend. In 2024, AIIMS Delhi fell 1 rank to #7 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been observed that the institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'Medical' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, AIIMS Delhi's rank is #1, the same as last year's rank in the 'Medical' category by the NIRF ranking.

highlights: Boys' & Girls’ Hostel: There are multiple and separate hostel accommodations available for boys and girls pursuing UG and PG programmes.
IT Infrastructure: Knowing that the IT infrastructure holds great importance in studies, AIIMS New Delhi boasts of a world-class IT infrastructure, unlike any other college in the city.
Laboratories: The laboratories are well-equipped, contain all the important instruments as per the needs of the students and are fully air-conditioned.

facilities: Comprehensive Rural Health Services Project, Ballabhgarh, (Haryana)
National Drug Dependence Treatment Center, Ghaziabad (Uttar Pradesh)

data: Individual rooms, 2-tier rooms, 3-tier rooms, family rooms available

sports.description: Ex and current students across various web pages online have mentioned that AIIMS Delhi offers an amazing sports facility. The campus has multiple badminton courts, an Olympic-sized swimming pool, a tennis court, a gym and various basketball, volleyball, squash and soccer courts. For indoor sports activities, there are multiple Table Tennis tables and a specific room with carom boards, foosball tables and Punching bags for boxing.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with the memories of college.
reviews.review_text: There are top-level facilities in the classroom with Wi-Fi, labs, and the library. There are ventilation and AC rooms. It has a top-level hostel facility with a good mess and canteen. There are medical facilities for students and teaching staff members. Sports and games are also available in the sports ground.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: There are many courses available under MD and Ph.D. degrees. These courses are remarkable and comparable to any other colleges in the state. Exam in the college is conducted semester-wise. A final exam is conducted and the results are considered for eligibility for placement. The hostel facility is excellent here with single rooms being allowed for each student, high-speed free Wi-Fi service, a lift in the hostels, and a common TV room on each floor. Each room is provided with a bed with mattres...

reviews.review_heading: Nice, spectacular, peaceful environment of college and totally satisfied.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-maintained library, Wi-Fi, and classrooms provided by AIIMS for students. There are a total of 14 messes, coffee shops, juice corners, a quad, and a playground for playing cricket, badminton, table tennis, basketball, etc. There is a well-established gym and swimming pool for students. The most interesting thing is that all of these facilities are free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: Bachelor of medical radiology and imaging technology from AIIMS NEW DELHI.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is best but hostel availability is very low for paramedical courses it will take around 2 years for allotment to a hostel as names come on the waiting list. There is only one hostel which is hostel number 18 in which seats are allocated after allotment there is a minimum fee.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied. It has value for money.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is very neat and clean, with a guard every 20 meters, making it very safe. Our classes run in a lecture theatre with AC on it. We have a library running 24/7, and we have different departmental labs like anatomy and microbiology. Our hostel is also very good for single rooms to double and triple rooms with Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Delhi for medical studies.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is not superb but it is good. I would rate it 7 out of 10 with single rooms, tables, beds, and a book track. Staff are cleaning the hostel every now and then. It is not great, but structure-wise, it is well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: My college provides clinical postings in all departments like surgery, OT, neuro, cardio, etc.
reviews.review_text: My college campus has good facilities like security, coffee shop, library, swimming pool, gym facility, cafeteria, badminton games, park facility for jogging & walking, In my classroom, facilities are projectors and comfortable seating arrangements. Hostel timing is 6:00 a.m. to 10:30 p.m., and campus timing is 24 hours available; the library is open all the time, as are the cafeteria and gym. Some park and library are good places for me. My college experience is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive nature of faculty members for students.
reviews.review_text: The annual function, PYREXIA, was held last year. It was very good, and I enjoyed it a lot. This year it is going to happen in October. There is a good library in college that has almost all the books required in MBBS. They also provide us with a free subscription to an online platform for studying.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied loved my journey
reviews.review_text: If we talk about facilities and infrastructure of course no doubt. They will give us best environment for outdoor game, study, tea breaks , enjoy with our batch mates and what not. If we talk about quality of mess food I say not best but not bad, it was moderate.

reviews.review_heading: The college campus is known for its greenery.
reviews.review_text: In our rooms, we have full freedom to have whatever we want. Each room is equipped with two tubelights, a bed, an almirah, a mirror, washbasins, and a window. The meal quality is fair enough, and the menu differs on different days. Overall, the hostel facilities are nice and well-maintained. Hostel fee: INR 180 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is big. People can enjoy their campus life.
reviews.review_text: In first year, you get a room for 2 people, and it contains a cart, almirah, a study room, continuing a study table, a chair, a sink and there are messes in every hostel with different types of food. There are no separate washrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my dream college AIIMS, Delhi.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi facility is provided in the hostel room and library. Classrooms are well-equipped with digital screens and air conditioning. Along with that, we are also provided with swimming pool, gym, library, reading rooms, and sports areas for table tennis, badminton, basketball, volleyball, etc. Mess and canteen food quality is fine. Medical facilities, including free treatment and medicine, is provided to all students.

reviews.review_heading: Nurses at AIIMS New Delhi.
reviews.review_text: AIIMS Delhi is one of the top medical colleges in India. The campus area is very large, accommodating many departments and hostels. In this course, you will be taught in well-equipped classrooms with projectors, speakers, AC, etc. There are labs for practical knowledge, and a library that is open 24/7. The hostels for nursing students are very spacious, accommodating around 300-400 students. The rooms are well-furnished and ventilated. The hostel has a mess which serves good quality food and is ...

reviews.review_heading: The insights of AIIMS New Delhi. Personal and professional development.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of AIIMS is very vast. Every department has its own 10-story building, like surgical block, mother-and-child block, RPC eye centre, trauma centre and many more. The classrooms are equipped with modernized projector. There are labs for hematology, anatomy, physiology, etc. The library is very big. It has all medical books, new editions and publications. It has Wi-Fi and a big sitting area with air conditioned. It is 24/7 open for everyone. The hostel's facilities are very good....

reviews.review_heading: The truth about AIIMS Delhi.
reviews.review_text: Hostel mess fee was ₹1300 per year. The electricity and gym fees were ₹300 for a year. There are several fests organized, but the most amazing fest is Pulse at AIIMS, New Delhi. The classrooms are big and ventilated along with research labs being available for thesis research.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, CMC Vellore ranks #3 under the category 'Medical'.

The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

table.details: CMC Vellore & the Government of AP signed an MoU with the Andhra Pradesh Economic Development Board during the 30th CII Partnership Summit for 2025

college_info.intro:
CMC Vellore Tamil Nadu popular programmes are MBBS, MBA, BSc, and others. MBBS is the flagship programme of CMC Vellore. MBBS is offered for a duration of five and a half years. The aforementioned duration also includes one year of compulsory internship. During the internship period, students are given practical training to become successful health practitioners. The internship period also includes ward posting. After the successful completion of the MBBS programme, students could either pursue higher education such as MD, MS, etc., or can start their practice. CMC Vellore offers internships at its attached hospital, i.e., CMCHospital Vellore. CMC is even ranked by The Week 2025 at the 1st position under the Medicine & Health Sciences category. CMC Hospital Vellore Tamil Nadu was ranked at the 1st position by The Week 2025 under the Best Multispeciality Hospital South category.
CMC BSc students get jobs in top companies. The organisations which recruit BSc Nursing students include The Indian Red Cross Society, Fortis Healthcare, Columbia Asia Hospital, and others. BSc Nursing students are taught the core values involving Empathy, Human Dignity, Professionalism, Integrity, Autonomy, and others. These values are very important while taking care of the patients. reviews_list.review_title: A well-disciplined college for medicine.

review_content.Placements: The maximum and minimum salary packages offered by the recruiters for the postgraduate students in Rehabilitation Medicine are 27.3 LPA and 6.8 LPA. Most importantly, 90% of students get hired in the off-campus recruitment, others started their own ventures, and a few of them are working on the same campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the medical students are required to stay in the hostel to provide hands-on training without any delays. Courses should be offered at affordable prices, which include hostel fees and tuition fees. Students are not allowed outside campus on weekdays. Parents are allowed to visit only on weekends.

reviews_list.batch_info: Post Graduate Diploma in Family Medicine (PGDFM) – for fresh MBBS graduates - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The Postgraduate Diploma in Family Medicine is exclusively for freshers in doctor.

review_content.Placements: The package offered to students after their course completion was typically between 5.3 LPA and 29.6 LPA for the entire year. During the training period, it generally started from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 40,000 per month. Guaranteed placements were provided to all students who had undergone proper training without any black marks.
review_content.Infrastructure: I'm sure this was one of the most restricted campuses, following a specific set of principles to make the campus value-based. They gave priority to building disciplined students over other aspects. A sports complex with features like indoor and outdoor games, as well as a badminton complex, was included.

review_summary.college_name: CMC Vellore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Medical Physics - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, best college for M.Sc. in Medical Physics course.

content.Placements: In our study, all students were receiving access to school. About 65 to 75% of students succeed in placement. Average package offered in the course was 13 to 25 LPA. About 60% of students get an internship in our college. Students get jobs with Philips, Siemens, GE Healthcare, and more.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are available. Every classroom has Wi-Fi, libraries contain a wide range of literature to assist pupils learn, and computer labs include a choice of machines. College also boasts adequate hostel facilities, with three beds in one room, and canteen delivers high-quality meals. College offers a variety of sports and medical services.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: B.Sc. in medical laboratory technology.

content.Placements: Basically, after completing the course from CMC Vellore, there were opportunities for each and every student to work on the same campus with good packages. In case someone was interested in working elsewhere, CMC Vellore also paved the way for that. Usually, we got hired with packages ranging from 3.6 to 6.7 LPA, including opportunities abroad.
content.Infrastructure: It was essential to follow the dress code insisted on by the management. The dress code was not only for students but also for teachers. Specialized laboratories were arranged with a special setup. On all special occasions, the student in charge represented the college.

Most importantly, 90% of students get hired in the off-campus recruitment, others started their own ventures, and a few of them are working on the same campus.
content.Infrastructure: All the medical students are required to stay in the hostel to provide hands-on training without any delays. Courses should be offered at affordable prices, which include hostel fees and tuition fees. Students are not allowed outside campus on weekdays. Parents are allowed to visit only on weekends.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Family Medicine (PGDFM) – for fresh MBBS graduates - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The Postgraduate Diploma in Family Medicine is exclusively for freshers in doctor.

content.Placements: The package offered to students after their course completion was typically between 5.3 LPA and 29.6 LPA for the entire year. During the training period, it generally started from Rs. 25,000 to Rs. 40,000 per month. Guaranteed placements were provided to all students who had undergone proper training without any black marks.
content.Infrastructure: I'm sure this was one of the most restricted campuses, following a specific set of principles to make the campus value-based. They gave priority to building disciplined students over other aspects. A sports complex with features like indoor and outdoor games, as well as a badminton complex, was included.

individual_reviews.course: Post Graduate Diploma in Mental Health (PGDMH) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Postgraduate Diploma in Mental Health at CMC Vellore.

content.Placements: A larger number of students favored pursuing post-graduation, especially in the discipline of mental health, considering its future scope and career opportunities. Even during the probation period, they were offering more than 4 LPA. After completing the course, we also got the chance to serve at CMC Vellore.
content.Infrastructure: The quantity and quality of food provided in the mess were acceptable to eat. Students suggestions were considered before providing a menu for the working days. Only a limited variety of food was cooked on all days. The campus was well spread, with a lot of seating for relaxation, which helped relieve our stress.

faqs.question: How to prepare for BSc for CMC Vellore admission?
faqs.answer: Preparing for entrance examinations requires a lot of hard work, but understanding some tips and tactics may only help your preparation. Remember that passing an entrance exam is about doing your best in the examination hall rather than putting in a lot of effort. Make a plan that can be carried out successfully. The ideal exam approach is to play to your strengths and sail through your flaws. Keep an eye out for questions that have more than one valid answer and need you to select the option with the most accurate answer.Complete all of the areas in which you excel so that you can devote more attention to the challenging ones.If you want to take your exam between 9 and 12, you should practise solving papers at the same time to teach your mind to be hyperactive during that time.

paragraphs: The placement details of 2025 batch are yet to be released on the official website of CMC Vellore. However, the institute has released the NIRF report 2025 which includes the placement details for the batch 2023 and 2024. According to the report, all 98 MBBS students were placed from the total 98 graduated students of the batch 2024 with a median package of INR 4.76 LPA.

In PG 2 year program , 1 students of the batch 2024 were placed with a median salary of INR 7.63 LPA. Further, 175 students from the PG 3 year batch 2024 secured placements with the median salary of INR 12.10 LPA. Some of the top recruiters of Christian Medical College Vellore in the recent past include Philips, Siemens, GE Healthcare, Apollo Hospital, Fortis, Max Hospital , etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, best college for M.Sc. in Medical Physics course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available. Every classroom has Wi-Fi, libraries contain a wide range of literature to assist pupils learn, and computer labs include a choice of machines. College also boasts adequate hostel facilities, with three beds in one room, and canteen delivers high-quality meals. College offers a variety of sports and medical services.

reviews.review_heading: B.Sc. in medical laboratory technology.
reviews.review_text: It was essential to follow the dress code insisted on by the management. The dress code was not only for students but also for teachers. Specialized laboratories were arranged with a special setup. On all special occasions, the student in charge represented the college.

reviews.review_heading: A well-disciplined college for medicine.
reviews.review_text: All the medical students are required to stay in the hostel to provide hands-on training without any delays. Courses should be offered at affordable prices, which include hostel fees and tuition fees. Students are not allowed outside campus on weekdays. Parents are allowed to visit only on weekends.

reviews.review_heading: The Postgraduate Diploma in Family Medicine is exclusively for freshers in doctor.
reviews.review_text: I'm sure this was one of the most restricted campuses, following a specific set of principles to make the campus value-based. They gave priority to building disciplined students over other aspects. A sports complex with features like indoor and outdoor games, as well as a badminton complex, was included.

reviews.review_heading: Postgraduate Diploma in Mental Health at CMC Vellore.
reviews.review_text: The quantity and quality of food provided in the mess were acceptable to eat. Students suggestions were considered before providing a menu for the working days. Only a limited variety of food was cooked on all days. The campus was well spread, with a lot of seating for relaxation, which helped relieve our stress.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Christian Medical College, Vellore.
reviews.review_text: CMC had several departments and separate buildings for the department of nursing and allied health sciences for medicine. A centralized library located at the center of the campus that offered comprehensive learning experience. So departmental libraries arranged for all the departments.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in our area.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college was poor in comparison with the other colleges. Although most facilities, like library, Wi-Fi, etc., were available. The maintenance part was really bad. The food we get in hostel is okay. Hostel had good facilities. Sports were conducted in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for medicos.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have well-equipped classrooms, Wi-Fi, simulation labs for every department, a very good library, computer lab, chapel, etc. The infrastructure of the hostel is very good, the rooms are very sophisticated, there are a gym, pantry, prayer room, recreation hall, library, and much more in the hostel. The mess food is very good. The meal is planned based on the RDA.

admission_overview.title: PGIMER, Chandigarh Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: PGIMER, Chandigarh admissions are primarily based on the student's performance in the entrance exam. Candidates need to qualify INICET entrance exam for admission at PGIMER. Eligible candidates are then called for the counselling round. PGIMER's application process is conducted through online mode. Located in Chandigarh, the Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) offers a range of medical science degrees and diploma courses including BSc, MSc, MD and PhD. Admission to BSc and MSc is given on the basis of the PGIMER entrance exam while for MD, the candidate needs to qualify INICET exam at PGI Chandigarh.

eligibility_selection.title: PGIMER, Chandigarh Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: PGIMER, Chandigarh is one of the most prestigious medical institutes in India and offers more than 100 courses covering major streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing etc. Courses are taught by experienced faculty members who are trained in Endocrinology, Sericulture etc. Candidates seeking admission to PGIMER courses are required to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria set by the college for their desired course. The PGIMER, Chandigarh course admissions are offered based on a preset admission criteria. Students need to clear both the basic eligibility requirements and selection rounds. Admissions are mostly offered based on the score secured in either college or national-level entrance test. paragraphs: ThePGIMER admission processis based on the entrance score. Applicants must complete Class 12 with relevant aggregate scores for admission to UG courses. Applicants must also hold a valid score in theINICET examinationforMD/ MS/ MCh/ DM. INICET is conducted by AIIMS, New Delhi. Admission toMS/MD coursesis conducted twice a year and the new session starts inJanuaryandJuly every year. Below are the step-by-step process for PGI Chandigarh admission:
Application Process 2026
Eligible students must apply online through the website of PGIMER. The application has to be filled in properly and then submitted with documents and application fees.
Selection & Counselling Process 2026

Selection is done on the basis of INICET/ PGIMER entrance exam depending on the course. Eligible students are then called for thecounselling roundas per their rank. Aside from the entrance tests, students also need to clear the basic eligibilitty requirements of each course.
Seat Allocation and Verification of Documents
After the counselling round, candidates need to accept the allotted seat online. Seat allocation is totally based on candidates'All India rank, preference course filled and availability of seats.
The last process includes 'Reporting & Submission of Documents/ security deposit' which needs to be completed within the deadline given by PGI Chandigarh.
Documents required for counselling at PGI Chandigarh:
Candidates failing to produce documents during counselling are not permitted to appear for counselling process. The list of document is as below:

PGIMER fee structureincludestuition fee,hostel fee,library deposit, training and placement fee, etc. Some of these are to be paid only once at the time of admission. The other charges are to be paid either yearly or semester-wise. The payment can be done through accepted payment gateway. faqs.question: How can I join PGIMER, Chandigarh MS?
faqs.answer: To join the Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research Master of Surgery/ MS course, students have to check the eligibility first. Eligible students can apply online. The admissions are entrance-based. Students are selected based on INI-CET score + counselling.

faqs.question: Does PGIMER accept NEET score?
faqs.answer: As per resources and information availaible, the initial entrance exam which is accepted by PGIMER Chandigarh for admission is INI CET. There may be a chance that NEET-PG is also conisdered for admission but INI CET is the considered for admission to majority of the courses. Other than this, PGIMER also conducts its own entrance exam for admission to various courses. So basically you have to score a good marks in NEET PG. I repeat NEET PG it isn't NEET (UG) . If you score a good marks in the NEET PG then you can apply here very easily and also you will be able to sit for the PGIMER official ENTRANCE test.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for PGIMER?
faqs.answer: PGIMER admission process is based on entrance score. To apply for admission, applicants must complete Class 12 with relevant aggregate scores for admission to UG courses. Applicants must also hold a valid score in theINICET examinationforMD/ MS/ MCh/ DM. INICET is conducted by AIIMS, New Delhi. Admission toMS/MD coursesis conducted twice a year and the new session starts inJanuaryandJuly every year. For few courses, PGIMER accepts the admission based on PGIMER entrance test followed by counselling. the application process is completely online.

faqs.question: How many rounds of counselling are held for PGIMER Chandigarh BSc admissions?
faqs.answer: PGIMER Chandigarh BSc counselling rounds generally begin around the month of July. The college holds personal counselling, which means that eligible candidates have to physically report at the institute. Four rounds of counselling are held, in which the fourth round is the’ Open’ or ‘Spot’ round.Note: Candidates absent during the counselling process will not be considered for the admission.

placement_report.college_name: PGIMER Chandigarh Placements 2025: Median Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: PGIMER Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: PGIMER Chandigarh has not published an official placement report. However, the NIRF Report 2025 has been out for the institute. As per the report, the median package offered to UG 3 and UG 4-Year sudents during placements 2024 was INR 10 LPA each. While the median package offered to PG 2-year placements 2024 was INR 11.5 LPA . The median package offered to PG 3-year students was INR 30 LPA during the PGIMER Chandigarh placements 2024.

As per PGIMER NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 9 LPA and INR 18 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 60 students were placed out of 70 students during PG 2-year placements whereas 200 students were placed and 35 students opted for higher studies out of 250 students during PG 3-year placements 2023.

Earlier, the NIRF report 2023 is out. According to the report, 40 PG (2-year) and 165 PG (3-year) students were placed during PGIMER Chandigarh placements 2022. Further, the median package offered to PG (2-year) and PG (3-year) students during 2022 placements was INR 8 LPA and INR 17 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research, Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research, Chandigarh has been rated 4.2 on placements on the basis of 6 reviews done by students. In Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research, Chandigarh, 41 students were admitted in year 2017-18, out of which 41 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 24 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 571230 and 7 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2018-19, 43 students were admitted, out of which 43 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 35 qualified students got placed with a median salary of INR 600000 and 8 students got selected for higher studies. In Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research, Chandigarh, 57 students were admitted in year 2019-20, out of which 57 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 27 qualified students got placed with a good median salary of INR 753033 and 7 students got selected for higher studies.

faqs.question: How many students were placed during PGI Chandigarh placements?
faqs.answer: PGIMER has not released the 2023 placement details yet. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out. According to the report, 40 PG (2-year) and 165 PG (3-year) students were placed during PGIMER Chandigarh placements 2022. Further, the median package offered to PG (2-year) and PG (3-year) students during 2022 placements was INR 8 LPA and INR 17 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: What is the internship duration of BSc courses at PGIMER Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: Four out of the eight PGI BSc courses comprises of a compulsory internship period in which the students are required to do an internship. This internship duration differs based on the specialisation chosen. The following table shows the breakdown of total course duration (course+internship) for each of the specialisation: Specialisation Duration Medical Radiology & Imaging Technology 3 years + 1 year internship Radiotherapy Technology 3 years + 6 months internship Medical Technology (Operation Theatre) 3 years + 1 year internship Medical Technology (Dialysis Therapy Technology) 3 years + 1 year internship

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at PGIMER Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: PGIMER Chandigarh offers various medical courses at the UG, PG, Advanced Masters, Doctorate, and Post Doctorate levels. BSc is one of the flagship courses provided at the institute. The total tuition fee for the BSc course is around INR 1K as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is, however, subject to changes and hence, is indicative. The course is provided across specialisations including Nursing, Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology, among others.

faqs.question: What is the application fees for PGIMER Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: The application fee for all the courses is INR 1,000 for the general category and for the SC/ST candidates it is Rs 800 (except for MD/MCh which is Rs 1000 for all the categories). PGIMER application process is completely online. All the applicants who wish to apply to any of the courses offered by PGI Chandigarh can register online and pay the fee.

faqs.question: How much salary can one expect after BSc from PGIMER Chandigarh?
faqs.answer: PGIMER Chandigarh offers seven BSc specialisations in the field of paramedical science. These courses enable students to make a career in the field of paramedics. The salary of a paramedic depends on the job profile and respective individual skillset. Following is a list of different job profiles in the field of paramedic Science and the average salary offered: Advanced Life Support Paramedics can expect a salary of-INR 3 LPA Medical Assistants-INR 3 LPA Critical Care Paramedics-INR 3 LPA Radiologists-INR 16.8 LPA Occupational Therapists-INR 4 LPA

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities with highly skilled faculty, and bad placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, but it can be better. Our department (DCM & SPH) contains classrooms for different years, a library, and Wi-Fi. The library is provided by the PGI Campus. Water and canteen facilities are also there. The quality of the hostel facilities is average. The quality of food is good, clean, and hygienic. Medical facilities are also provided to the students. The sports management team is also there. On an average, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the higher officials and facilities for low placements.
reviews.review_text: There are very well developed classrooms and auditoriums for classes and conferences . Practical exposure is very high. The price of mess is very reasonable  . Medical facilities are provided to each and every student . There is special relief in medicines for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Good college review and nice facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome and amazing. There are many facilities given to students, like high-speed Wi-Fi, and the labs are well-updated with all the tools. The library has all the required books. The canteen provides many types of facilities. The sports are well-conducted, both indoors and outdoors.

reviews.review_heading: A really good college with qualified faculty.
reviews.review_text: This university had a well-maintained and developed infrastructure for our course. The college was offering facilities like Wi-Fi, a canteen, labs, a library, sports, etc. We were available for the students. Hostel facilities were available for the students of our college.

reviews.review_heading: Physiotherapy in PGIMER.
reviews.review_text: There are no proper hostel facilities for students. Canteens are good, and food quality is adequate. A sports complex is available for sports activities. As the best medical institute after AIIMS Delhi, it offers a wide range of medical services.

reviews.review_heading: B.Sc. nursing in PGIMER.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is very nice and very cheap. All facilities are provided and the staffs and warden are very cooperative. Good food, light facility and geyser are available.? Security is very strong here. Hostel is also very nearer to college and provides even fridge service.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a different way of leaning.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure consists of world-class equipment for learning and well-air-conditioned classrooms are provided. Department of community medicine and the school of public health provide great facilities to the students.

reviews.review_heading: The best an audiology student can get.
reviews.review_text: Being one of the best hospital in the country, PGIMER definitely has all the modern facilities. They have the best in category machines, labs and equipment. A student gets a chance to work with the latest technology and learn each and everything practically. In addition the quality of food in the doctor's mess is also good.

reviews.review_heading: A review of Post Graduate Institute of Medical Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is second to none as we are offered hands-on experience of different concepts. The equipment available is the latest and is updated according to the modern standards and guidelines, which helps us get practical exposure. I am a day scholar, so I don't really know about the food offered in the mess. However, I heard that it's okay.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides free Wi-Fi. It has research labs with advanced equipment. All classrooms have a studious environment. The quality of the food in the canteen is good. It provides a variety of food items.

data.description: Hostel is very nice and very cheap. All facilities are provided and the staffs and warden are very cooperative. Good food, light facility and geyser are available. Security is very strong here. Hostel is also very nearer to college and provides even fridge service. Sector 15 is full of pgs also 11 has some. There is hostel in sector 11 for women.

Students opting for the flagship or other programmes can also study ahead from the same university.

review_summary.college_name: KGMU Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Excellent clinical exposure, supportive faculty, and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: MBBS courses in government medical colleges in India, including MLNMC Prayagraj, do not offer traditional campus placements like engineering or management institutes. Medical graduates are required to undergo a Compulsory Rotatory Residential Internship for one year. After this, there is a bond of two years to serve as a government doctor in rural hospitals and PHC centres. After this, some graduates take the NEET PG exam and secure a seat in MD/MS courses to pursue post-graduation. Some graduates directly apply as general physicians in private hospital, PHCs, Tutors, and some open their own clinics.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: My dream came true.

content.Placements: The total batch is of 200 students, including both male and female, who are selected through an all-India level examination. It provides both undergraduate and postgraduate degrees in various medical departments, and our college is ranked around 9000.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not so good; it is a very old college. The library facility in our college, which is common to all classrooms, is not so good. It is old, but the teaching is the best. The campus is all green. I think if you love greenery, then it is the best college to attend.

admission_overview.college_name: KGMU Admission 2026: Dates, Cutoff, Fees, Eligibility, Application Process

admission_overview.title: KGMU Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: King George's Medical University admissions procedure 2026 is now available for different courses. KGMU admissions are merit and entrance-based on the basis of the level and nature of the course one is opting for. King George's Medical University (KGMU) Lucknow, India, is a state government university that was ranked 11th in the NIRF 2024 Rankings. The university has more than 10 courses at different undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG), and doctoral levels, in Medicine, Health Sciences, and Nursing streams. The university provides direct admission for BSc programmes; however, admission to other UG and PG courses is based on national entrance exams such as NEET PG, NEET SS, NEET UG, etc.

eligibility_selection.title: KGMU Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: KGMU admission is mostly entrance-based for top UG & PG courses in the field of Medical. Candidates have to meet the basic eligibility requirements of the respective courses to apply for the desired programme. Further, the final seat allotment is done based on UP NEET UG/ PG and NEET SS counselling process. KGMU admission process begins with the applications of various national-level entrance exams. Additionally, there is no limit on the no. of attempts for the NEET UG exam, but the candidate should be at least of 17 years old. A total of 22,09,318 appeared for the NEET 2025 exam, out of which 12,36,531 qualified for the exam. Candidates can visit the official website of the respective exams to apply online. paragraphs: King George's Medical University admissions 2026 are based on certain entrance exams for most of the courses. Candidates willing to apply for admission in the university must fill outthe application form online. Find below the step-wise explanation of theKGMU admission process:-
STEP 1: King George's Medical University Application Process

Candidates must go to the official website of the separate entrance tests that are being accepted for their selected courses in order to apply for KGMU admissions for a variety of UG and PG courses. However, the only way to apply for the BSc course is through the official KGMU website (kgmu.org). Before the application deadline, qualified individuals can apply for the tests by completing an application.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
The applicants should be of the required minimum eligibility requirements to be eligible to take the respective entrance exams.
STEP 3: Counselling Process

Merit lists of the top-scoring applicants will be created following the start of the relevant exam. For the final seat allocation, these candidates must register and take part in the course-specific counseling process.
STEP 4: Admission Confirmation
Following seat distribution, chosen students must confirm their enrollment by paying the necessary fees by the KGMU deadline.
KGMU fee structure may include components such asregistration, tuition, examination, and alumni fees.

Coming to affordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While the availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. placement_data.title: KGMU Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: A total of 413 students achieved placements during King George Medical College placements 2024. From PG 3-year, 319 students were placed with the median salary reaching INR 16 LPA. There were 52 students who belonged to the BDS program and the median salary was INR 9 LPA. Out of 42 MDS students, 42 were placed, the median package recorded during King George Medical College placements 2024 was INR 16.50 LPA

nirf.description:
KGMU has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for KGMU indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, KGMU climbed 5 ranks to #83 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, KGMU climbed 3 ranks to #50 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Medical' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, KGMU climbed 11 ranks to #8 rank in the 'Medical' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Dental' category, the institute's ranks have descended when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, KGMU fell 3 ranks to #7 rank in the 'Dental' category by the NIRF ranking.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Motilal Nehru Medical College, AllahabadReviewed on 1 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Excellent clinical exposure, supportive faculty, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There is no Wi-Fi facility. The laboratories are well-equipped for Anatomy, Physiology, Biochemistry, Pathology, Microbiology, and Pharmacology, with modern microscopes, specimens, and simulation models for hands-on learning. There are projectors in class with enough seats. There is a central library that offers all the required books. The hostel provides two individuals in one room. The message quality is good, but a little expensive. There is enough space for g...

reviews.review_heading: My dream came true.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good; it is a very old college. The library facility in our college, which is common to all classrooms, is not so good. It is old, but the teaching is the best. The campus is all green. I think if you love greenery, then it is the best college to attend.

reviews.review_heading: Maybe the dream college you want.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good, we have a very good library, and the infrastructure is somewhat old. The campus is very good, with greenery all around. It is very refreshing and is away from the traffic. The hospital is separate. The hostel is a little bit old.  The infrastructure is a little old and not so good...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Science, LucknowReviewed on 2 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Overall, the institute is good for admission and also value for money. Campus life is also good.
reviews.review_text: Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Sciences has good infrastructure for the course and hostel. Hostel facilities are available for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are also best for students. The campus life and hostel life are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Science, LucknowReviewed on 28 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: This is a good college for admission.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, classrooms, and the library are all good, and the facilities provided by the college might be different for all courses. I am a day scholar student, so I have no idea about the hostel, but the hostel looks like it gives good facilities for students. There is lunch, and dinner might be good, but not every day.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Motilal Nehru Medical College, AllahabadReviewed on 22 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfaction for academic purpose and surroundings. Seniors are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in the hostel are very good you get a shared room in your early year and then after 3 years, you get a single room. Electricity is always available. Infrastructure is above average. There are multiple mess and each of them serves good hygienic food and a water cooler is also there. Classrooms are well-established and AC furnished. Projectors are placed for visual studies.

reviews.review_heading: King George's Medical University - A medical palace.
reviews.review_text: The campus is astonishing. It is better to say it is a medical palace. Feeling proud to be there. Classrooms, a canteen, and the hostel infrastructure are highly developed compared to any other college. The hostel is good. Mess facilities are provided. The hostel in time is 10 PM. You can enjoy the campus as every place is very beautifully maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Real insight from a Georgian.
reviews.review_text: We had Wi-Fi in both the hostel and campus. Labs and classrooms were very spacious, with classrooms that could accommodate 250 students. The hostel was top-notch, with double-sharing rooms, and every student had a separate almirah and study table. Every room had an attached balcony. The mess was awesome, offering sumptuous meals like dosa, idli, and dahi bade.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Vivekanand College of Nursing, LucknowReviewed on 22 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in terms of knowledge and skill development. It also has good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is pretty good, and if we look externally, our college looks pretty good. The main thing is it has a clean and hygienic environment which our college maintains and makes it pretty attractive. Classrooms are calm with a quiet environment in which students can study quietly with full concentration. Our college has a library with a variety of course books and fictional books.

reviews.review_heading: KGMU College of Nursing, Best Place for Nursing.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is Wi-Fi available for the students, which they need to register for first at the IT cell of the college. The lecture halls are fully air-conditioned, and there is a fire safety system in each class. We are provided with a health card, with which we can get our health checkups.

reviews.review_heading: A really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college are proper water facilities, projectors, AC classrooms, fire alarms on each and every floor with water sprays attached in every classroom, labs for better understanding of students, and a library where you can find your course books easily. The quality of the hostel is not that good; I would rate it as average. The mess and canteen are good. Events are organized every year, such as Sports Week, where different games like the 400-meter run race and relay rac...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Dr. Ram Manohar Lohia Institute of Medical Science, LucknowReviewed on 18 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Little dissatisfied about not having proper sports facilities but good in academics.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and hostel facilities are great as we got a 3BHK, and 6 students live with a facility of geyser etc. My hostel is in front of the Palassio Mall and Ekana Stadium where we can enjoy the cricket matches just near us (if tickets are having).

reviews.review_heading: Best college for doing nursing as high quality education is provided.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi all over the university. Pediatrics lab, anatomy lab, nursing foundation lab, community health nursing lab. Hostel mess is available. Canteen in the hostel. Health cards for students for free service are available. A ground for sports and games. Excellent campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college is awesome, and education and faculty are exceptional.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is awesome. We have air-conditioned classrooms, advanced labs with instruments, and a library that has lots of books. The hostel is also provided; the fee is 4900 per year. There is a mess to which you have to pay yourself, and there is a study hall provided.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely beautiful and fantastic with good placement.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good infrastructure, and all the departments are equipped with the best of everything. The classrooms are very spacious and comfortable and equipped with ventilation and good lighting. Sports activities are also done in our college. Hostel facilities also have Wi-Fi and good food.
