fees_and_eligibility.overview: JIPMER Pondicherry offers courses in the fields of Medical, Nursing and Allied Health Science. JIPMER imparts UG, PG, and Super Specialty Medical Training through a large hospital complex (JIPMER Hospital) and a Nursing College. Some of the courses available are MBBS, BSc, MSc, MD, MS, MDS, DM, MCh, and PhD courses. The below are the JIPMER Medical College courses and their respective eligibility and fee strcuture:

faqs.answer: A:    JIPMER Puducherry MBBS fee structure is cumulative of multiple components, such as tuition fee, caution money, and more. The total tuition fee for the UG-level programme is INR 30,465. After the final selection, students need to pay the admission fee amount as per the institute or the first semester fee. The fee amount mentioned here is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: What is the fees of MBBS in JIPMER?

faqs.answer: A:    The selection criteria vary from one course to another. While some courses like MBBS require valid scores in NEET-UG and other courses like BSc and MSc, the institute conducts its entrance exam. For admission to the flagship MBBS programme, candidates have to appear for the NEET-UG exam. Candidates having valid scores/ rank in NEET-UG can then apply through the JIPMER Puducherry official website followed by the counselling round conducted by the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.
faqs.question: Can I get into JIPMER Puducherry without NEET?

faqs.answer: A:    In comparison to MBBS fee at other colleges, JIPMER Puducherry is not expensive! The total tuition fee for the 66 months programme is INR 30465. The total fee may include other components as well such as security deposit, library fee and more.
faqs.question: Is MBBS costly at JIPMER Puducherry?

faqs.answer: A:    No, JIPMER Puducherry admit candidates to its MBBS programme based on merit in NEET only. There is no other provision for selection. National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) is conducted once in a year in offline or paper-pencil based test (PBT) mode. The national-level exam is conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA). Aspirants can visit its official website to register and apply. In addition to this, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 50% in Class 12.
faqs.question: Can I take admission in MBBS at JIPMER Puducherry without NEET?

review_content.Placements: Above 40% of students scored in NEET, and 50% above plus two is the highest placement. More practical and theory packages are offered in this course. American Council of Optometry and Indian Council of Optometry are top recruiting companies for this course. More than 80% of students will get internships in most health care companies in India. Preliminary examinations of eye, funds examinations, and eye camps are offered in this course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi, practical labs, projector based classrooms, seminar rooms, and library facilities (24X7). Single rooms and shared rooms are available in hostels. Mess food is available from different messes with variety of dishes. Medical facilities for students are more concerned. Sports and other activities are more practiced on campus.

review_content.Placements: 100% of students get paid internships in JIPMER with guidance from top professors in India. Medical colleges don't offer placements, but their internship certificate is base for any job application. Excellence in academics, sports, and arts.
review_content.Infrastructure: AC and Wi-Fi are available in academic centers 24/7. A central library that has AC and Wi-Fi. Hostel rooms are generally shared by two, with laundry facilities. The fee structure is very minimal, and people are friendly and respectful. There is excellence in academics and facilities.

faqs.answer: JIPMER MBBS admission is entrance-based followed by MCC counselling. Candidates seeking admission should be Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ST/OBC/OPH candidates). Eligible students further need to appear for the NEET-UG exam conducted by NTA. Furthermore, the candidates need to apply for the JIPMER MBBS course through the official website of the Medical Counseling Committee (MCC) after the declaration of NEET results. Following this, seat allotment is carried out during the counselling. Candidates after final selection have to report at the institute.

review_summary.college_name: JIPMER Pondicherry Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MS in General Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Very good campus life, ragging free campus, and lot of exposure apart from books.

content.Placements: From the 6th semester, students were eligible for the placement drives but for my batch the companies began to come in our final year. Companies such as Hexaware, Vivnovation, Argusoft, Surya Technologies, and so on. These were the companies come so far. The packages were between 4 LPA to 7 LPA. According to the college record, 97% of students got placed. If I didn't get placed, I would plan to do the master's.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was very good as it was a central government institute. For books, we had a central library and book bank also. Classrooms were well-equipped with advanced technology. Indoor stadium, basketball, futsal, cricket, etc., were there.

individual_reviews.course: MS in General Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students are placed in this course. The average salary after M.S surgery course often range between Rs. 60,000 and Rs. 1.2 lakhs per month. Roles after MS general surgery include subspecialty training, academic and teaching roles, clinical practice, and many others.
content.Infrastructure: It has well-developed infrastructure and facilities that support medical education, research, and patient care. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available. We also have a central library, which is large and we also have a modern library with thousands of medical books and journals. Quality of food is good, and the mess and canteen are too well. Food is made with hygiene and is healthy.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Optometry - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: About exceptional optometry course w/practical, camps, and placements.

content.Placements: Above 40% of students scored in NEET, and 50% above plus two is the highest placement. More practical and theory packages are offered in this course. American Council of Optometry and Indian Council of Optometry are top recruiting companies for this course. More than 80% of students will get internships in most health care companies in India. Preliminary examinations of eye, funds examinations, and eye camps are offered in this course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has Wi-Fi, practical labs, projector based classrooms, seminar rooms, and library facilities (24X7). Single rooms and shared rooms are available in hostels. Mess food is available from different messes with variety of dishes. Medical facilities for students are more concerned. Sports and other activities are more practiced on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Neuro Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best institute with high-level infrastructure and facilities to grow.

content.Placements: 100% of students get paid internships in JIPMER with guidance from top professors in India. Medical colleges don't offer placements, but their internship certificate is base for any job application. Excellence in academics, sports, and arts.
content.Infrastructure: AC and Wi-Fi are available in academic centers 24/7. A central library that has AC and Wi-Fi. Hostel rooms are generally shared by two, with laundry facilities. The fee structure is very minimal, and people are friendly and respectful. There is excellence in academics and facilities.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely the best college for medical education be it any course MBBS or paramedical courses.

content.Placements: Here studies are very nice, both academically and clinical=wise, So when you pass from here, you will learn many clinical skills with which can go and practice in a much better way. Studies are good so people many times clear competitive exams like NEET PG and INI CET with internships.
content.Infrastructure: There is a hostel complex, library, hospital, academic complex, and everything is nice with good maintenance. There is 24/7 Wi-Fi and all other necessities. In the hostel, cleanliness is maintained well. It has facilities like water and 24/7 electricity.

admission_overview.college_name: JIPMER Pondicherry Admission 2025: Dates, Courses, Eligibility, Fees, Application Process

paragraphs: JIPMER admission to all the courses is entrance exam-based. The institute accepts national-level entrance exams such as NEET, INI CET, etc. for admission to specific courses. JIPMER also conducts its very own entrance exams for admission to several courses. All the entrance exams are conducted in theEnglishlanguage only. Admission to allJIPMER(UG, PG, and certificate) is entirely entrance-based. Eligible candidates can register online through the official website of the university.

JIPMER offers various UG, PG, super-speciality, and post-doctoral level programmes in the stream of Medicine and Health Sciences. The courses at JIPMER include BSc, MBBS, MSc, Master of Public Health, MD, MS, Post Graduate Diploma, Post Graduate Fellowship, Post-Baccalaureate Diploma (PBD), PhD, and Post-Doctoral Fellowship (PDF).

For admission toJIPMER courses, candidates must fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria and pass the selection criteria. Applications of only the eligible students are treated as valid. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection details for some of the popularJIPMER courses:
Class 12 with a minimum of 50% aggregate in PCM
Graduation with 55% aggregate
Class 12 with 50% aggregate
NEET + MCC Counselling
Graduation with 55% aggregate
Graduation with 55% aggregate
JIPMER Fee 2025

JIPMER Puducherry fees include multiple components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, admission fees, identity card fees, and caution deposits (refundable). Some of the fee components are one-time payable. Tabulated below is the tuition fees for some of the popular courses of the institute:
*This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The seat allocation at this institute is carried out based on candidates' performance in the selection round and seat availability. Check below theJIPMER Pondicherry seat intakefor some of the programmes:
*This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Find below the step-by-step JIPMER Pondicherry admission process:
1. JIPMER Pondicherry Application Process 2025

Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education & Research accepts applications via online mode. The admission form shall be available in offline mode as well. Candidates must fill in all the details in the application carefully. Also, the application must be submitted on or before the deadline.
2. Release of Merit List

After the conclusion of the application process or before form filling (For some courses), the merit list is released by the institute. The cutoff list indicates the minimum required score in the particular exam for a candidate to become eligible for admission. Aspirants with a score equal to or more than the cutoff marks qualify for the next selection round.
3. Counselling
The merit list candidates further have to participate in the course counselling round. During this process, the institute may verify the candidate's documents and allot seats.
4. Admission Confirmation
After seat allotment, selected students shall pay the required amount of fees to confirm their admission.

courses_data.description: JIPMER Puducherry offers a Bachelor of Science (BSc) programme in Nursing and Allied Medical Sciences. It is a full-time course of four years duration. JIPMER BSc admission is entrance exam-based, conducted on the last Sunday of July every year. The medium of instruction in classes and examinations (all the subjects of study) is English.

faqs.answer: For admission to JIPMER BSc in Nursing course, aspirants must be Class 12 passwith Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Botany & Zoology, andEnglishas one of the subjects. courses_data.description: JIPMER Pondicherry offer MBBS course of 5.5 years duration. Admission to the programme is based on merit in NEET-UG exam followed by MCC counselling. faqs.question: How can I get an MBBS seat at JIPMER Puducherry?
faqs.answer: JIPMER (Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research) offers the Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) programme. Admission to the JIPMER MBBS programme is done through the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) UG, which is conducted by the National Testing Agency (NTA). NEET UG is a national-level entrance examination conducted annually for admission to undergraduate medical programmes in India.

courses_data.name: JIPMER MD Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: JIPMER Pondcherry offers a regularDoctor of Medicine (MD)programme at the PG level. The duration of the course is three years. The institute conducts the admission process for MD biannually in two sessions, i.e. January and July. JIPMER accept INI CET exam score for this course admission.

faqs.question: What is the fee for JIPMER Puducherry MD course?
faqs.answer: JIPMER course fee is a cumulative of tuition fee, hostel fee, security deposit, etc. The fee for the three-year Doctor of Medicine (MD) programme at JIPMER isINR 46,580. Candidates need to pay admission fee amount or the first-semester fee to confirm their enrollment. It must be noted that the fee mentioned here is taken from multiple unofficial sources and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: How many specialisations does JIPMER Puducherry offer under MD?
faqs.answer: JIPMER Puducherry offers the Doctor of Medicine (MD) programme in 19 specialisations. The PG-level course is offered in a full-time mode. Admission to the courses is based on merit in INI CET. Some of the specialisations in which MD is offered by JIPMER are:General MedicineBiochemistryMicrobiologyPharmacologyPathologyPhysiologyBlood Transfusion and Immuno HematologyDermatologyVenereology & LeprologyPulmonary Medicine, etc.

faqs.question: Does INI CET 2025 application process comprise basic and final registration?
faqs.answer: Yes. INI CET 2025 application process comprises both basic and final registration. Candidates who complete the basic registration can proceed for the final registration on the official website, aiimsexams.ac.in. Basic registration includes submitting basic information and uploading images while the final registration includes generation of EUC, providing academic, registration, and internship details in the application form, and paying the application fee. The application form is submitted only

faqs.question: Can I do final registration without completing basic registration for INI CET 2024?
faqs.answer: No. Candidates will have to complete the basic registration first to proceed for INI CET 2024 final registration. Basic registration comprises providing basic information including personal and contact details and uploading images as per the size and format. The final registration includes filling details in the application form related to academic, internship, registration etc., paying application fees selection of exam choice and taking printout of the application form.

courses_data.description: JIPMER Pondicherry MDS course is offered in Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery and Orthodontics and Dentofacial Orthopaedics. MDS is a three-year course. For admission to MDS at JIPMER, a candidate needs to have a valid score of INI CET.

faqs.question: What is the qualification for INI CET?
faqs.answer: A candidate must possess MBBS degree for MD/MS/DM-6yrs/MCH-6yrs and BDS degree for MDS courses of a University recognised by the National Medical Commission/Medical Council of India as notified by Govt. of India and Dental Council of India respectively and must have completed the required period of 12 months compulsory rotating Internship/Practical training in certain period of time. They must have scored the minimum marks in MBBS/BDS or equivalent examination. Minimum marks for candidates belon

faqs.question: What was the INI CET Nov 2025 result date for the January session?
faqs.answer: AIIMS announced the INI CET result. Result comprising the list of qualified candidates was uploaded on the official website, aiimsexams.ac.in. Those who score the minimum cut off are declared qualified for the exam. Minimum qualifying mark is different for different category.

faqs.question: How much time is required for INI CET preparation?
faqs.answer: Overall six months time is sufficent for INI CET preparation. This includes 4 month in depth study and 2-month for revision work. The moment a candidate plan to appear for the INI CET, first and formost things he/she should do is to draw a study plan. Focus on those subjects where you are strong in terms of concept. Don't spend too musch time initially on subjects where you are weak. This will demotivate you and affect your preparation. Keep this in mind that concept is key. High yielding topics

faqs.question: What is qualifying INI CET cutoff percentile for the general category?
faqs.answer: Candidates have to score the minimum cut off to qualify for INI CET exam. The qualifying INI CET cut off percentile for the general category is 50%. Candidates who belong to SC/ST/OBC category have to score minimum qualifying cut off, 45. Candidates who qualify the exam with the minimum cut off percentile are eligible for the counselling process. Based on INI CET cut off a merit list will be released. The merit list comprises name of eligible candidates for the different counselling rounds. AIIM

faqs.question: Can I get admission in JIPMER for B.Sc with 60% in Class 12th?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Botany & Zoology with a minimum of 50% aggregate along with English as one of the subjects can apply for BSc at JIPMER Puducherry.So yes you can apply but you have to crack the entrance test for studying in the JIPMER. If you can crack the entrance test then you can easily apply at the JIPMER.

faqs.question: What is the procedure to take MBBS admission at JIPMER Puducherry?
faqs.answer: JIPMER MBBS admission is entrance-based followed by MCC counselling. Candidates seeking admission should be Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/Biotechnology with a minimum of50% aggregate(45% for SC/ST/OBC/OPH candidates). Eligible students further need to appear for theNEET-UG examconducted by NTA.Furthermore, the candidates need to apply for the JIPMER MBBS course through the official website of the Medical Counseling Committee (MCC) after the declaration of NEET results. Following this, seat allotment is carried out during the counselling. Candidates after final selection have to report at the institute.

faqs.question: Can I get into JIPMER Puducherry without NEET?
faqs.answer: The selection criteria vary from one course to another. While some courses like MBBS require valid scores in NEET-UG and other courses like BSc and MSc, the institute conducts its entrance exam. For admission to the flagship MBBS programme, candidates have to appear for the NEET-UG exam. Candidates having valid scores/ rank in NEET-UG can then apply through the JIPMER Puducherry official website followed by the counselling round conducted by the Medical Counselling Committee (MCC), Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to JIPMER Puducherry BSc course?
faqs.answer: JIPMER BSc admission is entrance-based. Candidates are shortlisted and admission is offered based on NEET scores. However, there are some specialisations, in which the admission can be granted on merit-basis. Candidates who are Class 12 pass with PCM/Biology and English as a subject with at least 50% aggregate (for general candidates) can apply. The aspirants must meet the age limit as well. Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply for admission by completing the application form.

placement_data.title: JIPMER Puducherry Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: There are no official statistics available for JIPMER placements 2025 on the official website. However, the JIPMER has released the NIRF report 2025, 76 MBBS students were placed during JIPMER placements. The median package offered during JIPMER placements 2024 to MBBS students was INR 12 LPA .
While, the median package offered to PG 2 year students was INR 24 LPA . Further, the median package offered to PG 3 year student was INR 26 LPA .

faqs.question: What is the scope of job after BSc?
faqs.answer: With BSc degree you are eligible for majority of non technical posts in Government (Central, State, PSU, Banks etc) where eligibility criterion is graduation degree. Beside this you may able to get job of technician, lab assistant in Scientific R&D organisation. You are also eligible to do BEd and take school teacher job. In order to have better career growth you will have to do post graduation.

faqs.question: What was the salary package offered to MBBS students last year during JIPMER placements?
faqs.answer: The consolidated placement statistics are not available on the official website. As per NIRF report 2024, the median package offered to MBBS students was INR 12 LPA during the placements 2023. The median package offered to MBBS students remained the same for the last two years i.e., INR 12 LPA. Moreover, as per the report, 114 MBBS students received placement offers.

description: JIPMER cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

JIPMER NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 260 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

JIPMER MBBS cutoff 2025 was 260 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 748 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

JIPMER accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
JIPMER INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, M.Ch., etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 59 to 11018 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in Radio Diagnosis, with a lowest cutoff rank of 59. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Physiology, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in Radio Diagnosis, MD in Pediatrics and M.Ch. in Neuro Surgery, with Round 3 closing ranks of 59, 182 and 381, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.

highlights.description: JIPMER has been continuously recognised as one of the leading institutes by numerous national ranking agencies. The institute is ranked #43 in the Overall category, and #4 under Medical by the NIRF 2025. The academic reputation, dedicated faculty, and well-laid infrastructure are some of the reasons of the institute's high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. The article below covers all the information around JIPMER rankings:

rankings.highlight: Best Among NIRF Ranked Colleges In Pondicherry In 2025

nirf.description:
JIPMER has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for JIPMER indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, JIPMER fell 4 ranks to #43 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Medical', the institute's ranking has fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, JIPMER climbed 1 rank to #4 rank in the 'Medical' category by the NIRF ranking.
Explore the most recent rankings from other ranking bodies and their respective categories below.
Read less

outlook.description:
Based on the rankings from Outlook-ICARE, JIPMER outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the Outlook-ICARE ranking system. In the 'Medical (Government)' category, the institute's ranks have displayed constancy when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, JIPMER's rank is #3, the same as last year's rank in the 'Medical (Government)' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
Discover the latest rankings and categories provided by other ranking bodies listed below.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Computer Lab, Autonomic Function Testing Laboratory, Pulmonary Function Test Laboratory, Electrophysiology Laboratory

reviews.review_heading: Very good campus life, ragging free campus, and lot of exposure apart from books.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was very good as it was a central government institute. For books, we had a central library and book bank also. Classrooms were well-equipped with advanced technology. Indoor stadium, basketball, futsal, cricket, etc., were there.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: It has well-developed infrastructure and facilities that support medical education, research, and patient care. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are available. We also have a central library, which is large and we also have a modern library with thousands of medical books and journals. Quality of food is good, and the mess and canteen are too well. Food is made with hygiene and is healthy.

reviews.review_heading: About exceptional optometry course w/practical, camps, and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has Wi-Fi, practical labs, projector based classrooms, seminar rooms, and library facilities (24X7). Single rooms and shared rooms are available in hostels. Mess food is available from different messes with variety of dishes. Medical facilities for students are more concerned. Sports and other activities are more practiced on campus.

reviews.review_heading: The best institute with high-level infrastructure and facilities to grow.
reviews.review_text: AC and Wi-Fi are available in academic centers 24/7. A central library that has AC and Wi-Fi. Hostel rooms are generally shared by two, with laundry facilities. The fee structure is very minimal, and people are friendly and respectful. There is excellence in academics and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely the best college for medical education be it any course MBBS or paramedical courses.
reviews.review_text: There is a hostel complex, library, hospital, academic complex, and everything is nice with good maintenance. There is 24/7 Wi-Fi and all other necessities. In the hostel, cleanliness is maintained well. It has facilities like water and 24/7 electricity.

reviews.review_heading: Security service has to be more strict.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities and infrastructure available for our department were good. The security arrangements were not so tight. Anyone could enter the college. Classrooms and labs were in good condition. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: Most amazing and relaxing environment, so students from various areas prefer to do their college at JIPMER, Puducherry. It is compulsory to wear white coats and carry stethoscopes daily. A separate canteen is available for the students and for the hospital visitors.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty members. Good infrastructure and library.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned and well-maintained with advanced smart classrooms and wi-fi is available. Library contains good resources and books, library has a good calm condition for studying and a good collection of books and is research-friendly.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by JIPMER Karaikal - Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and ResearchReviewed on 8 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: "Best university through NEET UG, offering the best study exposure, clinical knowledge, and faculty
reviews.review_text: We have smart classrooms with AC, 5G Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, more than enough microscopes, machines, facilities, etc. The library is equipped with all standard and regional books from all authors. E-library facility is also there. There are cricket and football grounds, a TT hall, and a badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Memories in JIPMER campus.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are air-conditioned with enough space. Lectures are taken by faculty members and are of very good quality. There is JIPMER Wi-Fi available for students' use. Our hostel, Nightingale, is near the College of Nursing. In the hostel, three persons are accommodated in one room. If you want a single room, you can get it in the third year. JIPMER also has facilities for futsal, basketball, and throwball.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and the library are available 24 hours. All types of messes are available. There are wide-spaced, full, and well-ventilated classrooms; some of them have AC also. You will have any medical facility once you are a student; you have consideration also. Different types of sports and courts are available here.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college to study paramedics and MBBS.
reviews.review_text: In hostels, it is very clean, and there are maids for cleaning the rooms and doing laundry. Also, we can cook in the pantry room, and they also provide kettles for making hot water or tea. There are heaters in bathrooms, and hostels are very clean, and a 24-hour security system is there.

reviews.review_heading: Best place for those who want to be a great doctor.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, and all labs have advanced classrooms that can accommodate 200+ students. The library works 24/7 with air conditioning. Food is average and not very good. Single and double room hostels are available, and there are many cultural programs and games, including indoor and outdoor activities. JIPMER Wi-Fi is available almost all over the campus.

reviews.review_heading: My campus through my eyes.
reviews.review_text: JIPMER provides free Wi-Fi for students everywhere in the campus. The vast and spacious library is open for students for 24 hours and it is so special. It contains a lot of medical books and journals and JIPMER has a lot of sports items.

reviews.review_heading: Jipmer College is very good; they provide all facilities to students, like Wi-Fi, library, lab, etc.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good at our college. They provided Wi-Fi to students. Two labs are there. In the lab, all facilities are provided. In hostels, they provide every possible facility. Near the college, two messes are present. Mess food is good but I miss home food.

Yes, JIPMER provides the National Scholarship for Higher Education for ST Students, which was formerly known as the Central Sector Scheme of Top Class Education for ST students. This scholarship is available for students belonging to the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category who are pursuing their higher education at the undergraduate (UG) or postgraduate (PG) level in professional courses such as MBBS, MD, BSc, and Certificate, among others.

The total course fee for the MBBS programme at Jawaharlal Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education & Research (JIPMER), Puducherry is inclusive of admission fee, caution deposit, tuition fee, JIPMER Student Association fee, Learning resource fee, etc. The total tuition fee for the MBBS programme at JIPMER, Puducherry is INR 30.46 K. Candidates can refer to the official website for more details on the same.

In comparison to MBBS fee at other colleges, JIPMER Puducherry is not expensive! The total tuition fee for the 66 months programme is INR 30465. The total fee may include other components as well such as security deposit, library fee and more.

college_info.intro:
BITS Pilani Jhunjhunu comprises of 13 departments including Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Pharmacy, Management, Science, etc. The departments of the institute offers a wide range of UG, PG, diploma, certificate and PhD programmes across various streams. BTech/ BE, MTech and MBA are the popular programmes offered at the institute.
BITS Pilani offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The institute offers BTech/BE specilisation in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering and others. The MBA programme offered by the BITS Pilani is a two year programme. It is offered in several specilisations, including Finance, Business Analytics, FinTech, Quality Management, and others. reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good infrastructure, environment, facilities, and placement prospects.

review_content.Placements: The better part is that over 80% of students find placements. The lowest salary would be around 8 LPA, while the highest could exceed 40 LPA, with the average being 12 LPA. Top recruiters include Mercedes, L&T, and BHEL from the mechanical stream, and students can also choose to pursue non-teaching roles, which many do. As mentioned above, the top roles include analyst, management, and R&D.
review_content.Infrastructure: Ethernet connectivity is available in hostel rooms and the library (1 Gbps speed), with Wi-Fi throughout the hostel and academic block, and in the library (100 Mbps). The food can be considered fair, with the menu undergoing slight changes every two months. For the mechanical department, we have dedicated labs, workshops, and sandbox areas.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of BITS Pilani K K Birla, Goa Campus.

review_content.Placements: More than 80% of students got placed. A lot of companies recruit students, including Microsoft, Google, Rubric, Dell, Deloitte, Oracle, Adobe, Nestle, etc. Top roles include software developer, analyst, app developer, product management, etc. The median package is 17 LPA. Core branches like electrical have an average salary of 18 LPA - 20 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facility is very good. The academic block is beautiful, consisting of 4 lecture theatres and a lot of classrooms. Some labs are also present. A big canteen includes a kitchen and a Nescafe shop. There is also a big auditorium in the basement. There is a football and cricket ground with floodlights. Other sports facilities are also available. Hostels of the new block are very good with fully furnished rooms and 2 common washrooms on each floor. The campus is beautiful and green.

overview_faqs.question: Why is the BTech fee so high at BITS Pilani?
overview_faqs.answer: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani is accredited by the NAAC with an ‘A’ Grade and approved by the UGC. Internationally, Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani is ranked 801-850 by the QS World University Rankings 2025 under the 'World University' category. The deemed university is ranked 20 and 25 under the 'University' and 'Engineering' by the NIRF 2023 Rankings. The BTech fees at BITS Pilani is usually high in comparison to other universities because of several reasons. Some of the reasons include strong reputation, highly qualified facilities who are expertise in their own field, promoting research and development in various fields and excellent infrastructure which includes state-of-the-art labs, libraries, sports facilities, and accommodation facilities. Many students get attracted to pursue BTech at BITS Pilani irrespective of higher fees due to the strong and top quality education provided by the university which help the graduates to placed in top comp

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee refund policy at BITS Pilani?
overview_faqs.answer: In BITS Pilani, fees once paid will not be refunded once the payment is done. In duplicate clause if the payments paid twice the amount will be paid within 30-40 working days. Additionally, convenience fee & taxes charged would not be refunded/ reversed for any refund or reversal of any transaction.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fees of BPharm at BITS Pilani?
overview_faqs.answer: The total course fee is inclusive of multiple components, such as hostel fee, tuition fee, security deposit, and more. Some of these charges are one-time chargeable, while some are charged annually/semesterly. BITS Pilani BPham tuition fee is INR 19.94 lakh. The fee is, exclusive of the summer term fee worth INR 82,600 for registered candidates only. The mentioned fee amount is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative. For detailed BITS Pilani BPharm fee structure, candidates are advised to contact the admission department of the institute.

overview_faqs.question: Is BITS Pilani good for MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, as per the placements records its good. In 2023, the participating recruiters offered various new-age job roles to MBA students with handsome packages. The highest and median package offered to MBA students during BITS Pilani placements 2023 was INR 27 LPA and INR 16 LPA, respectively. review_summary.college_name: BITS Pilani Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated M.Sc. (Hons.) in Mathematics - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: It provides freedom to explore personal interests.

content.Placements: Placements of BITS Hyderabad are very good at around 91% and throughout the years, it has also seen a constant rise. Overall Average CTC for BITS Hyderabad is around 20LPA. Top recruiters include Atlassian, Dell, Google, Microsoft, Deloitte, Oracle, Adobe, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels at BITS are clean and spacious. Each hostel also includes common rooms with indoor games like air hockey and table tennis, and outside courts for badminton and volleyball. Mess food is a well-balanced meal and made in hygienic places. The medical centre is open 24/7, and also ambulances come to the hostel gate in case of emergency. Courts and other playing facilities are well-maintained for every sport.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Worth the high fees due to ROI, but after entering, hard work is expected to excel.

content.Placements: The percentage placement is high, due to the brand name as well as quality of students. More than 80% of batch was planned with highly reputed companies with high packages in fields of tech, finance, and core came to hire, eg, Google, BlackRock, Nvidia, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Entire campus is Wi-Fi covered, and classrooms are well maintained with blocks assigned to departments like mechanical, CS, and electrical. Library is also pretty big, with a capacity of 600+, and it has a great interior, and provides a peaceful vibe for studying. Quality of hostel and mess is also good, food taste is decent with a different menu.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, environment, facilities, and placement prospects.

content.Placements: The better part is that over 80% of students find placements. The lowest salary would be around 8 LPA, while the highest could exceed 40 LPA, with the average being 12 LPA. Top recruiters include Mercedes, L&T, and BHEL from the mechanical stream, and students can also choose to pursue non-teaching roles, which many do. As mentioned above, the top roles include analyst, management, and R&D.
content.Infrastructure: Ethernet connectivity is available in hostel rooms and the library (1 Gbps speed), with Wi-Fi throughout the hostel and academic block, and in the library (100 Mbps). The food can be considered fair, with the menu undergoing slight changes every two months. For the mechanical department, we have dedicated labs, workshops, and sandbox areas.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of BITS Pilani K K Birla, Goa Campus.

content.Placements: More than 80% of students got placed. A lot of companies recruit students, including Microsoft, Google, Rubric, Dell, Deloitte, Oracle, Adobe, Nestle, etc. Top roles include software developer, analyst, app developer, product management, etc. The median package is 17 LPA. Core branches like electrical have an average salary of 18 LPA - 20 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The facility is very good. The academic block is beautiful, consisting of 4 lecture theatres and a lot of classrooms. Some labs are also present. A big canteen includes a kitchen and a Nescafe shop. There is also a big auditorium in the basement. There is a football and cricket ground with floodlights. Other sports facilities are also available. Hostels of the new block are very good with fully furnished rooms and 2 common washrooms on each floor. The campus is beautiful and green.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The overall experience with college is really good and I will definitely recommend it to others.

content.Placements: I am still pursuing my degree which is WILP B.Sc. in computer and designing programs from BITS, and it has really a great experience till now. As for the package and everything the students get a very good and satisfactory package. Top recruitment companies in BUTS are Accenture, Cognizant, EY, HSBC, Yes Bank, and KPMG. The highest package offered to CS IT students at BITS is 60 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: BITS is a fully residential campus with state-of-the-art infrastructure, including well-equipped laboratories, modern classrooms, a gymnasium, a swimming pool, various sports grounds, and campus-wide internet connectivity. The labs and classrooms are good.

paragraphs: Admission in BITS for all the first degree, higher degree, MBA, and doctoral programs are governed by the performance of a candidate in program-specific entrance tests. The candidates who are interested in availing admission may submit applications online through various program-specific application portals.BTITS Pilani admission process is in various steps such as application, visiting the selection rounds, offline admission step, and document verification.The BITS Pilani admission process that students have to go through in stages is as follows:1. BITS Pilani Application Process 2026BITS Pilani provides an online application procedure for all programs. The candidates can complete the BITS Pilani application form 2026 on the official website for the desired programs. The registration fee for every program is different.2. BITS Pilani Selection Process 2026As per BITS Pilani admission procedure, the applicants for a specific course at BITS Pilani, are required to take the corresponding entrance exam.3. Publication of Merit Lists in BITS Pilani 2026Selection result is published as a merit list on the official website. Shortlisted applicants need to appear in WAT-PI rounds.4. Document Verification & Admission Fee Payment in BITS Pilani 2026Shortlisted candidates hereunder should pay the stipulated admission charge for the specific course. Subsequently, document verification is conducted and the schedule of start of classes is communicated.
For more information about BITS Pilani Admission Process check out the below video:

Selection is based entirely on the candidate's past academic record, specialisation preference, availability of seats and score in BITSAT. faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for ME in BITS Pilani?
faqs.answer: For BITS Pilani ME admission, students are required to clear UG with minimum 60% score. BITS Pilani ME programme is offered across 14 specialisations in a full-time mode. The duration of the course is two years, which is spread across four semesters. The course is offered under BITS Pilani higher degree courses and is completely entrance-based.

faqs.question: Is GATE mandatory for ME at BITS Pilani?
faqs.answer: Yes, BITS Pilani admission is based on candidates' performance in GATE/ GPAT/ BITS HD entrance exams, except for ME in Software Systems. Admission to ME in Software Systems is conducted only through BITS Software System HD Online Test. Candidates seeking admission to BITS Pilani ME course must appear for the Graduate Aptitude Test in Engineering (GATE).

faqs.question: Is ME from BITS Pilani good?
faqs.answer: BITS Pilani offers a two-year full-time ME course at the postgraduate level. BITS Pilani is a decent choice for ME courses. During the NIRF 2025 rankings, BITS Pilani was ranked 29 by the National Institutional Ranking Framework. Talking about BITS Pilani placements 2025, the overall  average package  recorded during BITS Pilani placements 2025 stood at INR 30.37 LPA. Additionally, the highest package offered till August 2022 during BITS Pilani placements 2025 stood at  INR 60.75 LPA. A total of

faqs.question: Does BITS Mesra accept GATE score for MTech?
faqs.answer: Candidates can get admission in BIT Mesra M.Tech course with a valid GATE score. The selection is done based on the applicants performance in the accepted exam, performance in selection rounds, and academic performance. Aspirants with a GATE score can also apply. The selection for Non-GATE candidates is done based on academic record and performance in the interview round.

faqs.answer: Candidates seeking admission to BITS Pilani MBA course must have passed BE/ BTech/ BPharm/ BArch/ MCA/ MSc or any first-degree course from BITS Pilani with a minimum 60% aggregate, and Mathematics/ Statistics as a compulsory subject in Class 12 with 60% aggregate. Apart from the minimum eligibility requirements, candidates are also required to have valid entrance test scores.

faqs.question: What CAT/ XAT percentile is required for MBA at BITS Pilani?
faqs.answer: Admission to the MBA programme at BITS Pilani emphasizes a holistic evaluation of candidates' profiles rather than specific CAT or XAT percentile requirements. While there isn't a minimum score stipulated, a competitive percentile in CAT, XAT, or GMAT is advantageous. Typically, BITS Pilani sets a XAT cutoff of 70+ percentile for MBA admission. Besides test scores, the institute considers factors like academic performance and performance in the selection process, including GD-PI rounds. A strong

faqs.question: Is MBA available at BITS Pilani?
faqs.answer: Yes, BITS Pilani offers a two-year full-time MBA (Business Analytics) course at the postgraduate level. BITS Pilani was ranked between 501-550 bands globally for Business and Management Studies by QS World University Rankings (2022). BITS Pilani MBA admissions are online. Interested candidates must visit the official website of the institute to apply only.

faqs.question: What is the BITSAT application fee?
faqs.answer: While filling out the BITSAT application form, the candidates will have to pay the required fee. For a single session, the BITSAT application fee is INR 3,400 (male candidates) and INR 2,900 (female candidates). However, if the candidates wish to attempt both sessions, then they will have to pay INR 5,400 (male candidates) and INR 4,400 (female candidates). The application fee can be paid online i.e., net banking/credit card/debit card. No other mode of payment will be accepted.

If candidates are unable to find the relevant information, they are advised to contact the college authorities.

faqs.question: What is the BITSAT application fee?
faqs.answer: While filling out the BITSAT application form, the candidates will have to pay the required fee. For a single session, the BITSAT application fee is INR 3,400 (male candidates) and INR 2,900 (female candidates). However, if the candidates wish to attempt both sessions, then they will have to pay INR 5,400 (male candidates) and INR 4,400 (female candidates). The application fee can be paid online i.e., net banking/credit card/debit card. No other mode of payment will be accepted.

faqs.question: What are the factors affected BITS Pilani cutoff 2023?

faqs.question: Can I get a call from BITS Pilani with 68 percentile in CAT?
faqs.answer: BITS Pilani cutoff 2024 has been released for CAT for the MBA course. The last round CAT percentile stood at60for the General AII India category students. So, it is quite obvious that surely you can get admission at68percentile at BITS Pilani.Based on the three years cutoff percentiles, the cutoff remained constant. So, candidates seeking admission to the MBA courses must secure a CAT percentile of 60 to get a seat at the BITS Pilani.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BITS, Pilani?
faqs.answer: BITS Pilani admission is based on merit and entrance exams. The institute accepts national entrance exams like XAT, CAT for MBA, CLAT for LLB, GATE for M.Tech and other exams. BITS Pilani conducts its own entrance exam know as BITSAT. BITSAT 2026 is a computer-based conducted in two sessions, BITSAT Session-1 and Session-2 separated by a gap of a few weeks.

faqs.question: Does BITS Pilani take direct admission?
faqs.answer: Yes, BITS Pilani offers direct admission to Integrated First Degree and Higher Degree courses across the streams of Science, Technology, Pharmacy, Management and Humanities. If a candidate is a central/ state board topper, BITS Pilani offers direct admission to the specialisation of his choice, irrespective of their BITSAT score. BITS Pilani admission to most of the courses is based on candidates' performance in the course-specific entrance test. Apart from the entrance test scores, students are also required to fulfil the minimum eligibility requirement set by the institute.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to BTech Mechanical Engineering at BITS Pilani?
faqs.answer: BITS Pilani admissions for first degree, higher degree, MBA and doctoral courses are based on candidate's performance in course-specific entrance exams. Candidates willing to seek admission can apply in online mode through various programme-specific application portals. BITS Pilani admission is conducted online for MBA course, candidates seeking admission must visit the official website of BITS Pilani to apply online.

faqs.question: Is studying at BITS Pilani expensive?
faqs.answer: The semester/ term BITS Pilani fee for integrated first degree and higher degree courses is Rs 2,31,500 for the first and second semesters. On the other hand, the BITS Pilani fee for PhD programmes is Rs 21,850 for full-time candidates and Rs 43,700 for part-time candidates for the first two semesters.Another significant aspect that makes BITS Pilani worth it is the Practice School programme wherein you will get a summer and last semester internship based on your CGPA without an interview.

placement_report.college_name: BITS Pilani Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Recruiters

placement_data.title: BITS Pilani Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: BITS Pilani has released the placement details for the Class of 2025. According to the media report, BITS Pilani has achieved 54.35% placements in the semestor 1 of the placement session 2025 across its three Indian campuses (Pilani, Goa, Hyderabad). A total of 1700 students registered for the placements, of which 924 secured job offers from reputed companies. The average salary offered across the three campuses stood at INR 28.64 LPA . The average package secured by the students of the BITS Pilani batch 2025 was INR 31.63 LPA. The top recruiters of BITS Pilani in 2025 include Accenture, EY, IBM, General Electric, Volvo Eicher, etc.

According to the official record, the highest and average packages offered to the MBA BA students during BITS Pilani placements 2025 was INR 26 LPA and INR 16.57 LPA. T he median package secured by the MBA batch 2025 was INR 18 LPA .
Earlier, BITS Pilani achieved a placement rate of 82.75% for First Degree (FD) and 73.61% placements for Higher Degree (HD) courses for 2023-2024.

tables.context: How good are the BTech placements at BITS Pilani?

faqs.question: How good are the BTech placements at BITS Pilani?
faqs.answer: BTech is the most sought out after course of BITS Pilani. The course-wise placement stats are yet to be released on the offcial website of BITS Pilani. However, BITS Pilani recorded 62.57% % placements for First Degree (FD) courses in the academic year 2024-2025. It may vary once the final placement report is out.

faqs.question: Does BITS Pilani conduct on-campus placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, BITS Pilani conducts placement drives annually for course like BTech, MTech, and MBA, etc. According to the media report, BITS Pilani has achieved 54.35% placements in the semestor 1 of the placement session 2025 across its three Indian campuses (Pilani, Goa, Htderabad). A total of 1700 students registered for the placements, of which 924 secured job offers from reputed companies. The average package secured by the students of the BITS Pilani batch 2025 was INR 31.63 LPA. The highest and average packages offered to the MBA BA students during BITS Pilani placements 2025 was INR 26 LPA and INR 16.57 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered during the recent BITS Hyderabad placements?
faqs.answer: The BITS Hyderabad highest package offered during the 2025 placement drive is yet to be released. According to the media reports, the average salary offered across the three campuses in 2025 stood at INR 28.64 LPA. Earlier, the average and median package secured by the overall batch 2024 was INR 20.77 LPA and INR 18 LPA.

faqs.question: Does BITS Pilani really provide better campus placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, pursuing an MBA course from BITS PIlani is worth it. The institute has a decent placement record for its MBA courses. In 2025, the participating recruiters offered various new-age job roles to MBA students with handsome packages. faqs.question: Why is the BTech fee so high at BITS Pilani?
faqs.answer: BITS Pilani is a private university in India and its fee is higher for following reasons: BITS Pilani has world-class infrastructure with high-tech labs, libraries, sports facilities, and accommodation facilities. BITS Pilani faculty is highly qualified and experienced faculty from across the world, and hiring them is costly. The university invests heavily in research facilities and equipment, which requires a significant amount of funding. The institute has a strong reputation for its graduates who are highly sought after by top companies in India and abroad.

BITS Pilani - Birla Institute of Technology and Science MBA cutoff 2024 has been released for admission to its MBA/PGDM course. The Institute does not release the final CAT cutoff publicly and is only accessible through account login to those candidates who appear in the CAT exam. Hence, the available cutoff table below is based on previous years’ trends and the actual cutoffs might vary.

BITs Pilani accepts valid CAT/ XAT entrance exam scores for admission to its Master of Business Administration (MBA) course. Aspirants can refer to the table below to view some of the relevant entrance exam dates to be eligible for admission.

BITs Pilani BE cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students ranged between 181 and 304. Of all the BE branches, Computer Science was the most competitive for admission among the Engineering aspirants. The second best option after this was Mathematics and Computing, followed by Electronics and Communication Engineering, with comparatively low cutoff scores of 295 and 285, respectively.

One of India’s top institutes is BITS Pilani. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #16 under the category Overall, #7 under University, #11 under Engineering, #2 under Pharmacy, and #18 under Research Institutions. At the international level, QS World Rankings 2025 has ranked the institute at #801-850 position. BITS Pilani is top ranked by multiple national & international ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. nirf.description:
Over the years, BITS Pilani has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the NIRF 2024. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the BITS Pilani's rankings in 'Overall' category have displayed an increasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2024, BITS Pilani climbed 2 ranks to #23 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The rankings of the institute in the 'University' category have demonstrated a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2024, BITS Pilani climbed 1 rank to #19 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
Rankings achieved by the institute under the 'Engineering' category have exibited an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2024, BITS Pilani climbed 5 ranks to #20 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that in the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2024, BITS Pilani's rank is #3, the same as last year's rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Refer to the rankings and categories from various ranking bodies in the table below.

hostel.description: The Institute is fully residential and hostel accommodation is provided to all students. There are eleven hostels for boys and one hostel complex for girls. The hostel rooms are fully furnished. Common room facilities with Cable TV and telephone are available in each hostel. Internet connectivity has been provided in all hostel rooms. Solar water heating systems are provided in all the hostels. There is a common kitchen cum mess unit for every set of two boys hostels. Girls hostel, however, has a separate mess of its own, situated within the boundary of the hostel. It is mandatory for the students staying in the hostel to have their food in the hostel messes. The messes attached to hostels are fully managed by the students.

library.description: Library has room for up to 8,000 students, offers 738 open access study places and 246 open-access IT work stations.  As well as the books and periodicals you expect, it is home to computing facilities for students.The library is searchable via the library catalogue.  But it is not only our library you will have access to – as a BITS Pilani student you can use a network of other libraries via our membership.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Swimming Pool, Football, Hockey, Cricket, Basketball, Volleyball, Tennis, Badminton, Table Tennis, Athletics, Water Polo, Weight Lifting

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by BITS Pilani, Hyderabad CampusReviewed on 28 Nov 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It provides freedom to explore personal interests.
reviews.review_text: Hostels at BITS are clean and spacious. Each hostel also includes common rooms with indoor games like air hockey and table tennis, and outside courts for badminton and volleyball. Mess food is a well-balanced meal and made in hygienic places. The medical centre is open 24/7, and also ambulances come to the hostel gate in case of emergency. Courts and other playing facilities are well-maintained for every sport.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by BITS Pilani, Hyderabad CampusReviewed on 4 Sep 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Worth the high fees due to ROI, but after entering, hard work is expected to excel.
reviews.review_text: Entire campus is Wi-Fi covered, and classrooms are well maintained with blocks assigned to departments like mechanical, CS, and electrical. Library is also pretty big, with a capacity of 600+, and it has a great interior, and provides a peaceful vibe for studying. Quality of hostel and mess is also good, food taste is decent with a different menu.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by BITS Pilani, Hyderabad CampusReviewed on 16 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, environment, facilities, and placement prospects.
reviews.review_text: Ethernet connectivity is available in hostel rooms and the library (1 Gbps speed), with Wi-Fi throughout the hostel and academic block, and in the library (100 Mbps). The food can be considered fair, with the menu undergoing slight changes every two months. For the mechanical department, we have dedicated labs, workshops, and sandbox areas.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by BITS Pilani K K Birla, Goa CampusReviewed on 12 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of BITS Pilani K K Birla, Goa Campus.
reviews.review_text: The facility is very good. The academic block is beautiful, consisting of 4 lecture theatres and a lot of classrooms. Some labs are also present. A big canteen includes a kitchen and a Nescafe shop. There is also a big auditorium in the basement. There is a football and cricket ground with floodlights. Other sports facilities are also available. Hostels of the new block are very good with fully furnished rooms and 2 common washrooms on each floor. The campus is beautiful and green.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by BITS Pilani, Hyderabad CampusReviewed on 11 Feb 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The overall experience with college is really good and I will definitely recommend it to others.
reviews.review_text: BITS is a fully residential campus with state-of-the-art infrastructure, including well-equipped laboratories, modern classrooms, a gymnasium, a swimming pool, various sports grounds, and campus-wide internet connectivity. The labs and classrooms are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by BITS Pilani, Hyderabad CampusReviewed on 24 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Ups and downs of BITS through some unknown insights.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility in our hostel is not good. The land cables work better than the Wi-Fi. Classrooms are neat and tidy. Hostels are clean, but there is a dumping ground near, which sometimes ends with a bad odour. The mess food is better than most of the colleges, and the canteen is affordable. Sports facilities are quite good and almost every sports facility is available. We all get medical insurance.

reviews.review_heading: Worth it to take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of this college are awesome. Wi-Fi is available throughout the college campus, classrooms, library, and labs. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is top-notch. Medical facilities are also available 24/7, and sports and games are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by BITS Pilani K K Birla, Goa CampusReviewed on 2 Nov 2024)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best engineering colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The course and hostel are absolutely amazing, other than one big downside, which is the food. The food is horrendous, and you eat it just for the sake of staying alive. The paid canteens are good, but the mess is bad. All classrooms are air-conditioned, with Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The library has a wide range of books to cover every genre. Sports and games are widely encouraged, and there are multiple football grounds, as well as a gym and badminton/tennis courts.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by BITS Pilani K K Birla, Goa CampusReviewed on 28 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: BITS Pilani - It's Magic.
reviews.review_text: We have great infrastructure at BITS Goa. The Goa campus is really beautiful, full of greenery, and Goa itself is also a very beautiful state. The campus is very clean, with almost no littering on the roads. Spread over 180 acres, it’s smaller than Pilani and Hyderabad, but you still have to walk a lot. Generally, first-year students are given double-occupancy rooms. Each room is equipped with a separate bed, table, chair, fan, windows, almirah, and whiteboards. Each hostel has a common room, a ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by BITS Pilani K K Birla, Goa CampusReviewed on 18 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Best academics as well as fest culture with good placements.
reviews.review_text:
We have washing machines.
Clean bathrooms with hot water facilities 24x7, with proper purified drinking water. 
The mess provides very good quality food. The draw back being you have to follow same mess time table (weekly) for a month or two but overall experience being awesome.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by BITS Pilani K K Birla, Goa CampusReviewed on 11 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: An Overview: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani, KK Birla Goa campus
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my department are top-class .  The quality of food is mostly good, but then if you choose a mess, it is comparatively better than a d mess. So, as the college gives us the option to choose the one we want, we can choose the best mess.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by BITS Pilani, Hyderabad CampusReviewed on 27 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Our college provides a vibrant life for students and very good career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. As it is a private college, they collect a good amount of fees to maintain hostels. Wi-Fi is provided to every student with a limit of 10 GB per day. LAN is provided in every room. Classrooms have air conditioners. They are good. The mess is good. The menu keeps changing frequently. Sports facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied by its performance in placements, good campus life, and personality development!
reviews.review_text: Labs are pretty good and well-maintained. BITS Wi-Fi also works efficiently. Classrooms are spacious and air-conditioned. The library is a very nice place to study at during summers as hostel rooms essentially do not have air-conditioning. Food in the mess is vegetarian with non-veg available on Sundays.

reviews.review_heading: A really good place to develop your personality as a whole.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are well furnished having fully functional AC, efficient lighting and seating places. Labs in the first year are somewhat renovated but the research labs are very advanced and innovative. Wi-Fi works good, just some productive services like Netflix and WhatsApp video calls are banned. The Library is very spacious and has separate places and tables for studying and books. It also has a relaxing space to sit and has facilities like coffee, tea and snacks from vending machines which ...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by BITS Pilani K K Birla, Goa CampusReviewed on 5 Jun 2024)
reviews.review_heading: About moderate good placement season in 2023.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, classroom labs, and library are of high standards, probably among the best compared to other institutions in our country. The quality of food is decent and manageable. Facilities such as sports and medical services are also very good and comfortable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. Nursing - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Love this college.

review_content.Placements: Placement chance is high after course. CHHN course added in fourth year. CHO posting and other government posting are common after the course. If you do hard work then definitely you can get a government job after the course. Nursing is a professional course and placement is not hard after the course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. The college's new building is under construction. Library is marvelous. Books are available in the library. Library is open for 24 hours. Hospital's infrastructure is state of the art. Hostels are satisfactory. Mess is only for girls. Boys eat food in doctors' mess.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. Nursing - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good faculty members and infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Students get posted after giving exams, and this college does not provide any placements. Internships are provided in this course, and stipend is not offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a Wi-Fi facility in the library. In our hostel, Wi-Fi is not available. There are proper electricity and water facilities in our hostel. The mess is clean. The food quality is good. A water cooler is available. Proper hygiene is maintained on our hostel premises.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are well-qualified and helpful. Their teaching quality is very good. They always clear our doubts. The course curriculum is relevant. Semester exams are difficult. The pass percentage is 60%.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at SGPGI, Lucknow?
overview_faqs.answer: The Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS) in Lucknow has a fee structure which varies depending on the program. B.Sc. courses range from 2L-2.2L, BPT course is 2.2L, M.Sc. courses are 1.8L and MD course is 1.1L.In totality, the fee for all the courses offered here ranges between INR 27,000 and INR 220,000.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences, Lucknow good for B.Sc?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Sanjay Gandhi Post Graduate Studies, Lucknow (SGPGIMS) is eligible for B.Sc. The institute offers a four-year undergraduate programme in various disciplines including biochemistry, microbiology, physiology, anatomy, pathology, forensics, community medicine and pharmacology. The annual fee for the first year of the B.Sc programme is INR 79,800. For admission to B.Sc programme, candidates must pass 10+2 or equivalent examination with PCB and English as compulsory subjects and after that perform well in institute wise entrance examination. Overall, SGPGIMS is considered a reputed undergraduate institution that offers comprehensive curricula and excellent learning environments.

overview_faqs.question: What is the starting salary that students can expect after completing BSc from SGPGI Lucknow?
overview_faqs.answer: SGPGI Lucknow offers seven BSc specialisations in the field of paramedical science. These courses enable students to make a career in the field of paramedics. The salary of a paramedic depends on the job profile and respective individual skillset. Following is a list of different job profiles in the field of paramedic science and the average salary offered: Medical Assistants-INR 3 LPACritical Care Paramedics-INR 3 LPARadiologists-INR 16.8 LPAOccupational Therapists-INR 4 LPAAdvanced Life Support Paramedics can expect a salary of-INR 3 LPA

overview_faqs.question: Why choose Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences Lucknow?
overview_faqs.answer: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences Lucknow offers a total of 22 courses across streams of Science, Medical, and Health Sciences, out of which MD is the flagship course of the institute. The curriculum followed at the SGPGI Lucknow ensures quality education, and the research community offers a wide scope of bringing change in the field of nursing and medical science.

review_summary.college_name: SGPGI Lucknow Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. Nursing - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Love this college.

content.Placements: Placement chance is high after course. CHHN course added in fourth year. CHO posting and other government posting are common after the course. If you do hard work then definitely you can get a government job after the course. Nursing is a professional course and placement is not hard after the course.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good. The college's new building is under construction. Library is marvelous. Books are available in the library. Library is open for 24 hours. Hospital's infrastructure is state of the art. Hostels are satisfactory. Mess is only for girls. Boys eat food in doctors' mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. Nursing - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty members and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Students get posted after giving exams, and this college does not provide any placements. Internships are provided in this course, and stipend is not offered.
content.Infrastructure: There is a Wi-Fi facility in the library. In our hostel, Wi-Fi is not available. There are proper electricity and water facilities in our hostel. The mess is clean. The food quality is good. A water cooler is available. Proper hygiene is maintained on our hostel premises.
content.Faculty: Teachers are well-qualified and helpful. Their teaching quality is very good. They always clear our doubts. The course curriculum is relevant. Semester exams are difficult. The pass percentage is 60%.

admission_overview.title: SGPGIMS Lucknow Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences admission is both merit and entrance-based depending on the programme. The college, popularly known as SGPGI Lucknow, offers courses at UG, PG, doctoral, and diploma levels. These are offered in the field of Medical Sciencec and allied sectors. The college primarily offered based on student's score in the entrance exam for PG courses. Whereas, for the UG courses, admissions are mostly merit-based. The admission process of SGPGIMS Lucknow mainly commences online. The accepted exams are NEET PG and NEET SS. Interested students can go through the following sections to know more.

faqs.question: How to get admission to BSc Nursing in SGPGI Lucknow?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed Class 12 with PCBE subjects and a minimum of 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for BSc Nursing offered at Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences, Lucknow. Reserved category candidates need a minimum of 45% aggregate to be eligible for the course. However, the final selection of candidates is done based on the scores obtained by them in the entrance exam and counseling conducted by the institute.
