SGPGI cut off 2025 will be released soon based on NEET PG exam results. SGP Institute of Medical Sciences accepts NEET PG scores for admission to the MD, MS and Diploma courses. Candidates can find the category-wise Round 1 and Last Round Cutoff rank for the last 4 years in the table below:
The 3rd round of seat allotment for SGPGI NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been announced for MD programmes for various categories under the All India quota.

For the General AI category, closing ranks varied from 10399 to 41755, with MD in Anaesthesiology being the most challenging for admission. In 2024 and 2023, the same specialisation had a cutoff of 10861 and 15157, respectively. A multi-year comparison shows a drop in the cutoff trends for this category. To see more information, students can check o

SGPGI accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD course. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in Anaesthesiology, with a round 3 closing rank of 10399 for the General AI category. In contrast, the cutoff for the OBC AI category for the same specialisation was 22709.
This difference between the two ranks suggests that the competition for the General AI category is lower than the OBC AI category. Students can refer to the table below to k
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.
From the table below, students can do a comparison of different colleges that accept NEET PG results for admission.

SGPGI NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to DM, M.Ch. courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

While for the last round, the closing ranks ranged from 12 to 3938, wherein DM in Clinical Immunology proved to be the most sought-after in the General AI category. Students can check the first and last round closing ranks from the table provided below.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 12 for DM in Clinical Immunology. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 26.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.

NEET SS is the accepting exam for Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences admission to various Super Speciality Courses. Candidates appearing for NEET SS can refer to the table below to view the important NEET SS 2025 dates.

Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

table.details: 7th by NIRF under the Medicine & Health Sciences

college_info.intro: NIMHANS Bangalore popular programmes are MD & DM. MD & DM students are today working in top organisations, hospitals, etc. Some of them have even started their own clinical practice. Some of the alumni are today working as doctors in the NIMHANS Bangalore attached hospital. NIMHANS Medical College Bangalore conducts workshops like the 9th National Workshop on Research Methodology in Psychosocial Issues. Even NIRF 2025 has ranked this college at the 7th position under the Medicine & Health Sciences category. NIMHANS is synonymous with providing high standards of clinical care, quality training & cutting-edge research work in the frontier areas of manpower development & patient care. Bangalore NIMHANS offers placement assistance to students and is visited by top companies for placements such as Apollo Hospitals, Manipal Hospitals, Fortis Hospitals, Max Healthcare, etc. Below mentioned are some of the NIMHANS Bangalore courses & their respective eligibility & NIMHANS fee structure:

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in Psychiatry - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: My honest review of my college.

review_content.Placements: The placement cell was too good. The students had good chances of placement by the college. Most of my batchmates including me as well placed in the top hospital. The college also provided internships for the students. It provided the best company for placements and offered internships every 2 years.
review_content.Infrastructure: Now hostel building had been transformed into administrative block. There were no facilities in hostel. But there was a college canteen inside the college premises.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members were well-experienced and they all had vast knowledge in their particular field of interest. They helped students too much in their educational life. They gave valuable advice to the students for their betterment. The course curriculum was updated and modern the medical council of India. It made students ready for their placements. The exam pattern was divided into internal and external which was held every year. In 1 year 6 subjects, 2 year 12 subjects were there which was not easy, and 3 year 8 subjects which were related to courses. Last year, there were 6-8 subjects. Faculty members were too good but you had to clear your exam on your own preparation.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Phil. in Psychiatric Social Work - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences.

review_content.Placements: Internship and placement are both given importance in the college. The placement of students is good numbers and internship opportunities are available in both public and private hospitals. The package given to the students goes on an average of Rs. 25000 per month. There are amazing job opportunities for the students to make them learn the implementation of their learning and knowledge, and also help them gain professional experience. Various firms hire the students.
review_content.Infrastructure: M.Phil. Clinical Psychology is a doctorate-level programme which has a duration of 1 year. The structure of the course is very interesting and also innovative, with a focus on research and practical. The days and exams are tiring. The hostel facilities are not very good. It is with basic needs - internet, TV, washing machines, and water purifiers. The food in the mess is not good, although the contractor is renewing it every year, but the food quality doesn't improve.

faqs.question: Q: Does NIMHANS Bangalore have an entrance or merit-based admission process?

faqs.answer: Admissions begin at NIMHANS Bengaluru 2024 NIMHANS B.Sc. Admission. Admissions are held once a year for the B.Sc. in Neurophysiology Technology program offered by NIMHANS. The admissions process typically begins in May or June, and candidates are chosen based on their performance on an entrance exam and an interview.
faqs.question: Q: When do admissions begin at NIMHANS Bengaluru?

faqs.answer: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences is also known as NIMHANS. National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences (NIMHANS), Bangalore was declared as an Institute of National Importance by an Act of Parliament. NIMHANS was ranked 4 under the Medical category by NIRF in 2021. The institute offers a list of courses at the UG, PG, Super Speciality and PhD levels across various specialisations. Candidate must have a minimum of 45% in their combined 10+2 exams in Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Mathematics, and English in order to be considered for the B.Sc. programmes at NIMHANS Bangalore. The selection process at NIMHANS for both undergraduate and postgraduate programs relies on the INI-CET, INI SS-ET, and NIMHANS admission tests as the foundational assessment methods.
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility criteria for BSc at NIMHANS?

faqs.answer: National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityDMCandidate must have completed MBBS from University recognized by the National Medical Commission/Medical Council of India as notified by Govt. of India with mentioned marks. Candidate must have completed the required period of 12 months compulsory rotating Internship/Practical training.M.Ch.Candidate must have completed MBBS from University recognized by the National Medical Commission/Medical Council of India as notified by Govt. of India with mentioned marks. Candidate must have completed the required period of 12 months compulsory rotating Internship/Practical training.M.Sc.The candidate should be a Registered Nurse and Registered Midwife or equivalent with any State Nursing Registration Council. Candidate shall be medically fit.B.Sc.Any equivalent examination recognized by NIMHANS, Bengaluru for the above purpose with Physics, Chemistry, Biology and Mathematics as principal subjects of study with 45% aggregate. OR Job oriented Diploma course from a recognized board with Diagnostic Radiography as vocational subject or equivalent.MDCandidate must have completed the required period of 12 months compulsory rotating Internship/Practical training.CertificateB.Sc. with MLT OR B.Sc. with Life Sciences or DMLT (with one year experience).PG DiplomaCandidates should be registered nurse (RN & RM) in the state nursing council with one year experience as staff nurse. There is no entrance test for this course. The course starts in July and ends in June.MPHMBBS OR Bachelor of Dental Sciences OR Postgraduate degree in Sociology/Statistics / Environmental Sciences /Physiotherapy /Occupational Therapy / Health Management / Social Work / Economics / Speech Pathology and Audiology / Speech Pathology / Audiology / Nursing.UG DiplomaCandidate must have completed 10+2 from any recognised Board/Council.

review_summary.college_name: NIMHANS Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely I am satisfied with the faculty members, placements, etc.

content.Placements: The placements from this course are generally strong and respected due to the prestige of NIMHANS. Top recruiting companies/hospitals that offered jobs are government or private psychiatric hospitals, NGOs like Banyan, Sangath, etc. Top roles offered are psychiatric social worker, lecturer/assistant professor, researcher, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure for the department of psychiatry social workers has a dedicated department building with classroom, seminar hall, and faculty office. Smart classroom, well-stocked library, seminars, workshops, and clubs are also available. Quality of food is good, and separate hostels are available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: M.Phil. in Clinical Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm absolutely satisfied with the placement and college infrastructure.

content.Placements: 90% of students are placed in this course during their placements. The highest package is 20 LPA, the average is 10 LPA, and the lowest was 5 LPA. Many top recruiting companies offer jobs. Top roles offered include neurology, physiology, and other areas.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are too good, and the campus is too big. In every class, projectors and air-conditioners are present, and on campus, Wi-Fi and a well-stocked library are available. The quality of food is average, and it's made with hygiene and is healthy.

content.Infrastructure: Now hostel building had been transformed into administrative block. There were no facilities in hostel. But there was a college canteen inside the college premises.
content.Faculty: Faculty members were well-experienced and they all had vast knowledge in their particular field of interest. They helped students too much in their educational life. They gave valuable advice to the students for their betterment. The course curriculum was updated and modern the medical council of India. It made students ready for their placements. The exam pattern was divided into internal and external which was held every year. In 1 year 6 subjects, 2 year 12 subjects were there which was not easy, and 3 year 8 subjects which were related to courses. Last year, there were 6-8 subjects. Faculty members were too good but you had to clear your exam on your own preparation.

individual_reviews.title: Review of National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (FEB 2026) B.Sc. in Anaesthesia Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: B.Sc. in Anaesthesia Technology at NIMHANS.

content.Placements: Around 90% of students have been placed. Even though there is no placement cell, because of the name and pride of such a prestigious institution getting placed is not that hard task. Students are mostly placed in AIIMS, government hospitals, private hospitals, and outside India like NHS, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure that they provide is top-notch. No other institute provides such amenities for patient services. NIMHANS is a frontline runner in the medical field, which always chooses and makes innovations in the medical field. Classrooms are smart classes with an updated curriculum. In hostel, we get a single room with Wi-Fi facilities and 24/7 security. There are 2 grounds and one gymkhana.

average_package.title: NIMHANS Bangalore Average Package 2025

faqs.question: What is the average package recorded during NIMHANS Bangalore placements?
faqs.answer: NIMHANS Bangalore average package data is not released. The median package recorded in 2024 for PG 2-year and PG 3-year courses was 16.09 LPA and 18.04 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc at NIMHANS Bengaluru?
faqs.answer: The first-year fee for a BSc at the National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) in Bangalore is 22,550. The total tuition fee for a BSc in Nursing at NIMHANS is 1.40 lakh. This includes a one-time payment of 6,000 for registration fees, caution money, and hostel deposit. Other courses and their first-year fees at NIMHANS include: M.Phil: 22,550 MPH: 96,840 Diploma: 8,600 M.Sc: 22,100 M.Ch: 62,050 M.D: 71,050

faqs.question: What is the average package offered at NIMHANS Bengaluru?
faqs.answer: Impressive results in both UG and PG placements have been attained by NIMHANS Bangalore Placements 2023. The institute has consistently maintained placements in the three-year UG programmes. All graduates found employment in 2021, with the median wage at NIMHANS being INR 6,00,000. Similarly, 14 students were placed each year in 2020 and 2019, with a median pay of INR 6,00,000. The institute has obtained outstanding outcomes for the 4-year B.Sc. Nursing programme. Out of the 77 seats that were open in 2021, 72 students were placed, with the median pay at NIMHANS being INR 7,20,000. Similar to how 74 and 75 students were placed in 2020 and 2019, respectively, with the identical seat intake. The median annual pay for each of them was INR 7,20,000. Regarding the one-year PG programme, NIMHANS placements 2023 have displayed exceptional successes. Out of 98 available seats in 2020, 33 students were placed, earning a median income of INR 15,60,000. With 78 seats available in 2019, 25 students were placed successfully, earning a median income of INR 6,00,000.

faqs.question: Does NIMHANS Bengaluru offer better placements than Vydehi Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre?
faqs.answer: NIMHANS Bangalore and Vydehi Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre are both considered top medical colleges in Bangalore. Out of 77 students, NIMHANS Bangalore placed 72 in 2021. The 2021 batch's median pay was INR 7,20,000. For 3-year UG students, the average package was INR 6, while for 4-year UG students, it was INR 7.20. Nearly 30% of the students of Vydehi Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Centre were placed. Students from this college are hired by leading recruiting companies. So choice is yours.

NIMHANS& INI CET Cutoff 2026 has been released for admission to various PG-level medical courses, like MD, etc. The cutoff was released in the form of ranks for all categories under the All India quota for round 2.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely I am satisfied with the faculty members, placements, etc.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure for the department of psychiatry social workers has a dedicated department building with classroom, seminar hall, and faculty office. Smart classroom, well-stocked library, seminars, workshops, and clubs are also available. Quality of food is good, and separate hostels are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with the placement and college infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are too good, and the campus is too big. In every class, projectors and air-conditioners are present, and on campus, Wi-Fi and a well-stocked library are available. The quality of food is average, and it's made with hygiene and is healthy.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of my college.
reviews.review_text: Now hostel building had been transformed into administrative block. There were no facilities in hostel. But there was a college canteen inside the college premises.

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences.
reviews.review_text: M.Phil. Clinical Psychology is a doctorate-level programme which has a duration of 1 year. The structure of the course is very interesting and also innovative, with a focus on research and practical. The days and exams are tiring. The hostel facilities are not very good. It is with basic needs - internet, TV, washing machines, and water purifiers. The food in the mess is not good, although the contractor is renewing it every year, but the food quality doesn't improve.

reviews.review_heading: B.Sc. in Anaesthesia Technology at NIMHANS.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure that they provide is top-notch. No other institute provides such amenities for patient services. NIMHANS is a frontline runner in the medical field, which always chooses and makes innovations in the medical field. Classrooms are smart classes with an updated curriculum. In hostel, we get a single room with Wi-Fi facilities and 24/7 security. There are 2 grounds and one gymkhana.

reviews.review_heading: My fellowship programme was from the National Institute of Mental Health and Neurosciences.
reviews.review_text: Our college had very good infrastructure and top-notch facilities for our course. In our course, students were getting all the necessary facilities. Labs, library, canteen, Wi-Fi, halls, research labs, hostel, sports, and all other necessary facilities were given to students here in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Very supportive and valuable environment.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good we have an organized department where we have laboratories, faculty rooms, classrooms, a library, canteen, and a Wi-Fi connection. Then we have our hostel which has basic facilities like accommodation and medical help. There are grounds where you can walk, play, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money and crowd is good.
reviews.review_text: The hostels facilities are pretty good, there are accommodation facilities where you will have your room and other basic things, then there is a common room and for the laundry, we have a washing machines. There are medical facilities and in the classroom, we have the latest technology used.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, great placements, hardly any sports events or cultural programmes.
reviews.review_text: Great infrastructure. Good food (it's hostel food? ). Overall great facilities. Sports and game events are less to None (maybe once in a? ), but there are lots of events on health related days, awareness programmes, world earth day etc. Boys hostel has more than one mess but not for girls hostel. Canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has excellent infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have a good infrastructure with 172 acres. The hostel is excellent. We have a good warden and single rooms for everyone. The canteen and medical facilities are good. We have a clinic for students and staff members. Treatment and medicines are free so you don't have to pay any money. MRIs and x-rays are free for all students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: KMC Manipal, through more than 45 departments, offers short-term, PG, UG, and various other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Medical and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers MBBS course to students. The duration of the MBBS course is 5.5 years. At the PG level, the college offers two-year MSc, three-year MD, and MS courses to students. The various super specialty courses provided by the college are DM and MCH courses. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by KMC Manipal and their respective eligibility and KMC Manipal fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Kasturba Medical College (KMC) Manipal, a deemed institution, offers 250 seats for MBBS aspirants, and their selection process hinges on NEET scores. Those meeting the eligibility criteria, including passing the National Eligibility Cum Entrance Test conducted by CBSE and securing a minimum of 50% aggregate in the NEET, get shortlisted for the counseling session. During this session, seats are allocated based on NEET scores, seat availability, and the preferences of the candidates. For admission to MBBS/BDS programs, candidates must meet the mentioned criteria, with specific NEET score cut-offs based on categories and domicile/quota. In general, for the UR category, a minimum of 50% in NEET is required, whereas for the SC/ST/OBC categories, a minimum of 40% is essential to qualify. The anticipated NEET cut-off range for KMC Manipal in 2024 is estimated between 53472 and 72304. For the 2023 NEET MBBS exam, the cut-off for the general category fell within the 39000th to 40000th rank, while for the OBC category, it was between the 34000th and 35000th rank. NEET cut-offs fluctuate, influenced by various factors like category and domicile, making it crucial for applicants to meet the specific score criteria. This criterion determines their eligibility and, subsequently, their chance of securing a seat at KMC Manipal.
faqs.question: What is the selection process for MBBS and what is the minimum NEET score required at Kasturba Medical College, Manipal?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Kasturba Medical College considers NEET score for admission to specific courses. The college accepts the scores and rank of national-level entrance examinations such as NEET UG for MBBS, NEET PG, Manipal Entrance Test and NEET SS. KMC Manipal does not offer direct admission in any of its programme and candidates need to appear for the respective NEET examination for the applied course.
faqs.question: Is NEET required for KMC Manipal?

faqs.answer: A:    Kasturba Medical College (KMC) Manipal admits 250 students for its undergraduate MBBS programme each year. Admission is based on the All India Rank obtained in NEET (UG). KMC Manipal is one of India's most prestigious medical colleges and is consistently ranked in the top five medical colleges in India
faqs.question: How many students can do MBBS at Kasturba Medical College, Manipal?

faqs.answer: A:    Manipal Medical College MBBS admission 2025 is now open and the institute will admit students on the basis of rank obtained by them in the NEET. The competition has grown multifold over the years for admission in the MBBS programme. The last round closing rank for General All India category for MBBS programme admission was 40,258 in the year 2024 while it was 24,330 for the year 2023. Kasturba Medical College Cutoffs for NEET vary every year and it depends on the number of factors such as the category of candidates and the number of applications received by the institute.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in Pharmacology - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: The premier medical college.

review_content.Placements: MD pharmacology students got placed in various top hospitals and research institutions. Mostly, during internships students were paid with the minimum stipend of Rs 30,000 per month. Indian Institute of Chemical Biology Parexel and NIPER were some of the recruiters of KMC, Manipal.
review_content.Infrastructure: Within the college campus hospitals were opened, which made it very easy for students to attend training sessions. In the hospital, more than 1000 beds were arranged to give training for students based on real-time cases. Events and sports were not encouraged by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Kasturba Medical College, Manipal.

review_content.Placements: Batch strength: 250 I have not passed out yet but according to my knowledge and some seniors, most of the students don't go for placement; they either do NEET PG or foreign entrance examinations like USMLE and PLAB. Few who wants to work in hospital get recruited easily. The package range is 1-2 lacs monthly.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1.Lecture:- Lecture halls are big and accommodate half of batch at a time. Fully air-conditioned and well lit. Speakers are good too. Faculty usually use PowerPoint and projectors. 2. Hostels : Three types of hostels are available for boys. Hostel room with minimum cost are also nice. The expensive one is quite luxurious. 3. Library:- The library is the best place of the college. It is huge and has ambiance for study. 4.Mess:- Mess is also clean and decent. They serve healthy meals. But once you join mess, it is difficult to eat somewhere else . 5.Sports complex:- Marena sports complex is a large building consisting of many sports sections like badminton, table tennis, swimming, turf for football, gym, etc. for gym, you have to pay monthly fee. 6.Hospital:- It is always jam-packed. For MBBS students, there is lot to learn from. There is a student clinic also for students when they get sick.

overview_faqs.question: What is the total fee of MBBS at KMC Manipal?
overview_faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for the MBBS is INR 44 lakh. This fee is exclusive of various charges such as admission fee, application fee, and several other fee components. If students find the fee very high worry not these students can apply for the scholarships provided by the college. The students must apply early for the scholarships as there are limited scholarships provided to students.

overview_faqs.question: What is the Manipal Medical College application fees?
overview_faqs.answer: The final step of Kasturba Medical college application process is to pay the application fees. The application fees charged by the institute is different for General and Foreign or NRI candidates. General category candidates who want to seek admission in any of the programme must pay Kasturba Medical College application fees of INR 600 (INR 2,500 for Foreign/NRI/ NRI sponsored category candidates) for all courses. The institute may ask candidates to pay INR 1,400 as an entrance test fees for selected courses.

overview_faqs.question: How is MD Medicine course at KMC Manipal?
overview_faqs.answer: The MD Medicine programme offered by Kasturba Medical College has received good reviews from the students and alumni. According to the verified Shiksha reviews, the institute has received positive reviews in the terms of placements, infrastructure and faculty. According to the NIRF report for the year 2023, the median package offered to the three-year postgraduate students during Manipal Medical College placements 2022 stood at INR 15.60 LPA. The institute also has a good infrastructure to facilitate the learning process.

review_summary.college_name: KMC Manipal Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MD in Psychiatry - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the most rated college for medicine.

content.Placements: After successful completion of a Bachelor's in Medicine, I would like to do a Master's in Psychiatry, while looking for its future scope. The college got integrated with various MNC hospitals and rehabilitation centres for placement focus. After completing training, we got hired, with the best package being 20.5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Firstly, without wearing white coats, we aren't allowed inside the campus. There is tight security at the gate, and entry is allowed after proper record entries. Mostly, the mess is so rushed all the time because students from the hostel also use the mess to have their food. Visitors are not allowed inside the campus without a proper security check.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Successful college in Manipal.

content.Placements: During the training period, we were able to know our potential to implement the knowledge we gained throughout the course. Such training records were helpful to continue our career in various reputed hospitals. GSK, Eric Life Sciences, and Abbott were some renowned recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Laboratories for pathology, anatomy, and biochemistry were individually isolated and arranged. Basically, needed preservatives and equipment were arranged before lab sessions by the lab assistants. Campus food was hygienic and suitable for all kinds of people.

individual_reviews.course: MD in Pharmacology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The premier medical college.

content.Placements: MD pharmacology students got placed in various top hospitals and research institutions. Mostly, during internships students were paid with the minimum stipend of Rs 30,000 per month. Indian Institute of Chemical Biology Parexel and NIPER were some of the recruiters of KMC, Manipal.
content.Infrastructure: Within the college campus hospitals were opened, which made it very easy for students to attend training sessions. In the hospital, more than 1000 beds were arranged to give training for students based on real-time cases. Events and sports were not encouraged by the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Kasturba Medical College, Manipal.

content.Placements: Batch strength: 250 I have not passed out yet but according to my knowledge and some seniors, most of the students don't go for placement; they either do NEET PG or foreign entrance examinations like USMLE and PLAB. Few who wants to work in hospital get recruited easily. The package range is 1-2 lacs monthly.
content.Infrastructure: 1.Lecture:- Lecture halls are big and accommodate half of batch at a time. Fully air-conditioned and well lit. Speakers are good too. Faculty usually use PowerPoint and projectors. 2. Hostels : Three types of hostels are available for boys. Hostel room with minimum cost are also nice. The expensive one is quite luxurious. 3. Library:- The library is the best place of the college. It is huge and has ambiance for study. 4.Mess:- Mess is also clean and decent. They serve healthy meals. But once you join mess, it is difficult to eat somewhere else . 5.Sports complex:- Marena sports complex is a large building consisting of many sports sections like badminton, table tennis, swimming, turf for football, gym, etc. for gym, you have to pay monthly fee. 6.Hospital:- It is always jam-packed. For MBBS students, there is lot to learn from. There is a student clinic also for students when they get sick.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: MBBS is difficult, but worth is in the END.

content.Placements: It's a MBBS course, so no such placement is there after an internship in which you get a stipend of 30,000, you give the NEET PG exam, and then if you are successful, you go for higher studies. People here give the USMLE exam as well as the PLAB and other licensing exams, though teaching is very good here.
content.Infrastructure: There is a free Wi-Fi facility in both the hostel and the library. The classes are well maintained, and everywhere is air-conditioned. The mess food is hygienic, and there is a sports facility known as MARENA, which takes a subscription but has all the sports, whatever.

faqs.answer: Manipal Medical College MBBS admission 2025is now open and the institute will admit students on the basis of rank obtained by them in the NEET. The last round closing rank for General All India category for MBBS programme admission was 40,258 in the year 2024 while it was 24,330 for the year 2023.Kasturba Medical College Cutoffsfor NEET vary every year and it depends on the number of factors such as the category of candidates and the number of applications received by the institute.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Kasturba Medical College?
faqs.answer: Kasturba Medical College admission 2025are based on rank obtained by candidates in entrance examination. To get admission in any programme offered atManipal Medical Collegeat undergraduate, postgraduate, super specialty or fellowship level, candidates must appear for an entrance examination. Candidates may also be required to appear for Personal Interview round for some courses. The final round ofKMC Medical College admission processis the counselling round.KMCManipalMBBSadmissionis made through rank obtained by candidates in the NEET UG. Admission to the MD orMSprogramme atKasturba Medical Collegeis through the rank obtained by candidates in NEET PG and M.Sc admission is through Manipal Entrance Test. Candidates may also be required to appear for personal interview for admission to certain programmes at

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Kasturba Medical College?
faqs.answer: Candidates cannot get direct admission in any of the undergraduate, postgraduate, super specialty or fellowship programme offered by the college. The institute accepts the scores and rank of multiple entrance examinations. Candidates must appear for NEET UG for admission in MBBS programme, NEET PG for MD and MS programmes and NEET SS for admission in DM and MCh programmes offered atKMC Manipal. Manipal Entrance Test/ department tests are also conducted for admission in the MSc, MPhil and fellowship programmes atManipal Medical College.

description: KMC Manipal cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

KMC Manipal NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 31834 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.
KMC Manipal MBBS cutoff 2025 was 31834 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

KMC Manipal accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

KMC Manipal NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MD and MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 39197 to 224933. According to this range, the most and least competitive courses are MS and MD, respectively. For more details, see the table below.
According to the KMC Manipal MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in Orthopaedics. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 39197.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

KMC Manipal NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to M.Ch., DM courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

While for the last round, the closing ranks ranged from 21 to 7238, wherein M.Ch. in Hand Surgery proved to be the most sought-after in the General AI category. Students can check the first and last round closing ranks from the table provided below.

In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 21 for M.Ch. in Hand Surgery. In 2023, the same specialisation cutoff was capped at 60.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.

NEET SS is the accepting exam for Kasturba Medical College, Manipal, Manipal Academy of Higher Education admission to various Super Speciality Courses. Candidates appearing for NEET SS can refer to the table below to view the important NEET SS 2025 dates.

Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for Kasturba Medical College, Manipal, Manipal Academy of Higher Education. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

KMC Manipal cutoff 2024 for MD course revealed the growing demand of specialisation preferences among the candidates belonging to different categories. Considering the KMC Manipal MD cutoff 2024, the most popular specialisation for admission was MD in Palliative Medicine with a closing cutoff rank of 74812 for the General AI category candidates.

KMC Manipal excellence in academics, distinguished professors, and well-established infrastructure is the reason for its high ranks among numerous ranking agencies. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for KMC Manipal indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. It has been seen that in the 'Medical' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. hostel.description: It is desirable that all students stay in the Hostels. It is mandatory for all first-year students to reside in the Hostels. Students can take an independent telephone connection on additional payment. Adequate dining facilities are available and membership of one of the campus messes is compulsory. Some hostels have a gymnasium and indoor games facilities. Food court caters to the variety of food to suit all tastes.

library.description: The KMC Manipal Health Sciences Library, perhaps the best in the country, is spread over 13,950 sq meters and can accommodate 1207 students at a time. It provides access to a range of databases on the campus network, e-resources, and OPAC-related access to its vast collection. It has a separate audio-visual room, computer lab, group study area and private study area. The library has the institutional member with DELNET, British Council and The American Library, Chennai.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Throw Ball Court, Volley Ball Court, 400-Metre Athletics Ground, Table Tennis

library.description: The KMC Manipal Health Sciences Library, perhaps the best in the country, is spread over 13,950 sq meters and can accommodate 1207 students at a time. It provides access to a range of databases on the campus network, e-resources, and OPAC-related access to its vast collection. It has a separate audio-visual room, computer lab, group study area and private study area. The library has the institutional member with DELNET, British Council and The American Library, Chennai.

hostel.description: It is desirable that all students stay in the Hostels. It is mandatory for all first-year students to reside in the Hostels. Students can take an independent telephone connection on additional payment. Adequate dining facilities are available and membership of one of the campus messes is compulsory. Some hostels have a gymnasium and indoor games facilities. Food court caters to the variety of food to suit all tastes.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Throw Ball Court, Volley Ball Court, 400-Metre Athletics Ground, Table Tennis

labs.description: Available Facilities: Simulation Lab, Cardiology Lab, Microbiology Lab, Pathology labs, Biochemistry Lab, Virology Lab

reviews.review_heading: It is the most rated college for medicine.
reviews.review_text: Firstly, without wearing white coats, we aren't allowed inside the campus. There is tight security at the gate, and entry is allowed after proper record entries. Mostly, the mess is so rushed all the time because students from the hostel also use the mess to have their food. Visitors are not allowed inside the campus without a proper security check.

reviews.review_heading: Successful college in Manipal.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories for pathology, anatomy, and biochemistry were individually isolated and arranged. Basically, needed preservatives and equipment were arranged before lab sessions by the lab assistants. Campus food was hygienic and suitable for all kinds of people.

reviews.review_heading: The premier medical college.
reviews.review_text: Within the college campus hospitals were opened, which made it very easy for students to attend training sessions. In the hospital, more than 1000 beds were arranged to give training for students based on real-time cases. Events and sports were not encouraged by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Kasturba Medical College, Manipal.
reviews.review_text:
1.Lecture:- 
Lecture halls are big and accommodate half of batch at a time. Fully air-conditioned and well lit.
Speakers are good too. Faculty usually use PowerPoint and projectors. 
2. Hostels : 
Three types of hostels are available for boys. Hostel room with minimum cost are also nice. The expensive one is quite luxurious.
3. Library:-
The library is the best place of the college. It is huge and has ambiance for study.
4.Mess:- 
Mess is also clean and decent. They serve healthy meals. But once...

reviews.review_heading: MBBS is difficult, but worth is in the END.
reviews.review_text: There is a free Wi-Fi facility in both the hostel and the library. The classes are well maintained, and everywhere is air-conditioned. The mess food is hygienic, and there is a sports facility known as MARENA, which takes a subscription but has all the sports, whatever.

reviews.review_heading: Kasturba medical College : comprehensive review.
reviews.review_text: The college has a lot of high-tech facilities that are academic-related. For example, the labs are great, everything is up-to-date and the latest, there is no overcrowding of classrooms, and the seating is very comfortable. The projector is great, and the study environment, including AC, is great. All the hostels have Wi-Fi facilities. It is a little difficult to find Wi-Fi in the labs and hospital, but it can be done if you get the official password. The hostels range from cheap to expensive. T...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, placements in our batch were good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, with many facilities available. There is a good library with two library cards. We can take any two books home for 15 days to read, after which we need to renew. The hostel facilities are also good. The mess and canteen have good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I did my MBBS from Kasturba College.
reviews.review_text: This college had very good infrastructure for the MBBS course. The college had all the medical facilities for students' practical and interactive learning. Wi-Fi, library, canteen, labs, etc., were available on the campus for the students of our course.

reviews.review_heading: Kasturba medical college - A college of excellence.
reviews.review_text:
Medical facilities are excellent.
Huge gym of 7 floors including table tennis, badminton, squash, swimming, etc. Classrooms are air conditioned. Hostel facilities are average. Multiple hostels are there so some hostels very good while some are average.
There is a large library of 7 floors and museum of anatomy as well.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel has good Wi-Fi, which is around 10 Mbps. Our classrooms have projectors. There are test dummies through which we can learn how to do certain clinical examinations. The library has six floors and can give you virtually any book you want related to medicine.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is great with good campus life.
reviews.review_text: It provides good Wi-Fi. The mess food is not good, and the hostels are great. It provides air-conditioners and hostels are available. It has a 7-floor sports facility called Mareena, and students have a fest, and many more cultural activities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best private universities for medical aspirants.
reviews.review_text: It is an amazing place. There is a good mix of all kinds of students. Labs and classrooms are amazing as KMC has a strong focus on infrastructure. The whole city is good in general, and the class size is small. There are a lot of places nearby to relax. KMC spends a lot on infrastructure, so there are no complaints regarding that. You will also find good vacation stops nearby.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a very good infrastructure and the teachers are really supportive.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is amazing. It is an open campus and the hospital is huge with different blocks for different departments. For sports, they have a big ground in MIT.
Also, it has a place called Arena that is a 7-floor building dedicated to sports. Although it is a bit costly, you'll get almost every variety of games there.

reviews.review_heading: I have an amazing experience. It is one of the best deemed medical colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is top-notch. Our library, labs, dissection hall and other infrastructure are the best and biggest. The hostel is amazing, with air-conditioned rooms optional. The canteen near our hostel serves very delicious food. Sports are up to the mark.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good, and our college deserves to be among the top colleges.
reviews.review_text: The library is fully equipped with Wi-Fi facility and all the books related to the course. Food served in the mess is above average. Other facilities are also good. Our college also provides air-conditioned rooms for students. There is also a sports complex nearby which has all the required equipment for students.

data.description: KMC Mangalore has separate hostels for boys and girls. Rooms are allotted to students based on availability. All the basic facilities are available in the hostel for students. Campus has boys hostel, girls hostel, gym, auditorium, etc. The college offers good and comfortable accommodation to the students. Hostels have warden facility for safety of the students.

paragraphs: Kasturba Medical College provides various scholarships to the students who opt for MBBS programme at the undergraduate level. The scholarships offered to the students are merit based and is offered to the candidates who perform well in academics. Mentioned below is the list of Manipal Medical College scholarships that can be availed by the MBBS programme students:
Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

The total tuition fee for the MBBS is INR 44 lakh. This fee is exclusive of various charges such as admission fee, application fee, and several other fee components. If students find the fee very high worry not these students can apply for the scholarships provided by the college. The students must apply early for the scholarships as there are limited scholarships provided to students.

Yes, Kasturba Medical College does offer government-aided scholarships to its students. To get these scholarships, candidates can apply through national scholarship portal and state-scholarship portal, government of India. It provides a common electronic portal for implementing various scholarship schemes launched by the Union Government, State Government and Union Territories across the country.

The final step of Kasturba Medical college application process is to pay the application fees. The application fees charged by the institute is different for General and Foreign or NRI candidates. General category candidates who want to seek admission in any of the programme must pay Kasturba Medical College application fees of INR 600 (INR 2,500 for Foreign/NRI/ NRI sponsored category candidates) for all courses. The institute may ask candidates to pay INR 1,400 as an entrance test fees for selected courses.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: The modes of are online and offline. Admission to various courses is done on the basis of the entrance exam scores, counselling followed by interview rounds. At the PG level, the college offers three-year DM in six specialisations and MCh in eight specialisations, MD, minimum three-year PhD in seven specialisations, two-year MPH diploma, and PG diploma courses. The method of selection includes 10 marks for MBBS, 15 marks for MD/ MS/ DNB, 30 marks for theory (written) entrance examination, 30 marks for departmental clinical/ practical and viva voce, and 15 marks for the final interview. review_content.Placements: The placement rate for the 2013 PG 2 year placement was 92%. In the 2023 academic year, 100% of PG students were placed, with all 28 students successfully placed. Top recruiting companies include pharmaceutical organizations and prestigious healthcare companies such as Apollo Hospital, Boston Scientific, Johnson and Johnson, Bigstone Dickinson, Cipla, and Sun Pharma.
review_content.Infrastructure: SCTIMST has a comprehensive infrastructure designed to support its educational, research, and healthcare missions. The hospital wing has 253 beds and specializes in cardiovascular and neurological diseases. Biomedical technology is a focus, with research ongoing in the development of innovative biomedical devices. The libraries have a collection of over 25,000 books and subscribe to 170 journals, providing access to a wealth of information. Separate hostels for boys and girls are equipped with essential amenities. The campus also has an IT infrastructure, auditorium, sports facilities, Wi-Fi, and labs.

Most of the students got internships at this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is simple and it is maintained well. Classrooms are clean, and there is a decent library with enough material. Labs are functional. Wi-Fi works in the entire campus and the campus is peaceful. Sports and canteen facilities are also available in the college.

faqs.answer: To get an admission at SCTIMST Trivandrum for MPH, aspirants must start by checking that they fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria specified by the institute. Eligible candidates must visit the institute's official website to apply. Applicants are required to appear for the Entrance Examination and Personal Interview, both of which are conducted by the institute. The final selection is based on the candidates' educational qualifications, professional experience in the area of public health, performance in the entrance test and personal interview.Shortlisted candidates must submit the first instalment of the SCTIMST MPH tuition fee, along with the other charges, such as the admission fee, security deposit, etc. Further, they must report to the campus with the required original documents for physical verification on the specified date.
faqs.question: Q: How can I get admission at SCTIMST Trivandrum for MPH?

faqs.answer: You cannot get direct admission in MPH course at SCTIMST. If you want admission in MPH at SCTIMST here are the eligibility criteria details: Graduates in the following fields: medicine (MBBS), dentistry (BDS), AYUSH (BAMS, BNYS, BUMS, BSMS, BHMS), B.Tech or BE (Any Branch), and four-year veterinary/nursing Science degree programs Students with a postgraduate degree in Statistics/Biostatistics, Demography, Population Studies, Nutrition, Sociology, Economics, Psychology, Anthropology, Social Work, Management, or Law, or a bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy, Occupational Therapy, or Pharmacy. It is preferable to have work experience in a health-related profession.For selection a written exam, an interview, professional experience related to the subject of public health, and educational background will all be taken into consideration . Candidates from abroad must certify their level of English proficiency.

content.Infrastructure: The college is simple and it is maintained well. Classrooms are clean, and there is a decent library with enough material. Labs are functional. Wi-Fi works in the entire campus and the campus is peaceful. Sports and canteen facilities are also available in the college.

admission_overview.college_name: SCTIMST Trivandrum Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: SCTIMST Trivandrum admission is both merit and entrance-based.Sree Chitra Tirunal Institute for Medical Sciences and Technology, Trivandrum (SCTIMST Trivandrum) rankedno. 9under the'Medical'category byNIRF 2022Rankings. SCTIMST Trivandrum offers a range of PG, doctoral, diploma, and certificate courses in Medical Science and related disciplines. The mode of application at SCTIMST is online.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at SCTIMST Trivandrum for MPH?
faqs.answer: To get an admission at SCTIMST Trivandrum for MPH, aspirants must start by checking that they fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria specified by the institute. Eligible candidates must visit the institute's official website to apply. Applicants are required to appear for the Entrance Examination and Personal Interview, both of which are conducted by the institute. The final selection is based on the candidates' educational qualifications, professional experience in the area of public health, performance in the entrance test and personal interview.Shortlisted candidates must submit the first instalment of the SCTIMST MPH tuition fee, along with the other charges, such as the admission fee, security deposit, etc. Further, they must report to the campus with the required original documents for physical verification on the specified date.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to MPH at SCTIMST, Trivandrum?
faqs.answer: You cannot get direct admission in MPH course at SCTIMST. If you want admission in MPH at SCTIMST here are the eligibility criteria details:Graduates in the following fields: medicine (MBBS), dentistry (BDS), AYUSH (BAMS, BNYS, BUMS, BSMS, BHMS), B.Tech or BE (Any Branch), and four-year veterinary/nursing Science degree programs Students with a postgraduate degree in Statistics/Biostatistics, Demography, Population Studies, Nutrition, Sociology, Economics, Psychology, Anthropology, Social Work, Management, or Law, or a bachelor's degree in Physiotherapy, Occupational Therapy, or Pharmacy. It is preferable to have work experience in a health-related profession.For selection a written exam, an interview, professional experience related to the subject of public health, and educational background will all be taken into consideration . Candidates from abroad must certify their level of English proficiency.

faqs.question: What is the SCTIMST INI CET Cutoff 2026?
faqs.answer: TheSCTIMST Trivandrum INICET Cutoff 2026was released for admission to the MD and MS courses for all categories under the All India quota. TheMD in Transfusion Medicinecourse cutoff in round 2 was3743for the General category students under the All India quota. Please note that other categories, courses, and rounds cutoff will vary accordingly.

faqs.question: Are MPH admissions currently open at SCTIMST Trivandrum?
faqs.answer: MPH admissions at SCTIMST Trivandrum are not open right now. The admission process for the batch starting in July commenced in May. Interested candidates can contact the institute for the exact admission dates. They must also frequently visit the institute's official website for more details.

placement_data.title: SCTIMST Trivandrum Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per SCTIMST Medical NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 5.53 LPA and INR 24.25 LPA , respectively. Earlier, according to the NIRF report 2023, 68 PG (2-year) and 27 PG (3-year) students were placed during SCTIMST Trivandrum placements 2022. The median package offered during SCTIMST Trivandrum placements was INR 5.04 LPA for PG (2-year) and INR 2.64 LPA for PG (3-year) students.

tables.context: What is the salary package offered during SCTIMIST

faqs.question: How was placement at SCTIMST, Trivandrum?
faqs.answer: 87% of candidates were placed during the SCTIMST Thiruvananthapuram PG 2 Year Placements in 2021. Previously, 93% and 87% of candidates were placed in the SCTIMST Thiruvananthapuram PG 2-Year Placements in 2020 and 2019, respectively. The average package offered in Sri Chitra Thirunal Institute of Medical Sciences and Technology Thiruvananthapuram for PG 2 Year and PG 3 Year Internships in 2021 was Rs 5.1 LPA and Rs 2.4 LPA, respectively, according to SCTIMST Thiruvananthapuram NIRF Report 2022.

faqs.question: What is the salary package offered during SCTIMIST Trivandrum MPH placements?
faqs.answer: SCTIMST Trivandrum has not yet released the official report on MPH placements 2024. However, the institute's Medical NIRF report 2024, contains the following insights on the median package offered during PG (2-year) placements in 2023 and 2022: Course Median Package in 2023 Median Package in 2022 PG (2-year) INR 5.53 LPA INR 5.04 LPA NOTE: The mentioned insights are applicable as MPH is a two-year programme offered at the PG level.

faqs.question: Is there any government job that I can get after completing MPH at SCTIMST Trivandrum?
faqs.answer: Yes, besides the private sector jobs, the career opportunities after pursuing an MPH include various government jobs as well. After graduating with an MPH degree from SCTIMST Trivandrum, students can build a career in the fields of public health administration, epidemiology, health policy, and health education. They can work with organisations like the Ministry of Health and Family Welfare, National Health Mission, Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR), and State Public Health Departments. Some famous job roles may include public health officers, health policy analysts, epidemiologists, health programme managers, researchers, etc.

faqs.question: Does SCTIMST Trivandrum offer 100% placements to MPH students?
faqs.answer: SCTIMIST Trivandrum has not released the course-specific placement rate for MPH. According to SCTIMST NIRF Report 2023, the placement rate recorded during PG (2-year) placements in 2022 was 92%. Earlier, the placement rate during SCTIMST Trivandrum PG (2-year) placements in 2021 and 2020 was 87% and 93%, respectively. Hence, the institute may not have a placemet rate of 100% but has maintained a notable placement rate of over 80% for PG (2-year) courses.

reviews_list.review_title: Exposure-wise, this college is the best.

review_content.Placements: Your placement depends entirely on your capability to clear exams like NORCET for government positions. For private placements with the name of this college, you can expect to earn around 15-20k. The college mainly provides a good name for your degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best, as it's the largest and most reputed college after AIIMS Delhi in the entire city. The college hospital and its buildings are spread over a huge area offering ample exposure. Also, the college is located in Asari Nagar West, which is in South Delhi.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This college provides me good opportunities in the industries.

review_content.Placements: In our college, above 50% students gets placed in different private companies. In our college, the highest package was 4 lacs, the lowest was 2.75 lacs, and average package was 3–4 lacs. The top recruiting companies was Dr Lal Pathlabs, Apollo, etc. In our course, almost 90% students get internship in some of local labs. The top role offered was lab technician.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were awesome at our college. The college campus was well furnished and well maintained. In classrooms and labs, everything was fully equipped with instruments. The quality of the hostel food was tasty and healthy. Medical facilities were also available on campus. Indoor and outdoor sports grounds were also available.

review_content.Infrastructure: The college has decent infrastructure for our course. Students are given all kinds of facilities required for this course. The college has its own labs for student practice. Other facilities like Wi-Fi, canteen, hostel, library, and sports are also provided by the college management to the students.

review_summary.college_name: Vardhman Mahavir Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has nice faculty, no placements, but very good infrastructure.

content.Placements: I studied B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology from VMMC & SJH and I must say the college is the best. However, it does not provide placements, but we can work there on a contract basis through some companies and the pay is different for contract staff and permanent staff members. The salary offered varies between Rs. 20,000-80,000 per month. Overall, it has the best teachers and doctors to learn from. It provides great exposure as it is one of the largest government medical colleges in India.
content.Infrastructure: Everything in the college with respect to the infrastructure is very good and well-furnished. Labs are fully functional and all kinds of modalities and tests are offered at very low prices which is a benefit for students and patients both.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Hons.) in Nursing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with the clinical exposure I get.

content.Placements: There are a minimum 1,000 vacancies of nursing officers with a salary of Rs. 90,000 per month and 80% girls reservation. Roles offered to us are registered nurse and nursing officer. Many foreign companies approached us as certified nurses. This college gives us so much exposure.
content.Infrastructure: Library, labs, demonstration room, and classrooms are available with full air-conditioning in summer and room theater in winter. It has a well-developed infrastructure. Canteens and lecture halls are available with noise noise-free campus, and we will love this place. It is extraordinary.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Hons.) in Nursing - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Exposure-wise, this college is the best.

content.Placements: Your placement depends entirely on your capability to clear exams like NORCET for government positions. For private placements with the name of this college, you can expect to earn around 15-20k. The college mainly provides a good name for your degree.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is the best, as it's the largest and most reputed college after AIIMS Delhi in the entire city. The college hospital and its buildings are spread over a huge area offering ample exposure. Also, the college is located in Asari Nagar West, which is in South Delhi.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college provides me good opportunities in the industries.

content.Placements: In our college, above 50% students gets placed in different private companies. In our college, the highest package was 4 lacs, the lowest was 2.75 lacs, and average package was 3–4 lacs. The top recruiting companies was Dr Lal Pathlabs, Apollo, etc. In our course, almost 90% students get internship in some of local labs. The top role offered was lab technician.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were awesome at our college. The college campus was well furnished and well maintained. In classrooms and labs, everything was fully equipped with instruments. The quality of the hostel food was tasty and healthy. Medical facilities were also available on campus. Indoor and outdoor sports grounds were also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Lab Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college offers good quality learning and faculty to the students.

content.Placements: Very few students get placed in our course at this college. Most of the students get placements on campus. Around 60-65% of the students get internships through the college. The average package offered was between 2-4 LPA. Top recruiters in the college were labs and hospitals for the roles of laboratory technicians and assistants.
content.Infrastructure: The college has decent infrastructure for our course. Students are given all kinds of facilities required for this course. The college has its own labs for student practice. Other facilities like Wi-Fi, canteen, hostel, library, and sports are also provided by the college management to the students.

Candidates can choose from these desired courses based on their elegibility and the selection criteria for the course. All of the programmes have an entrance based admission proces. paragraphs: Vardhman Mahavir Medical College placement report 2025 is yet to be published on the official website. However, the institute has released the NIRF Report 2025. According to the NIRF Report 2025, 20 MBBS students were placed during placements 2023. The median package offered to MBBS students during 2023 placements stood at INR 1.25 LPA . Further, 207 students of PG (3-year) courses were placed with the median package of INR 1.48 LPA during the Vardhman Mahavir Medical College placements 2024. The top recruiters of Vardhman Mahavir Medical College in recent years include AIIMS, Fortis Healthcare, Apollo Hospitals, Max Hospitals, PGIMER, etc.

description: Vardhman Mahavir Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Vardhman Mahavir Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 132 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Vardhman Mahavir Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 132 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 232 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Vardhman Mahavir Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

The cutoff is released in the form of opening and closing cutoff ranks for different categories under the All India quota. For the General AI category, closing ranks varied from 119 to 36674, with MD in General Medicine being the most challenging for admission. To see more information, students can check out the table below.

Vardhman Mahavir Medical College accepts the NEET PG results for admission to PG-level medical courses, like MD and MS courses. For the MD specialisations, the most challenging one was MD in General Medicine, with a round 3 closing rank of 119 for the General AI category.

Vardhman Mahavir Medical College NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to DM, M.Ch. courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

reviews.review_heading: It has nice faculty, no placements, but very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Everything in the college with respect to the infrastructure is very good and well-furnished. Labs are fully functional and all kinds of modalities and tests are offered at very low prices which is a benefit for students and patients both.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the clinical exposure I get.
reviews.review_text: Library, labs, demonstration room, and classrooms are available with full air-conditioning in summer and room theater in winter. It has a well-developed infrastructure. Canteens and lecture halls are available with noise noise-free campus, and we will love this place. It is extraordinary.

reviews.review_heading: Exposure-wise, this college is the best.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best, as it's the largest and most reputed college after AIIMS Delhi in the entire city. The college hospital and its buildings are spread over a huge area offering ample exposure. Also, the college is located in Asari Nagar West, which is in South Delhi.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides me good opportunities in the industries.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were awesome at our college. The college campus was well furnished and well maintained. In classrooms and labs, everything was fully equipped with instruments. The quality of the hostel food was tasty and healthy. Medical facilities were also available on campus. Indoor and outdoor sports grounds were also available.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers good quality learning and faculty to the students.
reviews.review_text: The college has decent infrastructure for our course. Students are given all kinds of facilities required for this course. The college has its own labs for student practice. Other facilities like Wi-Fi, canteen, hostel, library, and sports are also provided by the college management to the students.

reviews.review_heading: We have NEET PG toppers 2023 from our college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and the college have central air conditioning. Wi-Fi is provided in the lecture theater but not in the hostel. The food available in the mess is good. We have well-maintained labs on campus. Hostel rooms are double-seater, with a water cooler facility on each floor. You can bring your own AC into the room. No electricity bill is charged.

reviews.review_heading: Best medical college in Delhi with experienced faculty members.
reviews.review_text:
Our college is having a good infrastructure with advanced laboratories having new technology machines. Our college is now equipped by new smart ours for playing PPT's and 3d videos to understand medical mechanism
Whole college is centralized air conditioned with anatomical museums, direction halls and labs.

reviews.review_heading: More focused on treatment and less on students and their life.
reviews.review_text: There are good classrooms and well-equipped library but the conditions of the hostel is not good and there is no space for extracurricular activities, not even a park or a ground for students to play in, not even an auditorium, not even a room for students.

reviews.review_heading: VMMC: A genuine place to study.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are not very good. We are provided double seater rooms that include a table, a chair, and two beds. Rest all we have to take by ourselves. We get our AC and refrigerator installed without any additional extra cost. The food in the mess is not so good but is edible.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, Largest OPD, Spacious hostel, amazing faculty but crowded in OPD time.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college building is mesmerizing. It's an L shaped building with completely ceiling air conditioning in every corner of the building which is very important according to harsh hot and cold environment of Delhi. Lecture theatre are with 200+ capacity with Wi-Fi available with very comfortable desks. The lecture theatre has whiteboard, blackboard, Smart Board and Projector which makes learning easy. The hostel facility is amazing with 2 hostels (Old Boys Hostel and New Boy...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied, some things can be improved good infrastructure and exposure .
reviews.review_text: New building with awesome infrastructure with AC college building, full AC library which is open 24hrs (common reading room is also present). Labs have all the modern equipment and well qualified handlers, hostel has 7 floors, though not so great but still very good to live, food is just okay of boys' hostel, girls' hostel has good food.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best medical colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: It has amazing infrastructure. Lecture theatres and labs are equipped with all the necessary facilities. The building is newly built.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good with fully air-conditioned classrooms well-equipped with smart boards, projectors, LED screens, and speakers. The hostel provides double-sharing rooms. Food served in the hostel is good as you can order whatever is needed and room service is also available.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides great opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our library is fully air-conditioned, and you can go for self-study there. Our classrooms are also air-conditioned, and also the whole college building is air-conditioned. All the classrooms have smart boards and are well-furnished. There is an annual sports event named VMMC-Premier League where students can take part in many indoor, outdoor and e-games. There are dance and drama societies in our college. There is a particular website for MLT students.

reviews.review_heading: Fabulous campus and hostel.
reviews.review_text: There is a shortage of area in the campus due to its location hence we are shortage of space for playing most of the sports. We don't have a gym yet. The college has one TT table, 3 badminton courts and one basketball court and the list ends here. Everyone here is sad about the fact that we don't have a place to play. We generally rent a ground to play football or cricket with our own money! There are many social groups- fashion society, sports society/ drama society/ photography society and mor...

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Vardhman Mahavir Medical College

likes.text: Each and every medical professional passed out from VMMC & Safdarjung Hospital Delhi gets the job in renowned hospitals both in private and government institutions.
Following their final year of MBBS, students are required to complete a one-year internship at the attached hospital.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, AIIMS Jodhpur ranks #101-150 under the category 'Overall'.

The INI CET July 2026 session exam date has been announced for admission to the MD/MS/MDS/DM/MCh courses. The exam will be conducted on May 16, 2026.

table.details: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Jodhpur
- 19 by NIRF 2025 (Medical) - 101-150 by NIRF 2025 (Overall) - 10th by India Today 2025 (Medical)

college_info.intro:
All India Institute of Medical Sciences Jodhpur popular programmes are BSc and MBBS. BSc course is provided through the College of Nursing, AIIMS, Jodhpur which was established in 2013. Students joining the Nursing courses are well-groomed and trained by a group of experienced and well-trained faculty members. This training is at par with international standards. AIIMS Jodhpur students are taught empathy, dignity, professionalism, integrity, and compassion.
AIIMS Jodhpur MBBS students are taught about Infection Control, Air Borne Precautions, Contact Precautions, Infection Control Committee, and others. Overall, All India Institute of Medical Sciences AIIMS Jodhpur is one of the top colleges offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by AIIMS Jodhpur and their respective eligibility and AIIMS jodhpur fees:
Check out more details in the below videos:

faqs.answer: A:    The total tuition fee for the MBBS programme at AIIMS Jodhpur is INR 24,100. Hence, you are certainly eligible to apply for the MBBS programme offered at AIIMS Jodhpur even if you have scored 60% in Class 12 boards.However, selection to the course is done on entrance-basis.
