individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I just want to say that this college is just awesome.

content.Placements: It is not like IIT college and others. In our college, college itself is responsible for internships. All students do their internship before leaving college and in internship we also get paid like 33,000 right now and stipend is increasing year per year
content.Infrastructure: The central library is present, where every known book in MBBS is available and the digital library is also present. Classroom's infrastructure is just awesome and labs are also good and on the whole campus, high-speed Wi-Fi is available. In hostels, Wi-Fi is also available. Sports and games facilities are very good. Every known game court is present here; even an Olympic-size pool is also available. The hostel is provided with double rooms having all the facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of AIIMS Jodhpur.

content.Placements: This college provides a year of compulsory internships in different areas of the hospital. For this internship, they provide a stipend. Good ranks in PG exams provide best practice in the best department of the college. More than half of students get placed in a good multinational hospital.
content.Infrastructure: The college has splendid infrastructure and facilities. They provide Wi-Fi, e-classrooms, a central library, and labs with modern instruments. The college also provides double-seated rooms for UG students and a single-seater room for PG students. There is a sports complex and an activity hall for extracurricular activities. Mess and canteens are also available.

admission_overview.title: AIIMS Jodhpur Application Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: AIIMS Jodhpur admission process 2026 is completely entrance-based, candidates seeking admission to any courses need to qualify for the course-specific entrance exams. For AIIMS Jodhpur MBBS admission, a valid NEET UG score is required. For PG and super-speciality courses, admissions were earlier done based on AIIMS PG Exam scores but are now replaced with INICET and institute-level exams. Aspirants can check out the following video to get information regarding AIIMS admission process:

eligibility_selection.title: AIIMS Jodhpur Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Admission to AIIMS Jodhpur PG courses is based on candidates’ performance in the INICET entrance exam. AIIMS Jodhpur admission is conducted in an online mode. The institute offers undergraduate, postgraduate, super speciality and doctoral programmes at UG, PG and doctorate course in streams such as Medical, Nursing, Applied Science and Dental Studies, among others. paragraphs: The admission process for each course differs from another one. However, the steps remain common which are to register for the course-specific entrance, appear for the exam-specific counselling process and then final seat allotment for the shortlisted students.

AIIMS Jodhpur's application process differs with every course offered by the college. While, there are a few programmes for which the application must be submitted on the official website, coirses such as MBBS need no college-level application form.
Appear for exam-specific counselling & final seat allotment.
Post the final seat allotment, candidates who want admission can submit the fee and confirm their admission.

In order to clear NEET UG, a good preparation strategy is a must. In general, students planning to appear for the exam must start preparing at least two years in advance, i.e. from Class 11 onwards. Some preparation tips to ace the national-level medical test are as follows:
Check more ontips and preparation strategies for NEET UG.

AIIMS Jodhpur feehas multiple components, out of which some are paid one-time while others are paid semester-wise. The components include tuition fees, caution deposits, hostel and mess charges, etc. Aspirants are required to pay this fee at the time of admission and then semester-wise. Coming to affordability is one of the strong reasons why many don't opt for a degree or a college. The availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible. However, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Check below the total tuition fee and average package for top AIIMS Jodhpur courses:
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Aspirants once selected will need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.AIIMS Jodhpur seats for MBBSwhich is the flagship course is 125. placement_data.title: AIIMS Jodhpur Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: AIIMS Jodhpur NIRF report 2025 is released. As per the report, the median package recorded during AIIMS Jodhpur placement 2023 for UG 5-year course was INR 13.56 LPA. 61 students were placed and 30 students were selected for higher studies out of total 91 students in 2023.

PG 2-year and PG 3-year median package recorded in 2024 was INR 8.88 LPA and INR 16.5 LPA. Out of total 49 students, 37 students were placed and 3 were selected for higher studies during PG 3-year placement 2024. In PG 2-year course, 71 students were placed and 23 students went for higher studies out of 94 students.

faqs.question: How are the placements at AIIMS Jodhpur?
faqs.answer: As per the NIRF report 2025 released in the Medical category, 61 students were placed and 30 students were selected for higher studies out of total 91 students during UG 3-year placements 2023. The median package offered in 2023 was 13.56 LPA.

description: AIIMS Jodhpur cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS Jodhpur cutoff 2024 has been released for NEET UG, detailing both opening and closing ranks across the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. The AIIMS Jodhpur NEET UG cutoff 2025 will be published following the announcement of the NEET UG 2025 result. In the meantime, candidates seeking admission to AIIMS Jodhpur can refer to the table below to review the NEET UG and INI CET cutoff ranks for the past three years across various courses, specialisations and categories.

AIIMS Jodhpur NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 386 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS Jodhpur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 386 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 766 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS Jodhpur accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

The NEET PG cutoff 2024 was released for admission to the MD, MS, and PG Diploma courses across categories. During the last round of AIIMS Jodhpur MD cutoff 2024, the closing rank was 9471 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Of all the MD specialisations, the top most competitive specialisation for admission was MD in Dermatology, Venerology & Leprosy for the general category.

AIIMS Jodhpur NEET PG cutoff 2024 was announced for MD courses. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks. As per the last round cutoff, MD in Dermatology, Venerology & Leprosy had the most stringent cutoff rank of 9471 for admission among the students belonging to the General AI category.
For other categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the filters provided below:

NEET PG Counselling 2024 has been released for different categories of students. The special stray vacancy round result was the last round for NEET PG counselling. Candidates, who appeared in the counselling process can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise NEET PG cutoff lists.
AIIMS Jodhpur INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 33 to 27774 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in General Medicine, with a lowest cutoff rank of 33. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Anatomy, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in General Medicine, MD in Paediatrics and MS in Obstetrtics and Gynaecology, with Round 3 closing ranks of 33, 334 and 362, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.
AIIMS Jodhpur B.Sc. cutoff 2025 was 748 in the last round. In 2024, the last round closing rank for the same course was 966 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
For the OBC category students, the AIIMS Nursing cutoff 2025 for the B.Sc. course was 1493 in the last round. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

The AIIMS Jodhpur cutoff 2025 has been released based on the AIIMS Paramedical exam. The cutoff was released for different categories such as General, OBC, SC, ST and EWS categories belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff range among the General AI category was between 28 and 311.
To check the round-wise and year-wise cutoff for different categories, check the filter given below:

The AIIMS Jodhpur cutoff 2024 has been released for MSc courses. During the Round 1 cutoff, the closing ranks for M.Sc. in Biochemistry is 5 for the candidates belonging to the General category under the AI quota.

How is MBBS at AIIMS Jodhpur? | Review

reviews.review_heading: I just want to say that this college is just awesome.
reviews.review_text:
The central library is present, where every known book in MBBS is available and the digital library is also present. 
Classroom's infrastructure is just awesome and labs are also good and on the whole campus, high-speed Wi-Fi is available. 
In hostels, Wi-Fi is also available. 
Sports and games facilities are very good. Every known game court is present here; even an Olympic-size pool is also available.
The hostel is provided with double rooms having all the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of AIIMS Jodhpur.
reviews.review_text: The college has splendid infrastructure and facilities. They provide Wi-Fi, e-classrooms, a central library, and labs with modern instruments. The college also provides double-seated rooms for UG students and a single-seater room for PG students. There is a sports complex and an activity hall for extracurricular activities. Mess and canteens are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Academics, faculty members, and classrooms are awesome.
reviews.review_text: In AIIMS there is a double seat rooms in room we were provided with a well furnished B.Ed chair study table and side small table The quality of food is quite fair and their is always a rotated menu every month Hostel registration is then along with academic admission New hostel rooms are affordable with a very small amount of rupees 990.

reviews.review_heading: Reviews by Dr. Vikas Saini.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is excellent. Labs are modernized. Instruments in labs are in good condition; their prices are in lakhs or crores. Classrooms also have projectors and all subject specimens like skeletons. Seats are in good condition. Hostel rooms are two-seater. A table, chair, bed, and wardrobe are also provided, and the mess menu is well-oriented.

reviews.review_heading: The best college for MD in Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation courses.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructural development is best organized here. All the facilities are good here except for education. The sports facilities at AIIMS Jodhpur are well-organized and advanced. The canteen and the mess are located in the campus. Medical facilities at Jodhpur AIIMS are the best.

reviews.review_heading: Overall very good college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: There are various facilities available like lecture theatre, Wi-Fi, for practice we have different labs loke pathology, biochemistry, microbiology lab. In anatomy we have dissection hall. We have centralized AC library with Wi-Fi. We have e library also. The quality of hostel is good. There are single rooms connected by a passage of door. There is regular cleaning in hostels done. There is mess which provides good food and also canteen which provide food at reasonable range. There is new nescafe...

reviews.review_heading: I think AIIMS is one of the best colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The hostels provided by the college are good. Our college provides 3 hostels, 1 for girls, 1 for boys and another one for PG students. About 2 more hostels are under construction. Nursing girls and MBBS girls are currently living in the same hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The name of AIIMS is enough.
reviews.review_text: Books and journals are always available for reading and can be issued by the students whenever required. All classrooms are completely Air conditioned, with smart classes and are in a theatre structure, so all the students get to SEE the faculty. Hostel rooms are well-equipped with beds, study tables and a wooden almirah. Food consists of chapati, dal rice and vegetable for dinner and lunch. For snacks and breakfast, they have options for milk, tea coffee and seasonal meals. All students get a h...

reviews.review_heading: Excellent internship opportunities and well-qualified professors.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at AIIMS Jodhpur was excellent. From fully equipped laboratories including microbiology, pathology to all high technology devices including a fully operational international radiology setup, the institute had cutting edge infrastructure. Hostels were really well built and maintained. Mess infrastructure was good, but food was average.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure and Facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college and hostel building is newly built so it is well furnished as of now. Centralised air conditioned lecture halls, auditoriums, exam hall, practical laboratories are there fully equipped with all the necessary instruments. Whole college and hospital building has a decent Wi-Fi connection. Hostels are really good and clean as they are newly constructed. Mess and canteen offer decent food. Facilities for all the sports is provided for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has best infrastructure and facilities with enjoyment.
reviews.review_text: A new hostel for boys and girls was built this year. The Interior is excellent which gives a home-like feeling, Each room will be for 2 students provided with one bed, one study which is big enough, one small drawer, and one almirah. The hostel has 2 common bathrooms on each floor. There are 7 floors in both hostels, old hostel is single-seated, which is small but livable. Mess is provided with centralised air-conditioning with A+ food.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good place for pursuing MBBS, if you are good enough to make it into this place.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms here are well constructed. The entire college and hospital have centralised air-conditioners and are having good cleanliness. Wi-Fi is available in the college. Library is available here and has a calm and peaceful environment which is a boon for a student. All types of sports are available here.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, AIIMS Jodhpur is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of AIIMS Jodhpur is the best. There are very expensive things in AIIMS Jodhpur. There are separate microscopes for every student, unlike that of state colleges. AIIMS Jodhpur is, no doubt, the best college to pursue MBBS.

reviews.review_heading: AIIMS Jodhpur is the best college.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructural development is best organised here.
All the facilities other than studies are also good here.
Sports facilities are well organised and developed at AIIMS Jodhpur. Canteen and mess are located on the campus. Medical facilities are best at AIIMS Jodhpur.

reviews.review_heading: I think AIIMS is one of the best colleges in India and also in the world.
reviews.review_text: AIIMS Jodhpur provides students with excellent quality education. It has professional teachers with great knowledge in their respective fields. AIIMS is always investing in making the infrastructure one of the best in the country. AIIMS provides separate hostels for boys, girls and PG students. Single rooms with attached washrooms are available. Food provided in the mess is not similar to the food at home but better than anything else.

college_info.intro:
Among the different courses at SRM University a few stand out as the flagship programmes of the institute being its BTech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE) and MBA programmes.
SRMIST University Kattankulathur Tamil Nadu is also known for its MBA programme, with state-of-the-art facilities and experienced faculty. The SRMIST MBA programme is extended for a duration of two years across a range of specialisations, some of which are shown here:
Another particular popular course choice are the Health Science programmes which are extended in the UG, PG, and Post-PG levels under a number of specialisations such as Pharmacy, Physiotherapy, Public Health, etc. Interested students can learn more about SRMIST Kattankulathur and its MSc programme below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: SRM University extends a range of UG, PG and PhD level courses across the streams of Engineering, Management, Medicine & Health Sciences, Science, Humanities, Law, etc. with BTech, BArch, BCA, BCom, etc. at the UG level. The SRM University Kattankulathur BTech programme is extended across a range of specialisations including:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, SRM University offers direct admission to certain programs to candidates who meet required eligibility criteria. The admission to these programs may include past academic performance, work experience, and other relevant factors.
faqs.question: Can a student join SRM IST without an entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    Depending on the program, different fees apply for postgraduate courses at the SRM Institute of Hotel Management (SRM IHM). Most postgraduate programs have annual tuition fees of about INR 1.2 lakhs. Nonetheless, the cost of tuition for some programs, like the MBA in Hospitality Management, may be higher. For the academic year 2023-2024, The fee for the M.Sc. in Hospitality Management is around 1.2 Lacs per annum. The fee for an M.Sc. in Culinary Arts is around 1.3 Lacs per annum. The fee for an MBA in Hospitality Management is typically higher around 2.5 Lacs per annum.The MBA in Hospitality Management program's higher tuition cost is justified by the program's specialization, solid industry connections, faculty expertise, promising career outcomes, and the institution's reputation. By selecting this program, students are making an investment in both their future careers and the possibility of earning large returns on their capital.PG students at SRM IHM are required to pay additional fees, such as library, examination, and hostel fees, in addition to tuition. Studying a postgraduate programme at SRM IHM will set you back about INR 2-3 Lacs total.
faqs.question: What is the fee for PG courses at SRM Institute of Hotel Management?

faqs.answer: A:    SRM Institute of Science and Technology admission is entrance-based for most of the courses. The Institute accepts national-level entrance exams like CAT, MAT, XAT, TANCET, NATA, SRMJEEE, SRMJEEM etc. for admission to MBA, BArch, BTech, M.Tech and other courses. Offering more than 80 courses and providing an annual intake of 52 K+, SRM IST offers admission based on the counselling through SRMJEEE e-counselling. To conclude, it is not very difficult to seek admission at SRM IST.
faqs.question: Is SRM IST hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidates can get admission to BTech without JEE Main score. Admission to BTech course is only based on SRMJEEE score. Candidates are required to pass Class 12 with minimum 60% aggregate as per the minimum eligibility criteria. Further, aspirants must qualify for SRM JEE exam with a valid score. This exam is conducted in two phases. The application window for 2024 has started for both the phases. Find here the registration details for SRM JEE exam.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for SRM University MBA?
overview_faqs.answer: The university fee structure is cumulative of several components, such as caution deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. A few of these components are one-time payable, while some have are charged annually/semesterly. SRM IST Chennai MBA tuition fee ranges between INR 1.9 Lacs and INR 11.5 lakh. Moreover, the one-time fee range between INR 1,200 and INR 11,000 and the hostel charges range between INR 1.45 Lacs and INR 3.3 lakh.The fee mentioned here is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee in SRM University, Chennai?
overview_faqs.answer: SRM University Chennai offers various UG & PG courses in the streams of Management, Engineering, Law, Education, Commerce, etc. The fee for all the courses may vary as per the course type, duration and specialisation a student may choose. Further, SRM University course fees may include various components such as tuition fees, registration fees, security deposit and more. Check out the following table for course-wise tuition fees offered at SRM University:CourseTuition Fee*MBAINR 60,000 - INR 8 lakhBTechINR 4 lakh - INR 18 lakhMTechINR 3.2 lakh - INR 17.5 lakhMCAINR 1.5 lakh - INR 2.2 lakhBCAINR 1.3 lakh - INR 2.9 lakhPhDINR 6 lakh*The above-mentioned fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. Hence, is indicative. Also, the given fee range is inclusive of the course fees at the affiliated colleges.

overview_faqs.question: Is the SRM fee refundable?
overview_faqs.answer: SRM IST fee refund policy is based on UGC guidelines. Candidates get full refund at any time between the academic year of admission. Candidates are required to submit an application form signed by them t and their parent in person or online for refund. Candidates get refund to their bank provided in the refund request form. The refund will be processed by RTGS or NEFT.

overview_faqs.question: How much does BTech cost in SRM University?
overview_faqs.answer: SRM Institute of Science and Technology BTech fees has multiple components, like tuition fee, security deposit, & more. The UG level programme are available with the tuition fees of INR 11 lakh to INR 23.8 lakh. The mentioned fee amount is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is however still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Lovely days at my college.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very vague, as a lot of students opt out of placements because of their CGPA, and they are not considered for placement. If you are an average student, you can get around 6 to 7 LPA if you maintain your CGPA. Companies like Wipro and L&T are the top recruiters. For internships, you have to secure them yourself, as the college gives almost zero support.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE, as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. The library is also pretty good, with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive, and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o’clock, so beware of that.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Best and excellent college.

content.Placements: 70 percent of students got internship. 85 percent of students got placed. The top recruiting companies are Accenture, Google, and Microsoft. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The top roles are project manager and software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good in our college. The classrooms are neat and clean with comfortable benches. The washrooms are neat and clean. The labs are good. The books are available in the library. We have good Wi-Fi connection. The hostel facilities are good, and canteen is also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Occupational Therapy (BOT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college is asia number one of tamilnadu.

content.Placements: 90 above and average package and recruitment process and global and IT value to improve ourselves and prepare for the course. The package level is based on experience and knowledge, companies only give higher level monthly salaries to those who are capable of working in the company. Many companies are offered in my college.
content.Infrastructure: Food is available in the hostel and is strictly maintained. Students have fixed discipline and are given time for breaks in the main canteen. There are many canteens in the college for food, and temples are also present on the campus, as it is a big college in Tamil Nadu SRM campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: About good and enjoyable college.

content.Placements: From 7th semester, students become eligible for campus placements. Top companies are Amazon, TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HUL, HCL, and so on. I got an offer in 2 companies, Infosys and Base Automation Technologies. The highest package is 51 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA to 5 LPA. 90% of people are easily getting placed, and have plans after getting the placements to work.
content.Infrastructure: The main thing I would like to mention here is library, over 4 lakhs books are placed in the library including IAS, IFS, IPS, central and state government aspirants can also use it. The gym is overall good. Campus timing is 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM, depending on the day of the order and departments. Security is very strict here so students can't do any unnecessary activities inside the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great campus life, Bad ROI.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed is very vague as a lot of students just opt out of placement because of their CGPA and they are not considered for placement. If you are an average student you can get around 6 to 7 LPA if you maintain your CGPA. Companies like Wipro and L&T are the top recruiters. Internship you have to secure at your college gives you almost zero support there.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and Classrooms are actually pretty good if you opt for CSE as the new building TP 2 is highly advanced. Library is also pretty good with a nighttime study facility. Hostels are expensive and the hostel staff is pretty annoying. You have an appointment at 9 o clock so beware of that.

admission_overview.college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Admission 2026: Courses, Eligibility, Selection and Application

admission_overview.title: SRM IST Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: SRM Institute of Science and Technology course admission 2026 is currently open. The admission is entrance-based for most of the courses. It accepts national level entrance exams. Some of the accepted exams are CAT, CMAT, GMAT, etc. the university also conducts its own entrance exams for admission to BTech and MTech. Candidates can fill out the application form online.

eligibility_selection.title: SRM IST Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: SRM IST admissions are based on merit or entrance exams scores of the candidates. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. SRM fees for a four-year BTech course are between INR 11 lakh to INR 23.8 lakh. Check below the eligibility and selection for some of the popular SRM Institute of Science and Technology courses: Popular Courses

courses_table.eligibility: Bachelor's degree with at least 50% to 60% aggregate
courses_table.selection_criteria: GMAT/ CAT/ MAT/ TANCET/ CMAT/ NMAT/ SAT/ SRMJEEM + PI

faqs.answer: No, SRM IST does not accept CUET score for admission to any of its UG & PG courses. The university conducts its in-house entrance exam for BTech and MTech, i.e., SRM JEE. Further, for admission to MBA course, the university accepts scores of national-level entrance exams such as GMAT, CAT, MAT, TANCE, etc. SRM University also offers direct admission to courses such as BA, MSc, etc., based on the merit of last qualifying exams of previous education.
faqs.question: Does SRM Institute of Science and Technology accept CUET?

faqs.answer: Candidates looking for course admissions must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. For UG courses, candidates must complete Class 12 and for PG courses, students must complete graduation. Candidates must also fill or attach their scorecard at the time of applying for the respective courses. The university provides direct admission to courses such as BA, BCom, MSc, etc., based on merit of Class 12. However, for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, BSc, etc., candidates have to also qualify for the entrance exam accepted for the particular courses.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in SRM University using Class 12 board marks?

faqs.answer: SRM University Chennai cutoff for the MBA course is based XAT/ NMAT/SRMHCAT. The university offers the MBA course through SRM School of Management. As per the previous year cutoff 2022, candidates with XAT and MAT Percentiles of 80 each for the General category All India Quota are eligible for the further round of admissions. faqs.question: What is the MBA cutoff rank required for admission in SRM University Chennai?

faqs.answer: The SRM Institute of Hotel Management (SRM IHM) minimum cutoff for the B.Sc. in Hotel Management varies based on the campus and admission year. But generally speaking, the qualifying exam's minimum cutoff is roughly 50% (10+2 for B.Sc. programs). Note that depending on the level of competition in the year of admission, these are only the minimum cutoffs and may be higher.Since the B.Sc. in Hospitality and Hotel Administration programme requires entrance, the cutoff is higher. Typically, the NCHMCT JEE has a cutoff of about 80% for this program. Tests like aptitude tests, service aptitude tests, and English language tests are conducted in the institution. During the admissions process, SRM IHM takes into consideration the candidate's extracurricular activities and academic record in addition to their NCHMCT JEE score. Even if a candidate's NCHMCT JEE score is just below the cutoff, admissions to the programme are more likely for those with a strong academic record and relevant extracurricular activities.
faqs.question: What is the minimum cutoff for B Sc. at SRM Institute of Hotel Management?

paragraphs: SRM Institute of Technology admissionis a multi-step process. It starts with the release of the application form and concludes with seat allotment. SRM IST admission process can differ from course to course. Aspirants are advised to carefully check the course-specific selection procedure.
Check below the step-wise SRM University admission process:

The applications can be submitted online by visiting the official website atsrmist.edu.in. Students are required to submit a separate application for separate courses. The application fee for each course isINR 1,200.

SRM University accepts various national-level entrance test scores for admissions. It also conducts its own entrance tests, such as SRMJEEL, SRMJEEE and SRMJEEM. Further, the personal interview round is conducted for a few courses. Once all the rounds are completed, it releases an official merit list.

Once selection is done, students are called for the counselling process. In this process, students are allocated a seat in order of their rank and the availability of seats. Those who get a seat are required to participate in document verification process.

courses_data.description: SRM Institute of Science and Technology offers a BCA course at the UG level. It's a full-time course offered by SRM for candidates who have completed Class 12 from a recognised board of education with a minimum of 50% aggregate. To get more details about the BCA programme refer to the table below:

faqs.question: Does SRM University campus offers the BCA course?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Kattanlkulathur campus of SRMIST offers BCA programme. It is a three-year UG course. For admission to the programme, aspirants should have passed Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum of 50% aggregate. In addition, aspirant should have studied either of the mandatory subjects -Mathematics/Business Mathematics/Statistics/Allied Mathematics.The seat allotment is carried out based on merit in the last qualifying examination.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fee for BCA at SRM University Chennai?
faqs.answer: SRMIST Chennai fees has tuition fee, hostel fee, security deposit, etc.The total tuition fee ranges betweenINR 1.3 lakh and INR 3.8 lakh. The fees also includes registration fee of INR 5,000.

faqs.question: How the admission process happens for BCA in SRM Chennai? Is there any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Check the steps below for SRM Chennai admission process for BCA:1: SRMIST BCA Application ProcessCandidates have to apply online for BCA. The application fee for BCA is INR 1,200.2: Shortlisting of StudentsThe applications are further scanned by the authorities.3: Admission ConfirmationThe selected candidates then have to submit important documents for verification and pay the fee for course admisssion. Course commencement and orientation details are provided to the students by the institute.

faqs.question: Is it compulsory to have Maths to pursue BCA from SRM University Chennai?
faqs.answer: Candidates applying based on their Class 12 scores must have Maths or Business Mathematics/Statistics/Allied Mathematics. However, those who wish to apply on their basis of their Diploma in Engineering don't need the same. Candidates must have passed the qualifying exam with the minimum aggregate, i.e., 50%.

faqs.question: Is SRM Kattankulathur costly to study BTech?

courses_data.name: SRM IST MTech Admission 2026

Candidates who have completed graduation can apply for MTech.

faqs.question: How can I join SRM University MTech course?
faqs.answer: The deemed-to-be university accepts GATE score for admission to M.Tech course. However, aspirants who have not qualified GATE can also get admission to M.Tech course by qualifying SRMJEEE (PG) conducted by the university. SRM Institute of Technology Kattankulathur will conduct SRMJEEE in two phases. After the completion of the selection rounds, aspirants need to attend the counselling and document verification round. Only after the payment of course fee, admission is confirmed in the university.

faqs.question: What is the M.Tech fee at SRM Kattankulathur?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fees for SRM IST M.Tech is INR 3.20 Lacs - INR 17.50 lakh. The fee also includes the integrated MBA fees. Candidates need to pay the course fee after completion of all the selection rounds.However, this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: Does SRM Institute of Technology Kattankulathur offer online MBA course?
faqs.answer: Yes, SRM IST Chennai offers an online MBA course. It is a two-year programme divided into four semesters. SRM online MBA admission is done based on CAT/MAT/GMAT/GRE score. The selected candidates are called for personal interview round. To be eligible for the online course, aspirants must hold a valid bachelor's degree with a minimum aggregate. Moreover, the course aspirants with work experience and having qualified in either of the accepted exams are exempted from the university entrance test.

nirf.description:
SRM Institute of Science and Technology has been ranked well by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category. Through the years, the NIRF rankings for SRM Institute of Science and Technology indicate the institute's strong performance in crucial areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's positive reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the NIRF. SRM Institute of Science and Technology's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown an increasing trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 11 ranks to #21 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 6 ranks to #12 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
It is to be noticed that the institute has shown a fluctuating trend in the 'Engineering' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 15 ranks to #13 rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
In the 'Pharmacy' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuation when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2024, SRM Institute of Science and Technology climbed 4 ranks to #11 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.

hostel_campus.college_name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: SRM University has 14 blocks for boys and 7 blocks for girls. All the hostels have hi speed Wi-Fi connectivity and are provided with solar water have heating systems, mineral water supply, water cooler in each floor, generator power supply.Students are offered with healthy and sumptuous food options at highly subsidized rates and can choose to have North Indian or South Indian menu in the dining halls that are co-located. the hostels also offer a multi-cuisine dining facility providing Thai, Chinese and continental food for the benefit of our international students,.Rooms with single cot ,study table & chair, cupboard & common mirror are available. Most hostels have common washrooms, a few blocks are available with attached bath and AC rooms too. Facilities such as gym, prayer halls, games, sports and cultural activities has been facilitated. 3 International hostels with modernized kitchen,library,drinking water, water heater, telephone,power supply, medical care, recreation,stationery shop, laundry point, gym, playground, indoor games, banking facility, a/c dining hall, a/c study hall and one off campus international hostel is also available.
facilities: College Infrastructure: SRM has a well-defined layout in terms of infrastructure. The campus is spread over a large area, with all the basic facilities provided. There are huge grounds and indoor courts for sports; the gymnasium is made for the students of the college. The library is technically advanced and has a good collection of books. The classrooms are well maintained with smart boards installed, and the washrooms are clean. The canteen has diverse varieties of food that are hygienic and affordable.

Academics: CSE has proven to be a good course for me as it aligns with my interests and liking for computers and programming. The course is well updated, and even the curricula followed in college fall in line with the skills required in the job sector. The course has a lot of research and practicality, which definitely makes one job-ready. The teachers are cooperative and experienced, and they mentor each student at every point.

Placements: Approximately 70% of the students get hired in the recruitment drive held by the college. The placement drive is held in the most efficient manner. The average package is around 5 LPA, which is a good kickstart for any student in their respective fields. The college has a placement cell that is responsible for inviting firms to the college and guiding fellow students in getting placed, hence making the college supportive. The placements must be inclusive of all the courses, which is a demerit.

Value-for-money: The annual tuition fee structure was a bit on the expensive side, as my yearly fee was around 3 lacs p/a, which might not be affordable for many students. But the quality of services and education, with all the basic amenities, make SRM worth the investment. Personally, SRM is making each penny count.

Campus Life: Though the college is isolated from the main part of the city, it is glorious from the inside. There are sports activities in the college and many cultural societies, like dance and music societies. Moreover, there are various clubs that keep on participating in educational competitions. Various seminars are held and several festivals are conducted throughout the year, making college life happen. There's a medical room to handle any emergency as and when it arises!

library.description: The university library is fully air conditioned 15 storey building comprises a rich collection of books covering various branches of Engineering and Technology, Medical and Health Sciences and Science and Humanities. The library has stocked 140518 volumes of books consisting of 61289 titles. The collection also includes 1550 handbooks & 200 encyclopedias. Back volume is about 4105.  8235 above project thesis. 781 standards which include BIS, ISA & IEEE. Around 5938 books CDs, 2710 journal CDs, 25 encyclopedia on CDs, 20 self learning tutorials, 850 video programs are available in the library.Cumulative database of nearly 2.52 lakh records covering the period from 1990 - 1999 are available. The library building is fully air-conditioned and automated. Photocopy facility is available in the library.

hostel.description: SRM University has 14 blocks for boys and 7 blocks for girls. All the hostels have hi speed Wi-Fi connectivity and are provided with solar water have heating systems, mineral water supply, water cooler in each floor, generator power supply.Students are offered with healthy and sumptuous food options at highly subsidized rates and can choose to have North Indian or South Indian menu in the dining halls that are co-located. the hostels also offer a multi-cuisine dining facility providing Thai, Chinese and continental food for the benefit of our international students,.Rooms with single cot ,study table & chair, cupboard & common mirror are available. Most hostels have common washrooms, a few blocks are available with attached bath and AC rooms too. Facilities such as gym, prayer halls, games, sports and cultural activities has been facilitated. 3 International hostels with modernized kitchen,library,drinking water, water heater, telephone,power supply, medical care, recreation,stationery shop, laundry point, gym, playground, indoor games, banking facility, a/c dining hall, a/c study hall and one off campus international hostel is also available.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no placement system like engineering colleges.

review_content.Placements: After 12th board from Science background, one have to appear in entrance exam conducted by state medical faculty of west Bengal. You have to secure good score or rank in the exam to get admission in government medical colleges. There are total 13 departments and Radiography is one of them. In my department, there are 35 seats for one year in our departments. Two years Diploma course with 6 month internship, total duration 2.5 years. Only 2000 per month stipend is provided during internship period. After passing out, you have to find your job by yourself. There is no campusing system like engineering. IPGMER is a most popular institution in Bengal, so students of this institution get priority in private hospitals for jobs. The Salaries is not much in this field. There are only 15-20k per month is given in private sector to freshers.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is one of the best colleges in India.

review_content.Placements: Internships are compulsory in our college. The stipend offered is Rs.20,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have two carrom boards and two table tennis boards. It also provides a small playground. Hostel facilities are good, and elevator is also available. Hostel provides facilities like a fire control system, cameras, 24X7 water supply, and a canteen. There is a good security guard as well. The washrooms are clean.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are average in our college. Some of them use powerpoint presentations to teach properly. Our course curriculum is old. MCI syllabus is good for our juniors. The semester exams are not good. There should be more practical intelligence-based questions than outdated questions.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Perfusion Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely right college for Medical. Really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: No placement records are required for a medical background. Everything is dependent on your ability. As you are aware, it is one of the best hospitals in the world. If you're going to an interview and you're from the Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research, this will be great for you.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are top medical faculty members at the Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research. You can connect to free Wi-Fi. Each and every department has its own laboratory. There is central library. There is good food and a mess available.

overview_faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research is around INR 8000 - INR 120050.

overview_faqs.question: Is Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research is a well-known institution for PG Diploma, UG Diploma, B.Sc, BPT, M.Sc, MD, MS, DM, M.Ch, MBBS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research has a rating of 4.72 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.89 on Campus Life, 4.43 on Placements, 4.66 on Faculty and 4.67 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: IPGMER Kolkata Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Perfusion Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Perfusion technology in IPGME&R and SSKMH - A beautiful journey .

content.Placements: All the students from our course were placed. 15k per month was the lowest package, and 30k per month with lodging and food was the highest. Students were recruited at reputed institutes like R.N. Tagore, CMRI, and Apollo Hospital, where cardiac surgery is performed. All students get to do an internship at the college and get approximately 10k per month as a stipend during the internship. Though you get a degree as a perfusionist, you can also be offered roles like critical care technologist and operation theatre technologist.
content.Infrastructure: We have a well-equipped lecture theatre with projectors, computers, AC, green boards, speakers, and microphones. There is also a dissection hall and other practical rooms where you can gain experience in your practical work. You also get to work in a real cardiac ICU and OT. You get great exposure. There are four canteens and many other fast-food stores on campus. We have fields where you can play cricket, soccer, or badminton. A gym is also available. There is a central library, and we also have an in-department library. However, a hostel is not offered for our course.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 100% students get placement after completing. The lowest package is 480000 per year (monthly 40000). The highest package is 70,000 per month (if you apply for a medical officer). Income may vary. The internship is offered by the college and mandatory to get a degree. Internship duration is 12 months. Payment during internship: 32000 per month. Roles offered are housestaffship, medical officer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Library: for access of medical students, free, adjacent student study room. Classrooms: air conditioning, use of projectors, etc. Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus and in the library. Hostel rooms are decent, Wi-Fi, gym facilities, etc. Food quality is really good and there is more than one canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Radiography - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no placement system like engineering colleges.

content.Placements: After 12th board from Science background, one have to appear in entrance exam conducted by state medical faculty of west Bengal. You have to secure good score or rank in the exam to get admission in government medical colleges. There are total 13 departments and Radiography is one of them. In my department, there are 35 seats for one year in our departments. Two years Diploma course with 6 month internship, total duration 2.5 years. Only 2000 per month stipend is provided during internship period. After passing out, you have to find your job by yourself. There is no campusing system like engineering. IPGMER is a most popular institution in Bengal, so students of this institution get priority in private hospitals for jobs. The Salaries is not much in this field. There are only 15-20k per month is given in private sector to freshers.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges in India.

content.Placements: Internships are compulsory in our college. The stipend offered is Rs.20,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: We have two carrom boards and two table tennis boards. It also provides a small playground. Hostel facilities are good, and elevator is also available. Hostel provides facilities like a fire control system, cameras, 24X7 water supply, and a canteen. There is a good security guard as well. The washrooms are clean.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are average in our college. Some of them use powerpoint presentations to teach properly. Our course curriculum is old. MCI syllabus is good for our juniors. The semester exams are not good. There should be more practical intelligence-based questions than outdated questions.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Perfusion Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely right college for Medical. Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: No placement records are required for a medical background. Everything is dependent on your ability. As you are aware, it is one of the best hospitals in the world. If you're going to an interview and you're from the Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research, this will be great for you.
content.Infrastructure: There are top medical faculty members at the Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research. You can connect to free Wi-Fi. Each and every department has its own laboratory. There is central library. There is good food and a mess available.

admission_process.title: Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Researchoffers courses at UG, PG and Advanced Masters levels. Some of the courses include BPT, MBBS, MD and M.Sc. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 30,000 - 50,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 66 months - 3 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years - 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
Library: for access of medical students, free, adjacent student study room. Classrooms: air conditioning, use of projectors, etc.
Wi-Fi facilities are available on campus and in the library. Hostel rooms are decent, Wi-Fi, gym facilities, etc.
Food quality is really good and there is more than one canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no placement system like engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: There is not any hostel provided to Diploma students. If you are doing B.Sc.  course, then you will get hostels. Besides we can use other facilities like canteen, play ground, library etc. There is free Wi-Fi available in our departments. Food in canteen is pretty good. One can play outdoor games as well with indoors.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: We have two carrom boards and two table tennis boards. It also provides a small playground. Hostel facilities are good, and elevator is also available. Hostel provides facilities like a fire control system, cameras,  24X7 water supply, and a canteen. There is a good security guard as well. The washrooms are clean.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely right college for Medical. Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are top medical faculty members at the Institute of Post Graduate Medical Education and Research. You can connect to free Wi-Fi. Each and every department has its own laboratory. There is central library. There is good food and a mess available.

reviews.review_heading: IPGME&R is a professional career building platform.
reviews.review_text: The college is government-aided, so all the facilities and infrastructure required for the MBBS course are offered almost for free. Wi-Fi and well-oriented and good classrooms are available for students. Laboratories are available for each department. A large and accessible central library is present in my college. Our college authority provides us with well-oriented, neat and clean hostel for students who reside far from the campus. Our hostel is very nice, comfortable and accessible for studen...

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college. We have a good location, campus and food.
reviews.review_text: Our college has air-conditioners, a library, and classrooms. We have good food at the canteen, Rs. 45 per meal. Our class timings are from 9 am to 4 pm, and the library timings are from 10 am to 12 am. There is no Wi-Fi in the classroom and library. There are 2 boys per room and 3 to 4 girls per room in our hostel. There are 4 bathrooms for every 20 students.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges in India.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good, may be within the top 10 among all medical colleges in India. Hostel facilities are also good including free Wi-Fi, library, classrooms, etc. The food in our canteen is good, not excellent but value for money.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: In this college, Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. The laboratories are rich and well decorated. The classrooms are good to take classes with modern equipments, so it is very comfortable for a student to attend classes with projector mode, having a structure to take online classes. It also has many libraries, and our undergraduate library is very much comfortable for students and also rich in many books.

reviews.review_heading: It is the medical college of India producing excellent doctors.
reviews.review_text: This college is clean, and the laboratories are provided. The classrooms are clean and have an air-conditioner. Libraries and gyms are also provided in this college. The hostel has Wi-Fi of 2 Mbps of speed. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are also available. The sports and games are played in the playground.

reviews.review_heading: It is a wonderful institute.
reviews.review_text: There are air-conditioned lecture theatres and a library. The campus also has a free Wi-Fi connection. There is also a large college ground for sports, and gyms are also available for students. There are canteens in all hostel buildings which provide good food at reasonable prices.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied because of the faculty, facilities, and less expenditure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facilities are available. Labs are pretty well-equipped to carry out experiments. Lecture halls, which have a capacity of more than 200 students, with air-conditioners, projector, and whiteboards. Library has a good collection of books. Hostel is also good. Boys and girls have different hostels in MBBS. The quality of food available in canteens is also good. Sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: IPGME&R has high facilities and is a great place to get medical education and treatment.
reviews.review_text: Our college has many modern facilities. Labs have modern instruments which serve a huge range of activities such as tests and experiments in order to conduct research. Tests like X-rays, MRI and CT scans are done with highly advanced instruments. Our college is now declared as the centre of excellence. Classes are held in lecture theatres which are fully air-conditioned and have sufficient capacity. Lecture theatres have projectors to conduct E-classes, and speakers are also available. There is ...

reviews.review_heading: IPGMER is a premier medical institute in India.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a huge number of well maintained, mordernised and clean lecture theatres with abundant and proper seating capacity. The rooms are air-conditioned and equipped with projectors and a speaker system. In UCM building and the academic building, most of the theory classes are conducted. They are properly well maintained and have security on the ground floor. There is even a book store at the bottom of the UCM building. There are around 6-7 canteens on the campus, and all of them offer ...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college, students can take admission.
reviews.review_text: Our college has all facilities for the students. It has Wi-Fi enabled campus. It also has an e-library, teleconsultation room, morgue, etc. The hostel is built with floor tiles and with good qualities supplies fitted. We have many canteens, and if students do not like food then they can choose another food.

faqs.answer: A:    Central University of Punjab offered decent placements for its postgraduate-level course. As per the NIRF report released by the University, the average package offered for the MBA course is INR 4 LPA. Rise of over 29% was witnessed in the PG 2-year median package offered in 2023 as compared with 2022. There was a rise of over 3% in the median package offered during Pharmacy placements 2023 as compared with 2022.

faqs.answer: A:    Hi dear students.The Central University of Punjab (CUP) accepts the CUCET entrance test scores for admission to its MBA program. The university also accepts CUET-PG scores for admission to its MBA and PGDM programs. The university admits students to its MBA programme once a year. Admission is based on the CUCET entrance test results, followed by CUP counseling. The university offers only Masters and PhD programs. Admission to most of its PG courses is based on the CUCET entrance exam. CUCET Exam score followed by a round of personal interview are the basis of admission to postgraduate courses including MA, M.Sc., M. Ed., M.Com, LLM, MBA. Candidates must produce a score of GATE exam followed by counselling process.I hope it's helpful for you, thank you.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Geology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: My days at Central University of Punjab.

review_content.Placements: Placements are something that is lacking in the CUP. There are only few departments that are offering placements and all others don't have any placements. Most of the private companies are associated with the placement cell of CUP and still it needs improvement. There are no placements for the department of Geology.
review_content.Infrastructure: Course is good and the facility is also good. The labs are well maintained and Wi-Fi is somehow very bad. Library is open till 2:00 AM, and has a lot of security throughout your way back to the hostel. Mess and canteen are good and food is also good. It has a medical center with an ambulance facility. There are snakes during the summer and its a treat.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Geology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'm not that much satisfied with my university because the academics are quite good.

review_content.Placements: Very average on placement, the packages are offered around 20,000 - 40,000 INR. Mainly mines and quarries are recruiting. 60-70% of students are getting internships, and the syllabus is very good for the students who want to get a good job, you have to consider this.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a very good facility in the hostel, especially the washrooms, which are very clean and well-maintained, so it’s not a problem for us. The reading room is there for us, and it’s very nice and quiet. The hostel has a very good environment for studying, and that will definitely help us.

review_summary.college_name: Central University of Punjab Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biochemistry - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, having all types of accommodation related to students.

content.Placements: At least 25% of students get placed, and the highest package is 8 LPA along with HRA. Around 75% of students get internships at different institutions in India. Roles offered in our course are assistant professor, biochemistry analyst, industrial work, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The laboratory facilities are good, along with different kinds of instruments for work. The campus is well established with AC, Wi-Fi, electricity, and also has library access till 2 AM at night. Hostel accommodation is good with all facilities like a bed, an almirah, a table, and a chair. Mess is also good.

individual_reviews.course: M.A. in English - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is the best university for the M.A. in English course.

content.Placements: English placements were fairly good. No positions were available in Chemistry, Physics, or any other field. The average starting wage was between 10 LPA and 12 LPA, the minimum was between 2 LPA and 5 LPA, and the maximum was over 15 LPA. Students were losing good agreement after passing the third quarter M.A. with a score of over 92%. Higher-level positions included teacher, secretary, and so forth.
content.Infrastructure: Students could use the Wi-Fi offered on campus. The lab workers were actively involved in maintaining labs. Air conditioning and frequent maintenance were features of classrooms. It was a big library with lots of books. The hostel's cuisine was really clean and hygienic. It was easy to go to the hospital. Playing games and sports was strongly recommended.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Geology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My days at Central University of Punjab.

content.Placements: Placements are something that is lacking in the CUP. There are only few departments that are offering placements and all others don't have any placements. Most of the private companies are associated with the placement cell of CUP and still it needs improvement. There are no placements for the department of Geology.
content.Infrastructure: Course is good and the facility is also good. The labs are well maintained and Wi-Fi is somehow very bad. Library is open till 2:00 AM, and has a lot of security throughout your way back to the hostel. Mess and canteen are good and food is also good. It has a medical center with an ambulance facility. There are snakes during the summer and its a treat.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Geology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I'm not that much satisfied with my university because the academics are quite good.

content.Placements: Very average on placement, the packages are offered around 20,000 - 40,000 INR. Mainly mines and quarries are recruiting. 60-70% of students are getting internships, and the syllabus is very good for the students who want to get a good job, you have to consider this.
content.Infrastructure: There is a very good facility in the hostel, especially the washrooms, which are very clean and well-maintained, so it’s not a problem for us. The reading room is there for us, and it’s very nice and quiet. The hostel has a very good environment for studying, and that will definitely help us.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best University for an M.Sc. in Mathematics Course.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of the students got placed in the college. Half of the students chose to pursue their Masters. The college offered a lot of work. Several companies like Goldman Sachs, JP Morgan, Google, and some other IT companies visited the university for recruitment. The average salary was about Rs. 15 LPA. 66% of students get employment opportunities. The top roles offered are Statistician, Actuary, and more.
content.Infrastructure: The resources are the best, with well-spaced classrooms. The library is also good. Some of the departments do not have Wi-Fi, and the laboratories are good enough to keep up with both practical and theoretical information. There are many games and sports available, such as judo, wrestling, table tennis, chess, badminton, volleyball, basketball, soccer, cricket, kabaddi, cross country, and cycling.

admission_process.title: Central University of Punjab Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: CUPB offers postgraduate courses in a full-time mode in streams such as Arts, Management, Commerce, Science, Law and many more. For all PG programmes, candidates need to clearCUCETwhich is followed by a counselling process.CUPB admission to all the programmes is solely done on the basis of merit obtained inthe Central Universities Common Entrance Test(CUET), followed by counselling. The application process is only online, and no candidature is considered without a valid score in the entrance examination. Candidates need to register and check the CUET website for regular updates.At the time of admission, all candidates need to submit a medical fitness certificate to certify that they are fit to pursue higher studies.

There are many PG courses at CUPB which do not offer any specialisations. The final selection for these courses is also entrance-based. The table below mentions the courses along with the basic eligibility:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
Bachelor's degree in Commerce with 55% aggregate from a recognised university
CUET + Counseling
MBA in Agribusiness
Bachelor’s degree in Agriculture Sciences or related subjects with 55% aggregate from a recognised university
CUET + Counseling

CUET + Counseling
B.P.Ed/ BSc Health and Physical Education with 55% aggregate from a recognised university
CUET + Counseling
Bachelor’s degree in any stream with 55% aggregate from a recognised university
CUET + Counseling
Bachelor’s degree in any discipline with performing arts as one of the subjects and secured atleast 55% aggregate from a recognised university
CUET + Counseling
Bachelor’s degree in law with 55% aggregate from a recognised university
CUET + Counseling

Central University of Punjab (CUPB)is a full-time postgraduate university that provides postgraduate courses in various streams likeArts, Management, Commerce and Scienceand many more. All PG programmes are entrance based throughCUETand then a counselling process. Application is entirelyonline,and only applicants with a valid CUET score will be considered. Students should also provide amedical fitness certificateat the time of admission to ensure they qualify to undertake higher studies.

Step 1: CUPB Application Process 2025Applications should be made online via theCUET site. They are required to complete the application form and attach the documents required as well as pay the application fee. TheCUET portalprovides regular updates and notifications about the entrance exam, which a candidate should check regularly.

Step 2: Entrance Exam (CUET)All PG programmes at CUPB are admitted based on theCentral Universities Common Entrance Test (CUET). This exam is required of all applicants in order to be eligible to take subsequent rounds of admission.

Step 3: Counselling and the Document CheckThose shortlisted are invited tocounsellingaccording to their CUET scores. Students during counselling need to submit all original documents so that they can be verified, such as themedical fitness certificate. After successful verification and payment of the admission fee, the final seat allotment is done.

CUPB course fee varies with the choice of programme. At the time of admission, the fee charged from the students includes tuition fee, examination fee, laboratory fee, sports fee, computer and internet fee and many other components. The table below mentions the sum total of all the components to be paid by the students:
MA/ MCom/ LLM/ MPA
M.Ed/ M.P.Ed
MSc/ MTech CST/ M.Lib.I.Sc
MPharm/ MTech CST
MBA Agribusiness

faqs.question: How can I get direct admission in Central University of Punjab?
faqs.answer: There are two ways to get direct admission in Central University of Punjab for the academic session 2023-24:For PG and short term programs you can apply for the open/ direct admission for vacant seat by filling the online registration form and paying the admission fees online. You can check the provisional selection list for various programs on the university website.For PhD programme in department of computer Science and technology under vishvesvarya PhD scheme, you can check the provisional result of admission to the university website and follow the instruction given there.You can also refer to the prospectus and advertisement for admission to certificate/ PG Diploma courses for academic session 2023-24 on the university website for more details.

faqs.question: Can I join Central University of Punjab without CUET PG?
faqs.answer: You cannot join the Central University of Punjab without appearing for the central university's common test CUCET for PG courses the eligibility criteria for PG courses at the Central University of Punjab require a valid score on CUCET and graduation with merit. The admission process for PG courses is based on CUCET followed by and interview. You can find more details about the admission criteria and the application form on the official website of Central University of Punjab.

paragraphs: As per the NIRF report released by Central University of Punjab, the median package offered during PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA . Further, the median package offered during Central University of Punjab LLM placements 2023 stood at INR 6 LPA . For the Pharmacy department , the median package offered during Central University of Punjab placements 2023 was INR 3.47 LPA .

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Central University of Punjab?
faqs.answer: The Central University of Punjab has a decent placement record with around 70%-90% of students getting placed every year. In 2020, 112 students were placed in the Central University of Punjab and No. Of the students who opted for higher studies at the Central University of Punjab is 120. Central University of Punjab the highest package is 10-11 LPA approximately and the average package is 4 LPA.

faqs.question: How are M.Tech placements at Central University of Punjab?
faqs.answer: The Central University of Punjab has good placements for M.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE). The university places around 70–90 percent of students each year. The average salary package is 8 LPA, with the highest being 24 LPA and the lowest being 4 LPA. the university's placement rating is 5.7/10. However, one Quora user says that the university doesn't have a placement cell. Here are some other information:- The university's placements are better than other colleges in North India. The university encourages students to become self-sufficient. In 2020, 112 students were placed, and 120 students chose to pursue higher studies. About the University:- University is accredited 'A+' grade in 2023 in second accreditation cycle by NAAC and has secured 95th, 87th and 84th, 81st rank in the year 2019, 2020, 2021 and 2022 respectively in the University category of NIRF.

nirf.description:
As per the overall score, Central University of Punjab has been placed at a good position by the NIRF under the 'Overall' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Overall' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Central University of Punjab's rank is #101, the same as last year's rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
One can observe that within the category of 'University', the institute's ranking has scaled up when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2025, Central University of Punjab climbed 6 ranks to #77 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.
The institute's ranks in the 'Pharmacy' category; have shown a fluctuation when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Central University of Punjab climbed 3 ranks to #20 rank in the 'Pharmacy' category by the NIRF ranking.

hostel_campus.college_name: Central University of Punjab Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
The University has 5 Girls’ hostels and 5 Boys’ hostels. The facilities provided in the hostels are: free Wi-Fi, bed, Mattresses, Study Table, Chair, Almirah, 24x7 Water and Electricity supply, Housekeeping facility, Hygienic food, separate Reading Room in every Hostel, Common Room with TV facility. 
Air-conditioned reading room facility for the students is available close to Boys’ and Girls’ Hostels. This facility is open round the clock.

library.description: University library presently has over 37,828 titles and subscribes to 71 international and national print journals. the University Library subscribes to a large number of electronic journals through the e-ShodhSindhu Consortium and independently apart from subscribing to 7242 full text online journals  through the e-ShodhSindhu Consortium and independently, with access to American Chemical Society, American Physical Society, Annual Reviews, JSTOR, Oxford University Press, Project Muse, Sage, Springer Link, Taylor & Francis, Wiley-Blackwell etc. The University Library has access to all important full text data base including Indiastat.com, DELNET Online, ISID (The Institute for Studies in Industrial Development), JCCC (J-Gate Custom Content for Consortium), Manuparta, Web of Science etc.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Squash Court, Hockey Ground, Indoor Table Tennis Court
