reviews.review_heading: The college is good, having all types of accommodation related to students.
reviews.review_text: The laboratory facilities are good, along with different kinds of instruments for work. The campus is well established with AC, Wi-Fi, electricity, and also has library access till 2 AM at night. Hostel accommodation is good with all facilities like a bed, an almirah, a table, and a chair. Mess is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is the best university for the M.A. in English course.
reviews.review_text: Students could use the Wi-Fi offered on campus. The lab workers were actively involved in maintaining labs. Air conditioning and frequent maintenance were features of classrooms. It was a big library with lots of books. The hostel's cuisine was really clean and hygienic. It was easy to go to the hospital. Playing games and sports was strongly recommended.

reviews.review_heading: My days at Central University of Punjab.
reviews.review_text: Course is good and the facility is also good. The labs are well maintained and Wi-Fi is somehow very bad. Library is open till 2:00 AM, and has a lot of security throughout your way back to the hostel. Mess and canteen are good and food is also good. It has a medical center with an ambulance facility. There are snakes during the summer and its a treat.

reviews.review_heading: I'm not that much satisfied with my university because the academics are quite good.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good facility in the hostel, especially the washrooms, which are very clean and well-maintained, so it’s not a problem for us. The reading room is there for us, and it’s very nice and quiet. The hostel has a very good environment for studying, and that will definitely help us.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best University for an M.Sc. in Mathematics Course.
reviews.review_text: The resources are the best, with well-spaced classrooms. The library is also good. Some of the departments do not have Wi-Fi, and the laboratories are good enough to keep up with both practical and theoretical information. There are many games and sports available, such as judo, wrestling, table tennis, chess, badminton, volleyball, basketball, soccer, cricket, kabaddi, cross country, and cycling.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best University for M.Sc. In Chemistry Course.
reviews.review_text: The university has a good infrastructure for courses. The classrooms are equipped with mixed technology, and there are large computer labs with software licenses. The two-story library has some good books but is lacking in textbooks. The hostel is well located inside the campus, but only the two top students in each batch can stay there. The food is good, but the menu is pretty much the same every week.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best University for M.A. in English Course.
reviews.review_text: The university provides a good amount of practical expertise. Classrooms are outfitted with modern amenities to help you generate new ideas and express yourself. There is complete freedom to express your opinions and ideas. The library has sophisticated facilities. The staff is extremely helpful and caring.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the best university for M.Sc. in geography course.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is located distant from the city, especially in Punjab. Every campus has Wi-Fi. The infrastructure of the college is very interesting. The hostel on campus is open to both boys and girls. These include classrooms, libraries, and hallways. The hotel amenities are excellent, however, the food served to students is super. Students can also access medical and sports amenities here.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best University for M.A. in History Course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was adequate for the history course. The college provided adequate laboratory facilities for students to gain practical experience. The pupils were given access to all required amenities, including a canteen, Wi-Fi, library, hostel, sports, and medical care. All of these facilities were of high quality at CU Punjab.

reviews.review_heading: It's a developing college, has good infrastructure, but there are not many fests.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure sector are very well covered in the Central University of Punjab. The campus and hostels have good Wi-Fi coverage. The classes and labs have all the required technology available, including items like 3D printers. The food in the mess is fine.

reviews.review_heading: It is a new developing college, as many buildings are under construction.
reviews.review_text: There are sufficient labs and classrooms where classes are conducted using the best technologies. Moreover, every classroom and lab has projectors, smart boards, and whiteboards for better role-play. The quality of food in the mess is average, but the canteen outside the academic block, named Suraj Bhaiya’s canteen, has the best snacks in the area. There are many cafeterias outside the campus and 2-3 stalls of Amul, Verka, and Nescafe.

reviews.review_heading: CUPB has very good infrastructure and well-educated faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good infrastructure. There are well-furnished libraries with a great collection of books in a huge quantity. Labs are well-designed for students and Ph.D. scholars. Classrooms are in digital mode. They are fully air-conditioned. Wi-Fi is good in hostels as well as in academic areas. CCTV cameras are available in the campus area.

reviews.review_heading: CUPB is excellent and perfect.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is perfect. We have Wi-Fi available in every building. We have labs for subjects like Chemistry and other science disciplines. Classrooms are fully air-conditioned. Library is stocked with various books by different authors. Hostel is also very good. The quality of food is average. We have canteen and medical facilities, with doctor available 24/7. There is a playground where we play football.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with academics.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and hostel are improving. This university is a new university, just started in 2009, so the infrastructure is still improving. A new library and classrooms are there, and the hostel facilities and mess are good enough. The cleanliness and all are really good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, placements not good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and the hostel facilities are very average. The rooms are shared between four people of different departments. The washroom facilities are also decent; workers clean them at least once every day. Food in the mess is like your regular home-cooked food, but the canteens are not available here near the hostel. You have to walk a lot to get basic groceries also.

highlights.summary:
NIRF 2025 Rankings are out. As per the latest NIRF 2025 rankings, Maulana Azad Medical College ranks #26 under the category 'Medical'.

The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

MDS, MBBS, MS, MD and PG Diploma

college_info.intro:
MAMC offers MBBS as its flagship programme. MBBS is offered for a duration of 5.5 years. The aforementioned duration also includes one year of compulsory internship. During the internship period, students are given practical training to become successful health practitioners. The internship period also includes ward posting. After the successful completion of the MBBS programme, students can either pursue higher education, such as MD, MS, etc., or start their practice.
MAMC offers internships at its attached hospital, namely Maulana Azad Medical College Hospital. Overall, with a degree in Medical Sciences, students can become an Academic Researcher, Clinical Research Associate, among others. Below mentioned are some of the MAMC courses and their respective eligibility and MAMC fees:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved

faqs.answer: A:    Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi, has good placements. The college has a placement rate of almost 100%. The average package is not less than INR 85,000 per month in Delhi and can go up to INR 1 Lacs or INR 2 Lacs per month after an undergraduate degree. The highest salary package offered was approximately INR 80 LPA. The college is highly ranked and prestigious, is recognised by the Medical Council of India (MCI), and is affiliated with Delhi University.
faqs.question: Does Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi have good placements?

faqs.answer: A:    No, Maulana Azad Medical College does not offers internship to MDS students. Internships are only offered to final year MBBS students at the college.
faqs.question: Does Maulana Azad Medical College offer internship to MDS students?

faqs.answer: A:    Maulana Azad Medical College offers an in-house internship programme that is mandatory for all final year MBBS students. Students after passing the final MBBS examination must register themselves provisionally with the Delhi Medical Council before they can be permitted to join the compulsory internship programme, as required under Medical Council Act.
faqs.question: What are the internship details for MBBS programme at Maulana Azad Medical College?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Maulana Azad Medical College offers an in-house internship programme that is mandatory for all final year MBBS students. Students after passing the final MBBS examination must register themselves provisionally with the Delhi Medical Council before they can be permitted to join the compulsory internship programme, as required under Medical Council Act.
faqs.question: Is there any internship offered to MBBS students by Maulana Azad Medical College?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Maulana Azad Medical College offers numerous UG, PG, Super Speciality, and PhD courses to students. At the UG level, the institute offers BSc and MBBS programmes to students. At the PG level, MAMC offers MSc, MD, MS, and other courses. Candidates willing to take part in the MAMC admission process must apply before the last date of application. Candidates must know their MAMC eligibility criteria before applying online. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the institute and their respective eligibility and MAMC MBBS fees and other course fees:

faqs.answer: A:    According to the official portal, MAMC does follow a seat reservation policy in accordance with Delhi University guidelines. While seat reservation details for PG programmes are unavailable, Maulana Azad Medical College reserves seats in UG programme in the following way:·      15% of total seats are filled in through the entrance examination conducted by the C.B.S.E. on All India basis.·      85% of total seats are filled in through the Delhi University Norms.·      6 seats are reserved for Government of India nominees.
faqs.question: Is there any seat reservation policy followed by Maulana Azad Medical College?

faqs.answer: A:    The entrance exams accepted by MAMC Delhi are as follows: NEETNEET SSNEET PGCandidates wishing to get a seat in any of the programme at MAMC Delhi are required to participate in the admission process by appearing for the required entrance. Candidates are shortlisted based on their performance in the entrance.
faqs.question: Which entrance exams are accepted by MAMC Delhi?

faqs.answer: A:    To get into Maulana Azad Medical College through NEET PG, the 10th and 12th percentiles do not matter. The required eligibility for appearing in the NEET PG examination is given below: Candidates who wish to apply for the exam or who wish to participate in the counselling process must check the eligibility criteria before applying for it. NBE releases NEET PG eligibility criteria along with the information brochure. NEET PG eligibility criteria have been summarised below:Aspirants must possess an MBBS degree/provisional Pass Certificate which is recognised as per the provisions of the Indian Medical Council Act 1956 They should also possess a permanent/ provisional registration certificate of MBBS qualification issued by the Medical Council of India or State Medical Council
faqs.question: Can I get admission to Maulana Azad Medical College if I have scored just 70% in 10th and 87% in 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    The hostel fee at Maulana Azad Medical College is as follows:·      Single Seater: INR 6000/ year·      Double Seater: INR 3600/yearAdditional charges like security deposit, mess fees, fine etc. are enlisted on the official website of the college and student are advised to check the same.

review_content.Placements: There is a compulsory 1-year internship at the LNJP Hospital after completing your MBBS. You will be getting around 25,000 per month. After that, one can give various entrance exams to pursue a PG seat. While doing PG, you will get around 1,15,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is bad, especially the washrooms. But at the same time, the labs, library, and lecture theatres are well maintained. There are a total of 7 places to eat in MAMC, out of which the best one is the JOSHI mess of MAMC in OBH. MAMC has a ground, volleyball, badminton, and basketball courts, and cricket nets.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I love my college and you will also if you wanna be a doctor, Absolutely satisfied with my college.

review_content.Placements: So there is an exam called NEET UG' and out of 2.5M students only 250 get admission to MAMC Delhi, competition is very tough, If I talk about the package here on average as an MBBS graduate my institute pays around 80 thousand to all graduates, There are many hospitals seeking graduates from MAMC so placement is very good, Every student gets internship of around 1 year which is necessary and a part of cbme curriculum. Every super specialist course in medicine is offered by my institute.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of everything is top rated but the IG hostels are quite old, MAMC has been stabilized for decades, the Library is open all time, a large chunk of books are available for students, Full AC library, Full AC classroom, Full AC labs, every office is air having conditioned, All the sports are available in MAMC.

review_summary.college_name: MAMC Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Hostels are the worst part of our college.

content.Placements: In MBBS, there is nothing like a placement, but we do get a stipend of around Rs. 28,000, and after doing MBBS, if you land up in PG, then you can expect 1.2 LPA. It all depends on your efforts because the branch you will be pursuing will depend on your PG rank.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are not that nice, and bathrooms are genuinely hygienic, so I would rate them 3 stars. The room depends on the individual who is living in it because you can modify your room and keep it clean, and sports facilities are nice enough, but not on par with other colleges.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: MAMC - Where you meet your love for medicine.

content.Placements: MAMC is not an engineering college. There are no such packages offered. Every student (100%) is given a chance to work as an intern in Delhi government's largest LNH Hospital and is paid as per the government norms on a monthly basis after their final year.
content.Infrastructure: Being a very old college, it lacks infrastructure but the college buildings are renovated from time to time and equipped with the latest technologies and laboratories. Classrooms are well-maintained and fully air-conditioned. Hostels lack accommodation capacity for all students but there has been a recent announcement of new hostel building on the campus by the government, ensuring accommodation for 4,000 students and doctors. We have sports clubs and grounds in the hostel. Nearly 10 messes and canteens operate on the campus and provide good enough food. The big hospital LNH and GB Plant are within the campus itself.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: By joining MAMC, you will have a thick skin.

content.Placements: There is a compulsory 1-year internship at the LNJP Hospital after completing your MBBS. You will be getting around 25,000 per month. After that, one can give various entrance exams to pursue a PG seat. While doing PG, you will get around 1,15,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is bad, especially the washrooms. But at the same time, the labs, library, and lecture theatres are well maintained. There are a total of 7 places to eat in MAMC, out of which the best one is the JOSHI mess of MAMC in OBH. MAMC has a ground, volleyball, badminton, and basketball courts, and cricket nets.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I love my college and you will also if you wanna be a doctor, Absolutely satisfied with my college.

content.Placements: So there is an exam called NEET UG' and out of 2.5M students only 250 get admission to MAMC Delhi, competition is very tough, If I talk about the package here on average as an MBBS graduate my institute pays around 80 thousand to all graduates, There are many hospitals seeking graduates from MAMC so placement is very good, Every student gets internship of around 1 year which is necessary and a part of cbme curriculum. Every super specialist course in medicine is offered by my institute.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of everything is top rated but the IG hostels are quite old, MAMC has been stabilized for decades, the Library is open all time, a large chunk of books are available for students, Full AC library, Full AC classroom, Full AC labs, every office is air having conditioned, All the sports are available in MAMC.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges for MBBS.

content.Placements: In medical college, placements do not occur. After completing the 4.5-year MBBS course, there is a mandatory 1-year internship placed by the college in its associated hospital, where you learn clinical skills and the practical application of medical science.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is nice. The campus has a healthy environment. Lecture theatres are well-equipped and fully air-conditioned. The library has a central hall and is open 24/7. However, due to being one of the oldest college buildings, the latest books are not available. Hostels are separate for boys and girls. The boys' hostel is open 24 hours with no time restrictions, but the girls' hostel has time limitations. The hostel buildings are old, and sometimes hygiene is not proper.

admission_process.title: Maulana Azad Medical College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Maulana Azad Medical College admission process 2025 is conducted by Faculty of Medical Science, Delhi University. UG programme has a seat intake of 250 seats each year while PG programme has a seat intake of 153 students. Each of these seats are filled on merit basis with reference to NEET UG scores for MBBS and NEET PG/MDS scores for PG courses.
Check below the detailed step wise explanation of Maulana Azad Medical College admission process:
Step 1: Application

Candidates have to first register on the official portal of Faculty of Medical Sciences. After registration, they have to apply online for the specific programme and the required entrance exam. Candidates must also pay the required application fee.
Step 2: Selection

Maulana Azad Medical College gives admission to candidates based on their respective entrance exam scores. Candidates are required to check the selection criteria of preferred course to find out which entrance they are required to appear for. Candidates must provide authentic data related to their academics in the application form.
Step 3: Final Offer

Candidates who make it to the final shortlist of the admission process are offered a seat in the course for which they have been shortlisted for. Candidates are then required to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the college.
Step 4: Document submission

Students are required to submit the below given document copies to the Registrar at the college. The notification regarding the same is updated on the official website of Maulana Azad Medical College. Check below the list of required documents:

Maulana Azad Medical College fees 2025 for all programmes at range from INR 460 to39,000 annually. The annual total fee charged by the college, however is a summation of additional charges along with the annual tuition fee. Additional charges include library, laboratory, university enrollment, medical examination fee etc.

courses_data.description: MBBS offered by Maulana Azad Medical College is a five and a half year course in full time mode with a total annual intake of 250 seats. The following seat reservation is followed by the college: The college also offers an in house internship programme that is mandatory for all final year MBBS students. Students after passing the final MBBS examination must register themselves provisionally with the Delhi Medical Council before they can be permitted to join the compulsory internship programme, as required under Medical Council Act. The minimum eligibility for the course is scoring 60% aggregate marks in Class 12 with PCB stream. Admission to MBBS course at Maulana Azad Medical College is merit based, with college accepting NEET UG scores. No other entrance exams are conducted by the college for admission to this course. Interns are entitled to avail 12 days leave during the period of internship. No other type of leave (including leave on medical grounds) is permissible.

faqs.question: Is there any internship offered to MBBS students by Maulana Azad Medical College?
faqs.answer: Yes, Maulana Azad Medical College offers an in-house internship programme that is mandatory for all final year MBBS students. placement_report.college_name: MAMC Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Maulana Azad Medical College Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: Maulana Azad Medical College placement report 2023 is not released. However, according to MAMC Delhi NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Maulana Azad Medical College PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2022 stood at INR 89,757 per annum. Further, the placement rate recorded during Maulana Azad Medical College PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2022 was 100%.

faqs.question: What is the highest package offered at Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi?
faqs.answer: The highest package offered at Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi is approximately INR 80 LPA (80 Lacs per annum). The average package is not less than INR 85,000 per month in Delhi and can go up to INR 1 Lacs or INR 2 Lakhs per month after an undergraduate degree. Further, the placement rate recorded during Maulana Azad Medical College PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements in 2022 was 100 percent.

faqs.question: Does Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi have good placements?
faqs.answer: Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi, has good placements. The college has a placement rate of almost 100%. The average package is not less than INR 85,000 per month in Delhi and can go up to INR 1 Lacs or INR 2 Lacs per month after an undergraduate degree. The highest salary package offered was approximately INR 80 LPA. The college is highly ranked and prestigious, is recognised by the Medical Council of India (MCI), and is affiliated with Delhi University.

faqs.question: What is the average package for BDS students at Maulana Azad Medical College?
faqs.answer: The average package for BDS students at Maulana Azad Medical College is INR 14.15 LPA. This rate compares favorably to other dental colleges in Delhi, indicating strong placement opportunities for students graduating from Maulana Azad Medical College. The average cost for studying at Maulana Azad Medical College is very less so the ROI is really good but it's also not easy to get admission at Maulana Azad Medical College. The BDS course at MAIDS is a full-time program lasting 5 years, including a compulsory one-year internship. Admission to the BDS program is based on NEET UG scores, with a minimum requirement of 450 marks.

description: Maulana Azad Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

MAMC cut off 2025 across different exams, courses, and categories will be released soon. Meanwhile, aspirants seeking admission to Maulana Azad Medical College for MD and MS courses can click on the download now link below to view the past four years' NEET PG cutoff ranks for different categories.

Maulana Azad Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 103 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Maulana Azad Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 103 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 381 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Maulana Azad Medical College accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.

Maulana Azad Medical College NEET PG cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to various PG-level courses, like MS. The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category was 106870. According to this range, the most competitive course is MS. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Maulana Azad Medical College MS cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisation for the General AI category was MS in Anatomy. The round 4 closing rank for this specialisation was 106870.
For the students belonging to the OBC category, the NEET PG Round 4 closing was 119220.
Students can refer to the table below to know NEET PG cutoffs across different categories, courses, and years.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Maulana Azad Medical College NEET SS Cutoff 2024 was released for the concluding round in the form of ranks for admission to DM, DNB courses across multiple specialisations. The cutoff was released for various categories belonging to the AI quota.

In the first round, Maulana Azad Medical College DM cutoff 2024 ranged from 33 to 55 for students in the General AI category. was the toughest to get into. turned out to be the most easiest for admission.
In this section, candidates can find out the category-wise NEET SS cutoff 2024 and 2023. In 2024, for the General AI quota, the NEET SS cutoff was closed at 51 for DM in Pulmonary Medicine.
For more in-depth details for the previous year cutoffs, please refer to the table provided below and make use of the filters available to refine your search on the basis of rounds and category.

NEET SS is the accepting exam for Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi admission to various Super Speciality Courses. Candidates appearing for NEET SS can refer to the table below to view the important NEET SS 2025 dates.

Students can view or download the round and year-wise consolidated NEET SS cutoff PDFs for Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi. This will help students to understand the year-wise cutoff trends.

The Medical Counselling Committee (MCC) will start the registration process for NEET MDS Round 1 Seat Allotment from Jul 27, onwards. The MCC has released NEET MDS 2023 Counselling schedule on the official website at mcc.nic.in. The last date to register/ pay the fee for NEET MDS Round 1 Counselling is Aug 1. cutoff 2023 for MDS is based on NEET MDS scores followed by NEET MDS Counselling 2023.

reviews.review_heading: Hostels are the worst part of our college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are not that nice, and bathrooms are genuinely hygienic, so I would rate them 3 stars. The room depends on the individual who is living in it because you can modify your room and keep it clean, and sports facilities are nice enough, but not on par with other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: MAMC - Where you meet your love for medicine.
reviews.review_text: Being a very old college, it lacks infrastructure but the college buildings are renovated from time to time and equipped with the latest technologies and laboratories. Classrooms are well-maintained and fully air-conditioned. Hostels lack accommodation capacity for all students but there has been a recent announcement of new hostel building on the campus by the government, ensuring accommodation for 4,000 students and doctors. We have sports clubs and grounds in the hostel. Nearly 10 messes and ...

reviews.review_heading: By joining MAMC, you will have a thick skin.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is bad, especially the washrooms. But at the same time, the labs, library, and lecture theatres are well maintained. There are a total of 7 places to eat in MAMC, out of which the best one is the JOSHI mess of MAMC in OBH. MAMC has a ground, volleyball, badminton, and basketball courts, and cricket nets.

reviews.review_heading: I love my college and you will also if you wanna be a doctor, Absolutely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of everything is top rated but the IG hostels are quite old, MAMC has been stabilized for decades, the Library is open all time, a large chunk of books are available for students, Full AC library, Full AC classroom, Full AC labs, every office is air having conditioned, All the sports are available in MAMC.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best colleges for MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is nice. The campus has a healthy environment. Lecture theatres are well-equipped and fully air-conditioned. The library has a central hall and is open 24/7. However, due to being one of the oldest college buildings, the latest books are not available. Hostels are separate for boys and girls. The boys' hostel is open 24 hours with no time restrictions, but the girls' hostel has time limitations. The hostel buildings are old, and sometimes hygiene is not proper.

reviews.review_heading: Wanna join this college? Then you must read this.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities have their pros and cons. A pro is that you don't need permission to leave the hostel at any time. However, the buildings are old with little to no renovation, resulting in dirty washrooms and corridors, and there are many dogs in the hostel. The food quality is average. Books and journals are available in the college library, and classrooms are equipped with projectors.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and facilities are excellent. The classrooms are very big. Labs are well-equipped. Whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The library is very big with many books available. The hostel facilities are good. There is a separate hostel for boys and girls. A canteen is also available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The hostel facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The college's infrastructure is of high quality, boasting advanced equipment in the labs and projectors in the classrooms to enhance student understanding. The cafeteria offers a wide range of food items in a hygienic environment.

reviews.review_heading: Mamc Delhi is one of the top colleges in India, with the best students and faculty.
reviews.review_text:
The college has a well-established infrastructure.
Lecture theaters are there.
Practical labs and demo rooms are there.
There are no Wi-Fi facilities at the college.
You have to buy your own Wi-Fi connection.
There are five associated hospitals with the college.
A 24-hour open central library is available.
Separate hostels for boys and girls are there.

reviews.review_heading: This knowing platform for the journey of MBBS makes me satisfied as now I know.
reviews.review_text: There are new lecture theaters made recently and the old one are upgraded. Talking about the core infrastructure which is made a long time back can give you a feeling of old but it's well upgraded now. Library facilities and Wi-Fi are there and the hostels are regularly upgrading according.

reviews.review_heading: Maulana Azad Medical College - Honest Review.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are average, sometimes news is heard of falling ceiling in reading room and room balcony. But the freedom is there thankfully, and honesty no body pokes in your personal life. No Wi-Fi, library is full most of the times. Classrooms are newly built theatre which are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like classrooms, lecture theatres, a library, etc. Wi-Fi is not available in our college. The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The hostel rooms are clean. Washrooms are clean and hygienic. The food served in the mess is average.

reviews.review_heading: Very good exposure to knowledge regarding every disease.
reviews.review_text: Very good infrastructure and faculty members with great knowledge have a separate library and well-furnished classrooms. There are so many mess halls and canteens that you will love the food here. It has a separate sports complex area and so many different extracurricular societies.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. We have hostels for boys, girls, nurses, interns, BDS students, and PGs. There is a huge central library in this college. Several books and journals are available in the library. There are 7 lecture theatres which are equipped with the latest technology and air-conditioners. A playground is available for sports like football. Our college also has basketball and volleyball courts. A swimming pool is available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Very good faculty and exposure is there.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okayish. But the buildings of some hostels are old. There is no WIFI on the campus for students. Labs and classrooms are fully equipped with air conditioners. The food in hostels is okayish, but it is a bit monotonous. We have a badminton and basketball court in our hostel.

data.description: Yes, hostel facilities are available for MBBS students at Maulana Azad Medical College. There are separate undergraduate hostels for boys and girls, with the college having three undergraduate boys hostel and four undergraduate girls hostel. The annual fee for UG hostels is as under:

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Maulana Azad Medical College, University of Delhi

likes.text: Many of the seniors got seats in the best colleges to complete their post graduation like AIIMS PGI, MAMC, and UCMS.
All students get internships at Lok Nayak Hospital, Guru Nanak Eye Center, GB Pant, and Sushrut Trauma Center.

likes.text: Very good-quality food is served in the mess, and sports facilities are available in each of our college's hostels.
Very good infrastructure and faculty members with great knowledge have a separate library and well-furnished classrooms.

likes.text: This college is a very good platform for students to gain knowledge from qualified teachers to become a competent doctor.
Their curriculum is relevant, and all the students are ready for higher-level, and semester exams are not hard.

likes.text: I chose the course because I love the way dentists give the confidence to a smiling person while simulataneously treating a number of diseases.
They organise annual international college fest called Synapse which will be held in March and annual intra-college fest called Goonj, held in October.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The course is tough, as are the faculty, but the patient inflow and the devices are worth it.

review_content.Placements: About 250 students are present in my batch, and the admission depends on the rank secured in NEET UG and the cutoff of that year. Internship is compulsory in MBBS. KIMS comes under the top 30 medical colleges in India. Admission depends on the trend of cutoff every year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good, and all the facilities, including free Wi-Fi, are present. The classroom or lecture hall is rather large and spacious to accommodate the 250 students. Medical students have their personal library, and one common library is also present.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Life of a medical student at KIMS.

review_content.Placements: There are almost 250 students in each class every year. After completion of your 4-year MBBS course, you will do an internship and can appear for PG exams. Package depends on your work experience. The more participants you interact with, the more your experience and learnings will be.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and campus life are great here; free Wi-Fi is available throughout the college and hostel. Labs are available for all the subjects taught and lots of libraries, including a big central library, are available for students to study in. The quality of food available in the mess is decent enough. Gyms and food courts are available throughout the campus.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider KIMS - Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: KIMS - Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences is a renowned institution offering MD, MS, M.Ch, DM, MBBS. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. KIMS - Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences boasts an impressive review rating of 4.17 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.79 for Campus Life, 4.14 for Placements, 4.44 for Faculty, and 4.47 for Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at KIMS - Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences?
overview_faqs.answer: The fee bracket for programs offerred by the KIMS - Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences is approximately INR 825000 - INR 8325000.

review_summary.college_name: Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: KIMS- Huge infrastructure that offers a good amount of stipend during internships.

content.Placements: KIMS a part of KIIT offers valuable education both clinically and theoretically to ace medical students. It offers courses such as MBBS, pharma, nursing, allied and paramedical sciences, as well as MD and super speciality courses and recruit admission on the basis of NEET-UG, PG, and SS exams.
content.Infrastructure: On our KIMS campus food courts are available to hang out. Wi-Fi is available in hostels. Mess food is good both vegetarian and non-vegetarian foods available, fully air-conditioned rooms with double occupancy, huge football ground and sports room and gym swimming pool facility are also available for medical students. Library of KIMS is very nice and has a very good ambiance which allows medical students to study in silence. Above 2000 bed capacity is available in KIMS has super-specialty and oncology hospital. Each department has OPD, ward, OT, and ICUS. KIMS has a huge infrastructure with experienced doctors and they are helping medical students to become good future doctors.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: KIMS has set a benchmark!

content.Placements: College provides excellent opportunities for exposure, especially with practical experience, creating a safe atmosphere for budding doctors. The students are given the opportunity for internships under the best doctors and fraternity, along with valuable public dealing experiences.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides great amenities, from sports complexes to high-tech libraries. The college has a four-story library with computer labs and information resources. There are also sports complexes with training for all major sports and swimming pools with trained instructors.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The course is tough, as are the faculty, but the patient inflow and the devices are worth it.

content.Placements: About 250 students are present in my batch, and the admission depends on the rank secured in NEET UG and the cutoff of that year. Internship is compulsory in MBBS. KIMS comes under the top 30 medical colleges in India. Admission depends on the trend of cutoff every year.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good, and all the facilities, including free Wi-Fi, are present. The classroom or lecture hall is rather large and spacious to accommodate the 250 students. Medical students have their personal library, and one common library is also present.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Life of a medical student at KIMS.

content.Placements: There are almost 250 students in each class every year. After completion of your 4-year MBBS course, you will do an internship and can appear for PG exams. Package depends on your work experience. The more participants you interact with, the more your experience and learnings will be.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and campus life are great here; free Wi-Fi is available throughout the college and hostel. Labs are available for all the subjects taught and lots of libraries, including a big central library, are available for students to study in. The quality of food available in the mess is decent enough. Gyms and food courts are available throughout the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college life but not value for money.

content.Placements: There is an internal internship programme. There are 4.5 years of teaching and a 1.5-year internship. The payment for my senior batch was 35k per month, which keeps increasing per batch. Everyone gets the internship. After that, the students can look for jobs outside, opt for a juniorship in KIMS or prepare for a PG.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good and is improving day by day. The college has 24/7 library faculty. Good lecture theater. The hostels are pretty good too but not as great as it seems. The infrastructure currently is 2 or 3 out of 5. But with the renovations that are going on, it is surely gearing up.

hostel_campus.college_name: Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: There are 20 hostels for boys and 11 hostels for girls are available with accommodation capacity of 10180 and 5648 students respectively. About 30% of the hostel rooms are air-conditioned and all the hostels have attached canteens serving good quality food. Each hostel has 24-hour reading room, the facility for indoor and outdoor games and wireless internet and intranet connectivity. There is a dedicated international hostel accommodates foreign students.

library.description: The Library of Kalinga Institute of Medical Sciences is very well-stocked with 32491 books, National and International both Print Journals having count of 67 titles, Back Volumes are 135 titles, CDs and DVD's are 400 in number.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Swimming Pool, Tennis Court, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Court, Throwball Court, Rugby Ground, Track & Field (400 m)

reviews.review_heading: Our college is a place to live your dreams.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college includes a 2,300 bedded multispeciality hospital, a teaching college building, labs, dissection hall, gyms, swimming pools, boys and girls hostels, several canteens, etc. Each department has a separate wing in the hospital. All the hostels and hospital are fully Wi-Fi enabled. There are 5 lecture halls with LCD screens and projectors. The library has a reading club, and one can also get books for reading at the hostel for a period of 15 days which is renewable. ...

reviews.review_heading: KIMS college will give wings to your dreams.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is remarkably good with good amenities, and the college authority is working tirelessly to improve it. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are smart classes with LCD screens and projectors to make students learn better. The library is one of its kind with a reading facility and contains all the newly published articles and journals. The mess food can be improved in the quality and taste.

reviews.review_heading: I am lucky to be a part of KIMS, pursuing my dream course from here.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are good enough. The infrastructure of our college is quite good. The hospital consists of 2,300 beds, which is going to increase in the near future. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The classrooms are smart classes, and the library has all the medical books related to the curriculum. The hostel rooms are 2-bedded AC rooms with attached bathrooms. The mess food, according to me, is just fine and eatable. But you can have good food in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: In our college, you can achieve your dreams.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is gigantic. The college building is spread in a large area, and the attached hospital has a bed capacity of around 2,300, which is large. The campus is fully Wi-Fi-enabled, and classrooms are smart with projectors and LCD screens. The library contains a varied number of medical books, articles and research papers. There is a ground for organising sports events like cricket, basketball, volleyball, etc. The mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: KIMS is a brand in medical education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is fabulous. It has several towering buildings and a large multispeciality-attached teaching hospital where clinical postings of students occur. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and the classrooms are air-conditioned and equipped with modern amenities. The hostel provides double-sharing rooms with attached washrooms. The mess provides good and healthy food. Medical facilities are very good and serve all the needs of students.

college_info.intro:
AIIMS Raipur's popular programmes include MBBS and BSc. MBBS is the flagship programme of the institute, which is offered for the duration of 5.5 years. The seat intake of the programme is 125. After the successful completion of the MBBS programme, students could either pursue higher education such as MD, MS, etc. or start their practice.
All Indian Institute of Medical Sciences Raipur offers BSc programmes to students a the UG level. The institute offers BSc specialisations in Nursing, Operation Theatre Technology, Audiology & Speech Language Pathology, Medical Technology in Radiography, and Medical Laboratory Technology. Below are some of the AIIMS Raipur courses and their respective eligibility and AIIMS Chhattisgarh fee structure:

reviews_list.review_title: Life of a nursing student at AIIMS Raipur.

review_content.Placements: Every year 75 students are selected on the basis of a counseling procedure. Each student gets an internship in the hospital and is paid a stipend of 13,500/- for 6 months. We are posted in the hospital for better clinical exposure for better learning.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a separate building known as the nursing college than the medical college. We have lab demonstrations for different departments such as NF, MSN OBG, CHN, etc. The food prepared by the mess is fine, but sometimes the quality is not so good. The menu is decided as per the students choices.

reviews_list.review_title: Not completely satisfied but overall it's good. Infrastructure is highly developed.

review_content.Placements: 75 students are there in each batch and every passed student in 3rd year gets a chance of internship during the 4th year which is the final year. Internship is for 6 months which provides good clinical exposure so students are more practically educated.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are highly advanced, library is also there which remains open for 24?7, Wi-Fi connection is there in the library, canteen is also there, games and sports are held during various time period and on various occasions, mess food is not that much good and the mess feels is also high.

review_summary.college_name: AIIMS Raipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are very cooperative with us. Vacation is less, but this career is future-oriented.

content.Placements: After 3.5 years of the course, you have to do a compulsory paid internship. They give you 13,500 per month. After completion of your course, you will give NORCET for the nursing officer job. The salary is around 90,000 per month. Except this, you apply for government hospitals also.
content.Infrastructure: There are 4 labs, one library with Wi-Fi, 3 canteens, and 1 cafeteria in our college. There are 2 messes in our college. Mess food is available in both veg and non-veg. Mess food is compulsory, and you have to pay 4,000 per month for the mess. Hostel security is very good. A single room is provided. Water and current are free of cost.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Inside AIIMS Raipur life can be tough but it is worth it.

content.Placements: There are no placement criteria in nursing. You have to clear NORCET to get a job as a nursing officer in AIIMS. The salary is a very handsome amount, which is 80k per month. Internship is generally conducted during the last 6 months of the course with a stipend of 13.5k per month.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is highly up to date with Wi-Fi, labs for every department, and classrooms containing ACs and LED projectors. There is also a central library available that has plenty of books and journals, with an e-library facility also available. Hostels are free, but mess is chargeable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Life of a nursing student at AIIMS Raipur.

content.Placements: Every year 75 students are selected on the basis of a counseling procedure. Each student gets an internship in the hospital and is paid a stipend of 13,500/- for 6 months. We are posted in the hospital for better clinical exposure for better learning.
content.Infrastructure: We have a separate building known as the nursing college than the medical college. We have lab demonstrations for different departments such as NF, MSN OBG, CHN, etc. The food prepared by the mess is fine, but sometimes the quality is not so good. The menu is decided as per the students choices.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Not completely satisfied but overall it's good. Infrastructure is highly developed.

content.Placements: 75 students are there in each batch and every passed student in 3rd year gets a chance of internship during the 4th year which is the final year. Internship is for 6 months which provides good clinical exposure so students are more practically educated.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are highly advanced, library is also there which remains open for 24?7, Wi-Fi connection is there in the library, canteen is also there, games and sports are held during various time period and on various occasions, mess food is not that much good and the mess feels is also high.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of the best medical colleges of India.

content.Placements: We have 75 students in our class with a B.Sc. (Hons) Nursing course. Our faculty is well educated; they provide us with more than enough knowledge regarding our course, which helps us in the future to clear the competition exams to get jobs easily. In our college, the top 3 courses are MBBS, nursing, and paramedical.
content.Infrastructure: Our hostel has very nice infrastructure. We all have single rooms with attached washrooms in the 1st year, and after that, up to the 4th year, we have single rooms, but washrooms are not attached. The hostel provides us all the necessary things like a study table, chair, and night lamp. Also, we have windows for better ventilation. We have a separate mess where we get average food.

admission_overview.college_name: AIIMS Raipur Course Admissions 2025: NEET UG, Cutoff, Eligibility & Dates

paragraphs: AIIMS Raipur admission process 2025isentrance-basedfor the majority of the courses. AIIMS Raipur is one of the sixth AIIMS healthcare institutes established by the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India under the Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojna (PMSSY).

Other than MBBS,AIIMS Raipuroffers full-timeMD/MS,MDS, MPHandPG Diplomaat the PG level,DM/MChat the super-specialty level, and Post Doctorate Certification Course(PDCC)andPhDat the doctorate level. Earlier, AIIMS Raipur admission to the MBBS programme was offered with the scores of theAIIMS MBBS Entrance Exam, but the same is now replaced withNEET.
Check out the following video forAIIMS admission process:

AIIMS Raipur also offers para-medical and certificate courses such asBSc, Bachelor in Audiology and Speech-Language Pathology (BASLP), Advanced Diploma in Radiotherapy Technology (ADRT), and Pre-Hospital Trauma Technician (PTT) at UG level and MPH at PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers PhD and Post-Doctoral Certificate Courses. The final selection of candidates for these programmes is based on the overall performance of the aspirants.
Below mentioned are the key highlights of the top courses offered at AIIMS Raipur:
Eligibility
Class 12 pass with 60% aggregate in PCB stream
Class 12 pass with 55% aggregate in PCB stream
AIIMS BSc (Nursing) Entrance Exam
MBBS degree with 55% aggregate recognised by MCI
MBBS degree with 55% aggregate
MD/ DNB in Critical Care
AIIMS Entrance Exam
AIIMS Raipur fee is cumulative of various components, such astuition fee, library deposit, hostel fee, training and placement fee, etc

Coming to affordability is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While availability of education loans and scholarships has made education accessible. However, the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge.
Below are the details for the AIIMS Raipur fee and average package:
Note:Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

AIIMS Raipur accepts the candidates' admission on multiple factors including entrance test score, cutoff, andseat availability.The seat intake can be different for different courses. There are more than 100 seats available for the MBBS course. Find below the number of seats allocated to AIIMS Raipur courses:
Note:Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university-sanctioning body and is subject to change.

AIIMS Raipur admission is conducted inonline modeonly. Admission to all the undergraduate, postgraduate, super-specialty and doctorate programmes is entrance-based. Once the entrance exam is cleared by the candidates with an eligible score, upon counselling, they are directed to bring the required documents for further verification and aPersonal Interview (PI) round.
Below are the step-by-step process for AIIMS Raipur admission:
Step 1: AIIMS Application Process
Step 2: Qualify the Entrance Exam
Candidates need to appear for the entrance examination for the desired programme of AIIMS.
Step 3: Counselling Process
After passing the exam, candidates must attend theNEET counselling process for MBBS(whichever is applicable) and fill the choice of course.
Step 4: AIIMS Selection: Seat Allotment
AIIMS seats will be allotted to the students on the basis of selected courses during the counselling process.
Step 5: Pay the Admission Fee/ Reporting at AIIMS
Selected candidates need to pay the admission fee to complete the admission process successfully at AIIMS Raipur.
For more information about AIIMS Raipur Admission Process check out the below video:

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores does AIIMS Raipur accept for admission to MBBS?
faqs.answer: All India Institute of Medical Sciences AIIMS Raipur only accepts the NEET exam score for admission to MBBS. The admission process is then followed by multiple rounds of NEET counselling for allocation of seats. Other than NEET ranking, the eligibility criteria for MBBS at AIIMS Raipur is to have passed 10+2 with a minimum percentage of 50%. The total seat intake for MBBS at AIIMS Raipur is 125 seats.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the AIIMS Raipur MBBS?
faqs.answer: Admission to AIIMS Raipur is based on the NEET UG Exam.  The steps for seeking admission are as follows:·       Apply for NEET UG.·       Check the result for NEET UG.·       Apply for Counselling.·       In the form fill out the preference.·In the form fill the AIMS Raipur as the Preference.

paragraphs: According to AIIMS Raipur NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during MBBS placements 2022 stood at INR 14 LPA . Further, a total of 45 students were placed and 31 students opted for higher studies out of 94 students during MBBS placements 2022. Apart from this, the median package offered during PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 16 LPA. In addition, a total of 70 students were placed and 11 students opted for higher studies out of total 109 students during AIIMS Raipur PG 3-year placements 2023.

description: AIIMS Raipur cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

AIIMS Raipur cutoff 2024 has been released for NEET UG, detailing both opening and closing ranks across the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. The AIIMS Raipur NEET UG cutoff 2025 will be published following the announcement of the NEET UG 2025 result. In the meantime, candidates seeking admission to AIIMS Raipur can refer to the table below to review the NEET UG and INI CET cutoff ranks for the past three years across various courses, specialisations and categories.

AIIMS Raipur NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 1376 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

AIIMS Raipur MBBS cutoff 2025 was 1376 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 2016 for admission to the MBBS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for MBBS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

AIIMS Raipur accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the MBBS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

Candidates preparing for admission can refer to the table below to view or download the NEET UG round and year-wise consolidated cutoff list. This will help students to understand the past three years' cutoff trends.
AIIMS Raipur INI CET cutoff 2026 has been released for the postgraduate courses MD, MS, etc. At Round 3, the closing ranks ranged from 79 to 23174 for students in the General AI quota.

Considering the ranks, the most competitive for admission was MD in Radiodiagnosis, with a lowest cutoff rank of 79. On the otherhand, the least competitive was MD in Anatomy, with INI CET 2026 cutoff rank of 23174 for admission in the General category.

In the table below, candidates can find the INI CET round- and category-wise cut-off details for admission to various PG medical courses. For General AI category students, the top three most competitive courses for admission were MD in Radiodiagnosis, MD in Paediatrics and MS in Ophthalmology, with Round 3 closing ranks of 79, 319 and 483, respectively.

INI CET counselling is conducted in four rounds: mock round, first round, second round, and open round. All the rounds of counselling are conducted online. Candidates appearing for admission via INI CET can refer to the table provided below to view or download the round and year-wise INI CET cutoff lists.
AIIMS Raipur B.Sc. cutoff 2025 was 1927 in the last round. In 2024, the last round closing rank for the same course was 2076 for the students belonging to the General AI quota.
For the OBC category students, the AIIMS Nursing cutoff 2025 for the B.Sc. course was 3349 in the last round. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

The AIIMS Raipur cutoff 2025 has been released based on the AIIMS Paramedical exam. The cutoff was released for different categories such as General, OBC, SC, ST and EWS categories belonging to the All India quota. The cutoff range among the General AI category was between 182 and 307.
For candidates belonging to the SC AI category, the range of cutoff fell between 1109 and 2589. The most sought-after course among the SC AI category candidates was

AIIMS Raipur is top ranked by multiple national ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the AIIMS Raipur rankings.

AIIMS Raipur has been recognised for its excellence in various fields by NIRF 2025, outperforming other institutes in parameters such as Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity & Research, as well as fostering an exceptional learning environment.
It is to be noted that the institute has demonstrated an increasing trend in the 'Medical' category as compared to the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, AIIMS Raipur climbed 7 ranks to #31 rank in the 'Medical' category by the NIRF ranking. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

comparison.college: St. John’s National Academy of Health Sciences

outlook.description:
AIIMS Raipur has received strong ranks by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Medical (Government)' category. Provided parameters including, Teaching, Graduation Outcome, Inclusivity and Research, the institute is ranked in a good position as compared to other institutes by the Outlook-ICARE 2025.
Find below the latest rankings and category breakdowns from several ranking bodies.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are very cooperative with us. Vacation is less, but this career is future-oriented.
reviews.review_text: There are 4 labs, one library with Wi-Fi, 3 canteens, and 1 cafeteria in our college. There are 2 messes in our college. Mess food is available in both veg and non-veg. Mess food is compulsory, and you have to pay 4,000 per month for the mess. Hostel security is very good. A single room is provided. Water and current are free of cost.

reviews.review_heading: Inside AIIMS Raipur life can be tough but it is worth it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is highly up to date with Wi-Fi, labs for every department, and classrooms containing ACs and LED projectors. There is also a central library available that has plenty of books and journals, with an e-library facility also available. Hostels are free, but mess is chargeable.

reviews.review_heading: Life of a nursing student at AIIMS Raipur.
reviews.review_text: We have a separate building known as the nursing college than the medical college. We have lab demonstrations for different departments such as NF, MSN OBG, CHN, etc. The food prepared by the mess is fine, but sometimes the quality is not so good. The menu is decided as per the students choices.

reviews.review_heading: Not completely satisfied but overall it's good. Infrastructure is highly developed.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are highly advanced, library is also there which remains open for 24?7, Wi-Fi connection is there in the library, canteen is also there, games and sports are held during various time period and on various occasions, mess food is not that much good and the mess feels is also high.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best medical colleges of India.
reviews.review_text: Our hostel has very nice infrastructure. We all have single rooms with attached washrooms in the 1st year, and after that, up to the 4th year, we have single rooms, but washrooms are not attached. The hostel provides us all the necessary things like a study table, chair, and night lamp. Also, we have windows for better ventilation. We have a separate mess where we get average food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good college, but life can be hectic, best for skill learning.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good with proper AC rooms, and everyone gets a single room hostel here, and no hostel fees, too. A central library is there where students can access different types of books, from story books to our study-related books. For sports, a playground is there. Gym facilities are there, too. Open gym and actual gym both are present. Mess food depends on the supplier, and a mess committee is there who regularly checks the quality of food and all.

reviews.review_heading: Review of AIIMS Raipur - All India Institute of Medical Sciences.
reviews.review_text: The college has 4 lecture theatres with central AC and can accommodate a strength of 150 to 200 people. The library is on 3rd floor with central AC and an e-Library with laptops and computers of Dell and HP. Labs are well-equipped with all the new facilities. We have a private mess which offers good quality food, like roti, curry, rice and also butter milk. We have chicken twice a week, on Wednesday and Sunday. Sports facilities like a basketball court and volleyball court are available. A crick...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with everything in our college.
reviews.review_text: Central Wi-Fi is available in our college for every staff and students. Labs and classrooms are well-equipped with new facilities and excellent infrastructures. Library is vast and two storied. E library is also available for every student and staff. Hostel is excellent as every student gets a single room with very tasty food. Canteen, mess are very hygienic. Sports and Games are organised every year by students union. Medical facilities are always available for everyone.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure and placements in this course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. As there was a very campus and a very attractive college building. They also provide a 2-floor library with all course books. It provides free Wi-Fi in the library, with individual subjects laboratory and good practical demonstrations. The hostel security was good and the food served in the mess was good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good opportunities to gain good knowledge in our field.
reviews.review_text: We had proper facilities of college and hostel, good electricity supply, water facility and a hygienic place to live. There was a huge library with seating arrangements of more than 200 students at a time with air-conditioners.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a very underrated college in North India.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-suited single room for every student in the hostel, but Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel. However, Wi-Fi is available in the library, and the library is one of the best libraries in Raipur. AIIMS Raipur is spread over an area of 103 acres. The mess of AIIMS Raipur is very good, and the quality of the food served in it is very good. There are grounds for every sport like cricket, badminton, basketball and football.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to study radiology at an affordable budget.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Hostel is not good but manageable. Wi-Fi was available in the library but not outside. Practical lab is good to do practicals every day. The quality of the food is good but it takes time to adjust to it for newcomers. Medical facilities are provided for students. Sports and games are held in December every year.

reviews.review_heading: AIIMS RAIPUR, Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of AIIMS is really good. It have a very big campus. It have many different hostel for each year student and have lifts in them (some). It has big playground for cricket, football, basketball and volleyball. If you wanna play indoor games even than you don't need to be disappointed, it has all the infrastructure you want.

data.description: All Indian Institute of Medical Sciences Raipur appoints well-experienced and trained faculty members with years of experience in the related field. The faculty focuses on theoretical and practical knowledge to the students. The faculty engages the students with the latest activities and innovative teaching and quality research.

college_info.intro:
Jamia Hamdard University New Delhi popular programmes are BTech, BPharma, and MBA. Jamia Hamdard's Majeedia Unani Hospital has recently received the NABH certificate. For MBA students, the university organises Biz-Quiz, Management Fests, Debates, Ad-mad shows, and others. Hamdard New Delhi also arranges guest lectures & student and faculty exchange programmes for MBA students. MBA students can work as Marketing Managers, Consultants, & also Finance Managers, or can take up several other job opportunities. Jamia Hamdard New Delhi BTech students can work as Software Engineers, Data Scientists, and others. Overall, Hamdard University Delhi is one of the highest-ranked universities present in India.
Jamia Hamdard University New Delhi BTech in Computer Science is the most opted course. A lot of Jamia Hamdard University students are working in the university itseld or are placed in TCS, Accenture, and several other organisations. Below mentioned are some of the programmes offered by Jamia Hamdard University and their respective eligibility and Jamia Hamdard University fee structure:

placements.overview: Students who wish to get admission must take part in the Jamia Hamdard University admission process before the last date of application. Candidates must know their Jamia Hamdard University eligibility criteria and apply accordingly. At the UG level, the university offers BSc, BTech, and other courses to students. BTech is provided in various specialisations such as Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence), and others. At the PG level, the college offers MPharm, MSc, MTech, MBA, and other courses to students. The college also gives , lateral entry, and various other courses to students. faqs.answer: A:    Jamia Hamdard University BSc course fee is cumulative of various components, such as caution deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. These components are one-time chargeable or have to be paid annually/semesterly. The course tuition fee ranges between INR 3.3 Lacs - INR 4.2 lakh, one-time fee is INR 18,000 and the hostel charges range between INR 70,700 and INR 2.46 lakh.Some amount of the fee have to be paid after final selection for seat confirmation. Students must note that the gien fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.review_title: I am not saying that the college is bad, but the students are.

review_content.Placements: 5 percent of students get placed. The highest package is around 6 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. TCS and Wipro are regular recruiting companies. 30 percent of students get internships in various companies like Infosys and TCS. Roles offered are software developer and web developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average. Only the canteen, campus, and medical facilities are good, the rest are average. The library is noisy every time I see it. Labs are not good, systems don't work often. Only cricket is good, no other sport. Everything is taken lightly, and there are fights very often.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Faculty members and placements are good every year, and the infrastructure is average.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70–80 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 15 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. Recruiting organizations include some universities and hospitals. Roles offered are professor and physiotherapist roles in sports, neuro, musculoskeletal, and cardiovascular specializations. Many alumni start working abroad, and we have a wide range of options for how we want to work.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is above average, and we can rate it 4/10. Some cons include lift issues and Wi-Fi speed. Labs have almost all the required equipment. Hostel facilities are average. They charge a high amount, but facilities are not worth it. Mess and canteen are available, and their prices are reasonable. Medical facilities are good, as we have a hospital and a rehabilitation centre. In sports, we have football, volleyball, badminton, basketball, cricket, table tennis, carrom, and chess. We need improvement in all these areas.
