overview_faqs.question: What is the course fee for BSc at Jamia Hamdard University?
overview_faqs.answer: Jamia Hamdard University BSc course fee is cumulative of various components, such as caution deposit, tuition fee, hostel fee, and more. These components are one-time chargeable or have to be paid annually/semesterly. The course tuition fee ranges between INR 3.3 Lacs - INR 4.2 lakh, one-time fee is INR 18,000 and the hostel charges range between INR 70,700 and INR 2.46 lakh.Some amount of the fee have to be paid after final selection for seat confirmation. Students must note that the gien fee is taken from the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is fee refundable at Jamia Hamdard University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Jamia Hamdard follows a fee refund policy in case of cancellation of admission. Students are allowed fee refund within a specific period top for a course they choose. Below is the fee refund policy at Jamia Hamdard University:Percentage of Fee RefundPoint of time when notice of withdrawal of admission is received in the HEI100%15 days or more before the formally notified last date of admission90%Less than 15 days before the formally notified last date of admission80%15 days or less after the formally notified last date of admission50%30 days of less after the formally notified last date of admission00%More than 30 days after formally notified last date of admission

overview_faqs.question: How is hostel fee charged for the candidates who join in the middle of the session at Jamia Hamdard?
overview_faqs.answer: At Jamia Hamdard, the hostel fee is charged for the whole academic year. If a student is allotted the hostel in the middle of the session, the hostel charges are then calculated quarterly as mentioned below:First quarter: July 1 to September 30Second quarter: October 1 to December 31Third quarter: January 1 to March 31Fourth Quarter: April 1 to June 30

overview_faqs.question: Is hostel fee refunded in case of admission cancellation at Jamia Hamdard?
overview_faqs.answer: In case a student does not join the hostel but informs the Provost Office within a week after payment of the hostel fee about the withdrawal, the hostel charges are then refunded after deduction of INR 1000. In case the student withdraws admission within one month of joining of hostel, the fee is refunded after a deduction of 25% of the hostel fee. In any other case, no fee except security deposit is refundable. It is refunded to the hosteller after he/she has paid all dues and vacated the hostel.

review_summary.college_name: Jamia Hamdard Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: If you want to relax and only degree, then go.

content.Placements: About 70% student got placement. The highest package is 30 LPA, and the average is 6 LPA. Companies like Wipro, HCL, and some foreign companies recruit. Students got 100% internship roles like developed trainee and so on. My college fees are so high, about 9 lakhs too.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are enough, okay, but infrastructure needs construction, and some classes are not well organized. So Wi-Fi also does work proper. The hostel is good, but there is also a bad thing about wash room. Overall, there is no much facilities provide as other.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in International Studies and Global Politics - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Truly satisfied with the campus life and facilities.

content.Placements: This is a new course in Jamia Hamdard. My batch is the second batch, so I don’t have any idea about placements, but the university also offers M.A. in this course as well as Ph.D. in this course. This course has good scope in India and especially outside.
content.Infrastructure: Amazing infrastructure; they provide Wi-Fi, AC classrooms, a decent library, and they have around 4–5 canteens with good quality food. They conduct sports events and tournaments every few months, so overall a good experience. I don’t have any idea about hostel, but the rest everything is nice, and they also have a hospital on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am not saying that the college is bad, but the students are.

content.Placements: 5 percent of students get placed. The highest package is around 6 LPA, and the lowest is 3 LPA. TCS and Wipro are regular recruiting companies. 30 percent of students get internships in various companies like Infosys and TCS. Roles offered are software developer and web developer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are average. Only the canteen, campus, and medical facilities are good, the rest are average. The library is noisy every time I see it. Labs are not good, systems don't work often. Only cricket is good, no other sport. Everything is taken lightly, and there are fights very often.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members and placements are good every year, and the infrastructure is average.

content.Placements: Almost 70–80 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 15 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. Recruiting organizations include some universities and hospitals. Roles offered are professor and physiotherapist roles in sports, neuro, musculoskeletal, and cardiovascular specializations. Many alumni start working abroad, and we have a wide range of options for how we want to work.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is above average, and we can rate it 4/10. Some cons include lift issues and Wi-Fi speed. Labs have almost all the required equipment. Hostel facilities are average. They charge a high amount, but facilities are not worth it. Mess and canteen are available, and their prices are reasonable. Medical facilities are good, as we have a hospital and a rehabilitation centre. In sports, we have football, volleyball, badminton, basketball, cricket, table tennis, carrom, and chess. We need improvement in all these areas.

individual_reviews.course: BBA (Bachelor of Business Administration) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Not the best but not the worst either.

content.Placements: As much as I have heard, the placement records are not very high. Teachers help in getting you placed, but it is your job to find a good job, and very few students get placed from the college itself. 30 percent of the students get placed maybe much less as specific records aren't mentioned. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest is 2.8 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA-4.5 LPA. Several companies such as HCL, Tata, Coca-Cola, and others. From my course 70 percent of students got internships Roles that are offered are data analyst, customer executive, salesforce, managerial roles, etc.

admission_overview.title: Jamia Hamdard University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Jamia Hamdard admissions are both merit and entrance-based. The institute accepts various national-level entrance exam scores, such as JEE Main, NEET UG, CAT, etc. for specific courses. Jamia university conducts Written Tests and Interviews for M.Phil and PhD programmes. JHU offers over 100 courses at the UG, PG, Diploma and doctoral level. The courses are offered in various streams such as Management, Science, Engineering, etc. In addition to the regular courses, the university also has a distance learning vertical called Jamia Hamdard Centre for Distance and Online Education (CDOE) that offers courses at the UG, PG, Diploma and certificate level. Below is the overview of Jamia Hamdard admission process: 1. Aspirants must fulfil the academic requirements as specified by the course. The minimum qualification for UG courses is Class 12.

eligibility_selection.title: Jamia Hamdard University Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Jamia Hamdard Deemed-to-be University offers both merit-based and entrance-based admission to a variety of programmes offered by it under Medicine, Engineering, Pharmacy and Software & IT, among other streams. Candidates seeking admission must check the recent admission guidelines released by the university and apply online only if eligible. The following table carries the top Jamia Hamdard courses with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Biotechnology and English subjects individually in the qualifying examination with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for General PwD and 40% aggregate for reserved category candidates)
Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry and Biology/ Mathematics with at least 50% aggregate and also in the aggregate of Physics, Chemistry and Biology/ Mathematics
Class 12 with at least 50%-55% aggregate
Bachelor's degree in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate or CGPA 5 on the 10-point scale
courses_table.selection_criteria: CAT, CMAT, MAT, GMAT, XAT, GPAT, or ATMA + GDPI

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 examination with Mathematics and Physics as compulsory subjects and one of the following: Computer Science, Chemistry, Electronics from CBSE or any other Board with at least 50% aggregate or equivalent CGPA in aggregate
Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology subjects individually in the qualifying examination with at least 50% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC)

paragraphs: Jamia Hamdard admissions are multi-step process. Aspirants need to complete all the stages of admission to get a seat in the university. Below are steps in detail:
STEP 1: Jamia Hamdard Application Process 2026

Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria have to register for the course of their choice on the official website of the university. Aspirants must upload the documents and pay the application fee to apply for a programme.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Jamia Hamdard selects candidates for most of the courses based on national-level entrance exams. The university accepts JEE Main, CAT, MAT, XAT, NEET, etc. for admission to specific courses. For a few programme, the university might consider merit in the last qualifying exam. MBBS and BPharm are the top programme of Jamia Hamdard. Admission to both is through NEET-UG. The university also accepts JEE Main for for BPharm.
STEP 3: Selection List and Counselling

After completion of all the selection rounds, Jamia Hamdard releases a selection list with the names of shortlisted candidates. Such candidates recieve an email with further instructions. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for counselling round along with the below documents for verification:

faqs.question: Is Jamia Hamdard University under CUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jamia Hamdard offers admission to students on the basis of CUET entrance exam. The college will release the final merit list of the basis of scores obtained by the students in this exam. Candidates can check the official website for more information.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Jamia Hamdard?
faqs.answer: Jamia Hamdard releases its recent admission guidelines or prospectus on the official website a the start of the admission for each academic year. Students must check the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria and follow the process. Admission to all the courses is either merit or entrance based. For instance, admission to the BTech and MBBS courses are subject to JEE Main and NEET UG exams, However, for courses, such as BCA, admission is subject to merit in Class 12 in the best of five subjects. Additionally,  the deemed-to-be University accepts CUET UG conducted by NTA for a few of its UG courses, namely BA, BA (Hons), BSc (Hons), BBA, BJMC and BCom.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff of Jamia Hamdard?
faqs.answer: The cutoff for Jamia Hamdard University is the minimum marks that a candidate must achieve to get considered for admission to Jamia Hamdard University. The cutoff is diverse for each category and course. For example, the cutoff for the MBBS programme is quite different for General category students as compared with the OBC students. The cutoff marks and scores for Jamia Hamdard University are decided by quite a number of factors, including the total seats available for the students, the number of applicants, and the average scores of the various applicants. The cutoff is generally released after the results are released for the NEET. For cutoff-related details, please visit the official website of Jamia Hamdard University.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BPharm at Jamia Hamdard?
faqs.answer: Candidates wanting to get in the BPharm course of Jamia Hamdard must fulfil its eligibility requirements. The important documents must be kept handy for verification purposes. Candidates seeking admission who meet the below criteria can apply for the course admission:Class 12 pass with Physics, Chemistry and Biology/Mathematics with at least 50% aggregate and also in the aggregate of Physics, Chemistry and Biology/Mathematics can apply.Aspirants should be 17 years old on or before 31st December of the year of admission.

placement_data.title: Jamia Hamdard Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to the Annual Report 2024-25 released, a total of 28 students were placed from the School of Pharmaceutical Education & Research (SPER). The salary package recorded during Jamia Hamdard placements for SPER was between INR 3 LPA and 26 LPA . From School of Nursing Sciences and Allied Health (SNSAH), 99 students were placed with salary package ranging from 3 LPA to 6 LPA .

During Jamia Hamdard placements 2025, 45 students were placed and 45 students opted for higher studies from School of Engineering Sciences and Technology (SEST). The top recruiters included Accenture and Deloitte .

In School of Chemical and Life Sciences (SCLS), 29 students were placed with salary package between 2.5 LPA and 4.5 LPA . Further, 12 students of School of Interdisciplinary Sciences and Technology were placed with package between 1.2 LPA and 10 LPA .
In Centre for Media and Mass Communication, 5 students were placed with salary package between 3 LPA and 5 LPA during Jamia Hamdard placement 2025.

faqs.question: Is there fee concession at Jamia Hamdard?
faqs.answer: Jamia Hamdard provides fee concession to students pursuing a course from the university. The tuition fee concession is offered to the students of weaker sections of societies whose parents income is below INR 4.5 Lacs per annum. The students are granted fee concession from 25% to 50% based on Merit-cum-Means and on case to case basis.

faqs.question: What is the fees of Jamia Hamdard MBA?
faqs.answer: The Jamia Hamdard University MBA fee structure is cumulative of multiple components, such as tuition fees, hostel fees, library deposit, alumni fund, etc. Some of these are one-time chargeable, while some are charged one-time. Jamia Hamdard MBA tuition fees is INR 5 lakh , hostel fees is INR 1.28 lakh , and one-time fees is INR 18,000 . Additionally, the tuition fees for the Online MBA is INR 1 lakh . This fee is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

description: Jamia Hamdard University cutoff 2025 will be out soon for admission to mutiple UG and PG courses. The cutoff will be based on the performance by each candidate in national-level entrance exam such as, NEET UG, NEET PG, etc. In the meantime, candidates can view the exam-wise section below for Jamia Hamdard University cutoff 2024 for different exams, courses, rounds and categories. More exam related updates are given below:

Jamia Hamdard NEET cut off has been released up to Round 3 Seat Allotment results for the MBBS course. As per the Jamia Hamdard NEET cut off 2023, the closing rank for General category candidates for Round 1 was 56658. Only candidates with a NEET score are allowed to participate in Jamia Hamdard's admissions to the MBBS course.

Jamia Hamdard NEET cutoff 2024 has been concluded after the release of Round 3. As per Jamia Hamdard cutoff 2024, the last round closing rank stood at 59571 for Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS), while in 2022, the last round closing rank was 27485. In 2021, it was 29418 for the General All India category students. Analysing the Round 3 closing rank for the last three years, Jamia Hamdard has witnessed an increasing trend for the MBBS course. Jamia Hamdard MD/ MS cut off 2024 has been released up to Round 5. Jamia Hamdard grants admission through NEET PG scores followed by NEET PG Counselling. Jamia Hamdard's cutoff for NEET PG Round 1 seat allotment for top courses was 10951 for MD in General Medicine, 14036 for MS in Obstetrtics and Gynaecology, 14587 for MS in General Surgery for the General category candidates belonging to All India Quota.

For candidates belonging to the All India Quota, NEET PG Round 5 seat allotment for Jamia Hamdard MD/ MS cut off 2023 stood at 10951 for MD in General Medicine for the General category AI candidates. MD in General Medicine can be considered as the most competitive rank due to the ascending score. In 2022, MD in General Medicine stood at 14473 and in 2021 at 7833. Offered across three MD specialisations, Jamia Hamdard offers admission to various MD (Ayurveda-based) courses based on AIAGPET scores and counselling. AACCC has released AIAPGET cutoff 2023 up to Round 3 for the University. As per cutoff 2023, the closing rank for top courses including MD in Moalajat was 421, MD in Ilmul Advia was 895, for MD in Tahaffuzi-wa-Samaji Tib was 454. Candidates can check AIAGPET cutoff for Jamia Hamdard in the table below:

Jamia Hamdard University cutoff 2024 has been released, for it's third round for the candidates seeking admission to the NEET UG course. As per the AYUSH NEET UG Round 3 Seat Allotment Result, the most competitive course was BUMS - Bachelor of Unani Medicine and Surgery with a cutoff rank of 123886 for the students belonging to the General AI category.

highlights.description:
One of India’s top institutes is Jamia Hamdard University. As per the NIRF Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #74 under the category Overall, #47 under University, #87 under Management, #1 under Pharmacy, and #40 under Medical. At the international level, QS World Rankings 2025 has ranked the institute at #1201-1400 position. Jamia Hamdard University is top ranked by multiple national & international ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the Jamia Hamdard University rankings.
Read less

nirf.description:
According to the rankings from NIRF, Jamia Hamdard University outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Jamia Hamdard University's rankings in 'Overall' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Jamia Hamdard University fell 12 ranks to #74 rank in the 'Overall' category by the NIRF ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'University' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Jamia Hamdard University fell 7 ranks to #47 rank in the 'University' category by the NIRF ranking.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Engineering' category have displayed a stable trend when evaluated against previous year's ranking. In 2025, Jamia Hamdard University's rank is #201, the same as last year's rank in the 'Engineering' category by the NIRF ranking.
It has been seen that in the 'Management' category, the institute's ranks have shown a fluctuating trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, Jamia Hamdard University fell 9 ranks to #87 rank in the 'Management' category by the NIRF ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Jamia Hamdard University has earned commendable rankings across different domains in the QS World University Rankings 2026. This signifies the institution's esteemed reputation and proficiency in various aspects, assigning it an overall good score. It can be seen that the Jamia Hamdard University's rankings in 'Top Global Universities' category have displayed a fluctuating trend as per the ranks of the previous years. In 2026, Jamia Hamdard University fell 200 ranks to #1401 rank in the 'Top Global Universities' category by the QS World University Rankings.
The rankings of the institute in the 'Asia' category have demonstrated a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Jamia Hamdard University climbed 3 ranks to #498 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings.
Rankings achieved by the institute under the 'Southern Asia' category have exibited an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2026, Jamia Hamdard University climbed 10 ranks to #130 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has ascended in the rankings.

library.description: The Hamdard University has more than 1.75 lakhs items including 30,000 rare books,18,500 back sets of journals. Library subscribes to foreign and Indian journals. It has acquired quite a large number of CDs, microfilms, microfiche and more than 4000 manuscripts in Urdu, Arabic and Persian languages. This library is very rich in oriental collections in different languages including Urdu, Arabic, Persian, etc. Computerization of all the Urdu, Arabic and Persian books has been completed by using UNICODE interface module of LIBSYS package and linked with the English Book database, Journal database, Thesis/Dissertation database and database of CDs on many subjects of interests.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Volleyball Court

reviews.review_heading: If you want to relax and only degree, then go.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are enough, okay, but infrastructure needs construction, and some classes are not well organized. So Wi-Fi also does work proper. The hostel is good, but there is also a bad thing about wash room. Overall, there is no much facilities provide as other.

reviews.review_heading: Truly satisfied with the campus life and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Amazing infrastructure; they provide Wi-Fi, AC classrooms, a decent library, and they have around 4–5 canteens with good quality food. They conduct sports events and tournaments every few months, so overall a good experience. I don’t have any idea about hostel, but the rest everything is nice, and they also have a hospital on campus.

reviews.review_heading: I am not saying that the college is bad, but the students are.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are average. Only the canteen, campus, and medical facilities are good, the rest are average. The library is noisy every time I see it. Labs are not good, systems don't work often. Only cricket is good, no other sport. Everything is taken lightly, and there are fights very often.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and placements are good every year, and the infrastructure is average.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is above average, and we can rate it 4/10. Some cons include lift issues and Wi-Fi speed. Labs have almost all the required equipment. Hostel facilities are average. They charge a high amount, but facilities are not worth it. Mess and canteen are available, and their prices are reasonable. Medical facilities are good, as we have a hospital and a rehabilitation centre. In sports, we have football, volleyball, badminton, basketball, cricket, table tennis, carrom, and chess. We need ...

reviews.review_heading: Not the best but not the worst either.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi service is available, but it rarely works, and data services are negligible here. A lot of issues arise because of that. Classrooms are normal college classrooms with no AC and old fans. The library is functional with a huge number of books but most are outdated. The hostel facilities are great with good rooms, AC, and water supply. The curfew time is 9:30 PM, and the food is a bit hygienic, but not that bad. The sports facilities are great with a huge ground available, and other sports eq...

reviews.review_heading: Poor infrastructure, bad class management, no placements, but good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not good. Wi-Fi works only in specific places. Labs are okay, but water facilities and chemicals are missing, and equipment does not work. The hostel is good overall, and the food is good. Safety is a priority, and the hospital is nearby. There is a sports week, and the main focus is on sports and games too.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Hamdard Institute of Medical  Sciences And Research, New DelhiReviewed on 16 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is a cute college with nice studies.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are not that great. Food is also okay, not very good, and not very bad either. Hostels are clean. College has an AC lecture theatre, library, and computer labs. Washrooms are nice. The college is overall not very big, but it has a cozy vibe.

reviews.review_heading: Jamia Hamdard University review.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs are available for students, and a maximum of 60 students can be in a classroom. The library is also available to assist students. Safe and separate hostels with good hygienic food quality are available for boys and girls. Majeedia Hospital provides medical facilities, and sports grounds are available for games.

reviews.review_heading: Review by a CSE day scholar student.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like classrooms are non-AC. Only the ground floor which are the LT classrooms are smart classes with AC and projector. Other classrooms are without AC. The hostel is good with a lot of facilities like laundry, Wi-Fi and electricity all over. The mess is also good. The food is also good there.

reviews.review_heading: Review by student living life on campus.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like classrooms are non-AC. Only the ground floor which are the LT classrooms are smart classes with AC and projector. Other classes also have projectors but without AC. The hostel is good with a lot of facilities like laundry, Wi-Fi and electricity all over. The mess is also good. The food is also good there.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the evergreen Jamia Hamdard University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the course is well-maintained. It has Wi-Fi, computer labs for doing editing on photoshops, Premiere Pro, Adobe software, and studios for news and radio. It provides a lot of hands-on workshops. The interior of the college where students sit is well-organised and has 99 names of Allah, where everyone feels peace alone at their free time.

reviews.review_heading: The college has supportive faculty, a room with solid placement, and is industry-ready.
reviews.review_text: Jamia Hamdard offers well-equipped laps, Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, a rich library diverse sports facilities, and so on. The campus has a hygienic mess and canteen, reliable medical services, and a sports complex for indoor and outdoor games ensuring holistic student development.

reviews.review_heading: Campus is so clean and green. It was not good in past 2010 but now it is so good.
reviews.review_text: Everything is provided on our campus like Wi-Fi and AC. Classrooms have desks and furniture. Especially every building has its own library. There are certain canteens also with good quality food. Boys and girls have separate hostels and hygiene is also good in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the campus is beautiful teachers are helpful and cooperative, and the placements are okay.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi does not work properly and the college campus has jammers so cell internet doesn't work. Classrooms are getting better in facilities. There are overpriced snacks and food like coffee around 150ml is for Rs. 40 which is very helpful in summer. The campus events can be good if the management is done properly.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the campus, really good teaching staff and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. The buildings are old. Well-equipped Labs and Classroom. The central library is the famous building of our college. The campus is very large and vast.  It has a hostel facility for girls. There are so many Pgs nearby. The food is very tasty. More than 6 canteens are there. A very sports complex is there with a Gym, basketball court volleyball, football, badminton, and tennis court.

data.description: Hamdard University Delhi consists of experienced and highly qualified faculty members. Hamdard University also invites various popular guest faculty and frequently arranges conferences, and several workshops to provide training and for enhancing the knowledge of the students. Jamia Hamdard University faculty are PhD, diploma, and degree holders.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Jamia Hamdard

likes.text: Different companies like Cipla, Maruti Udyog Ltd, Torrent Pharma, HP Global Soft Limited, and Birlasoft Technologies Ltd., visit the campus for recruitment.
The college provides the scholarship for those students, who wanted to prepare for GATE or SSC or IPS examinations.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Our college provides good facilities like Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, modern classrooms, and a decent library.
On a positive note, the university canteen is excellent and according to my friends staying in the hostel, the food is average, with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Teachers are well qualified and knowledgeable, and the teaching quality is also good in our course.
Yes, the course are curriculum relevant and it makes the students industry ready, But if your all the focus is on the course than it's better for you.

Faculty.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: I have chosen this course because unlike normal graduate degree, it is a technical degree, which has diverse fields and lots of opportunities.
The university itself is very much active in organising cultural and social events like dramas, fests, sports meets, Mushayera, Sahitaya nights, and inter-zone match.

paragraphs: Jamia Hamdard University allocates the budget under the Students' Aid Fund (SAF), which is largely meant for the financial assistance of numerous needy students. In addition to this, a number of scholarships/fellowships are awarded to several undergraduate and postgraduate students. Tabulated below are the various scholarships offered by Jamia Hamdard University:
Hamdard National Foundation (HNF) Scholarships
Limited PhD students basis merit-cum-means.
Dr. L.M. Singhvi Gold Medallion (or Silver Shield) of Accolade
For the first and second winners of an essay competition on a subject of topical importance of interfaith dialogue.
Khwaja Moinuddin Chishti Ajmeri (Gharib Nawaz) merit-cum-means scholarships
On the basis of an essay writing competition on the work and life of Khwaja Gharib Nawaz.
Mrs. Shakila Naqvi Merit Scholarships
Muslim female of MSc second year who secures the highest marks in the MSc in first year
Download the Jamia Hamdard University Scholarships Brochure
